summary.zh: BotBrowser是一款专注于反浏览器指纹追踪的隐私浏览器核心。基于最新Chromium构建，通过统一指纹防御技术，在Windows、macOS、Linux等跨平台环境下保持完全一致的指纹特征，有效对抗Cloudflare、Akamai、Kasada等31+种高级追踪检测机制。支持Playwright/Puppeteer集成，提供QUIC/STUN全代理网络栈和毫秒级独立指纹切换，性能损耗低于1%。适用于隐私研究、反欺诈测试和自动化工具开发。
summary.en: BotBrowser is a privacy-first browser core engineered to neutralize browser fingerprinting across platforms. Built on the latest Chromium, it maintains identical fingerprint signatures on Windows, macOS, and Linux, defeating over 31 tracking systems including Cloudflare, Akamai, and Kasada. Key features include Playwright/Puppeteer integration with CDP leak blocking, full QUIC/STUN proxy tunneling, per-context fingerprint isolation with millisecond switching, and benchmark-proven performance parity with Chrome. Designed for privacy research and authorized defensive benchmarking.

metadata.name: VerbaAurea
metadata.description: VerbaAurea： 一个文档预处理工具，专注于为知识库构建提供高质量的文本数据。

summary.zh: VerbaAurea 是专注于知识库构建的智能文档预处理工具，通过多维度评分系统实现语义完整的文档分割。支持DOCX/PDF批量处理，保留原始格式，提供Web界面与命令行两种模式。核心亮点包括句子边界检测、自适应长度控制与中英文差异化处理策略，为RAG和LLM微调提供高质量训练数据。
summary.en: VerbaAurea is an intelligent document preprocessing tool specialized for knowledge base construction, achieving semantic-preserving segmentation through a multi-dimensional scoring system. It supports batch processing of DOCX/PDF formats with original formatting retention, offering both Web UI and CLI modes. Key features include sentence boundary detection, adaptive length control, and differentiated processing strategies for Chinese/English texts, delivering high-quality training data for RAG and LLM fine-tuning.

metadata.name: aipyapp
metadata.description: AI-Powered Python & Python-Powered AI (Python-Use)

summary.zh: Python-Use 提出了一种名为 'AI Think Do' 的 AI Agent 2.0 新范式，旨在取代依赖外部插件和复杂工作流的传统 Agent 1.0 架构。其核心思想是将完整的 Python 解释器环境直接交给 LLM，让模型通过自主编写、调试和执行 Python 代码来直接操作真实环境（如数据、浏览器、文件系统），从而实现任务驱动的端到端自动化。该方案摒弃了 MCP、Function Calling 和插件注册等中间层，强调 'Code is Agent'，以极简架构释放 AI 的原生执行能力。
summary.en: Python-Use introduces a novel AI Agent 2.0 paradigm called 'AI Think Do', designed to replace traditional Agent 1.0 architectures reliant on external plugins and complex workflows. Its core principle is providing LLMs direct access to a full Python interpreter, enabling them to autonomously write, debug, and execute code to interact with real environments (data, browsers, file systems) for task-driven end-to-end automation. It eliminates intermediate layers like MCP, Function Calling, and plugin registration, advocating 'Code is Agent' to unleash native AI execution capabilities with a minimalist architecture.

summary.zh: 暂无描述。

metadata.name: austen
metadata.description: 📚 discover story relationships

summary.zh: Austen是一款AI驱动的文学分析工具，通过集成DeepSeek/OpenAI自动解析书籍角色关系，并生成Mermaid可视化图谱。基于Next.js全栈框架与Supabase后端，支持用户管理、图表保存(SVG/PNG)与社交分享，为教育、阅读及文学研究提供直观的关系探索体验。
summary.en: Austen is an AI-powered literary analysis tool that automatically extracts character relationships from books using DeepSeek/OpenAI and visualizes them via Mermaid diagrams. Built on Next.js fullstack with Supabase backend, it enables user management, graph export (SVG/PNG), and social sharing—ideal for educators, readers, and literary research to visually explore narrative dynamics.

metadata.name: go-cursor-help
metadata.description: 解决Cursor在免费订阅期间出现以下提示的问题:  Your request has been blocked as our system has detected suspicious activity / You've reached your trial request limit.  /  Too many free trial accounts used on this machine.

summary.zh: go-cursor-help是一款用于重置Cursor AI IDE免费试用状态的工具，专门解决因系统检测异常活动、达到试用请求限制或设备关联过多试用账号而导致的阻断问题。通过自动化机制绕过Cursor的试用验证，使开发者能够持续使用AI编程功能。该仓库同时提供付费Cursor Pro账号及7天通行证等订阅服务，形成工具+账号的完整解决方案。
summary.en: go-cursor-help is a tool designed to reset the free trial status of Cursor AI IDE, specifically addressing block issues caused by suspicious activity detection, trial request limits, or excessive trial accounts on a single machine. It automates bypassing Cursor's trial verification, enabling developers to continuously access AI programming features. The repository also offers paid Cursor Pro accounts and 7-day passes, providing a complete tool-and-account solution.

metadata.name: deep-research
metadata.description: Use any LLMs (Large Language Models) for Deep Research. Support SSE API and MCP server.

summary.zh: Deep Research是一个隐私优先的深度研究工具，支持Gemini、OpenAI、Deepseek等主流大模型，可在2分钟内生成综合性研究报告。核心亮点包括：浏览器端本地数据处理确保隐私安全；支持Searxng、Tavily等搜索引擎；提供知识图谱构建和本地知识库管理；支持MCP服务器和SSE API。基于Next.js构建，可一键部署至Vercel或Cloudflare，适用于快速调研和知识整理场景。
summary.en: Deep Research is a privacy-first deep research tool that leverages multiple LLMs (Gemini, OpenAI, Deepseek, etc.) to generate comprehensive reports in approximately 2 minutes. Key features include local browser-side data processing for privacy, integration with search engines like Searxng and Tavily, knowledge graph generation, and local knowledge base management. Built with Next.js, it supports MCP server and SSE API, offering one-click deployment to Vercel or Cloudflare. Ideal for rapid research and knowledge organization with full data control.

metadata.name: shadcn-admin
metadata.description: Admin Dashboard UI built with Shadcn and Vite.

summary.zh: satnaing/shadcn-admin 是基于 Shadcn UI 和 Vite 构建的企业级管理后台 UI 组件库。提供 10+ 预置页面、响应式布局、亮暗主题切换及完善的 RTL 语言支持，深度优化可访问性。通过自定义 Shadcn 组件与 TanStack Router 集成，为开发者提供可直接复用的生产级界面解决方案，显著加速后台系统开发。
summary.en: satnaing/shadcn-admin is a production-grade admin dashboard UI library built with Shadcn UI and Vite. It features 10+ pre-built pages, responsive layouts, light/dark themes, comprehensive RTL support, and deep accessibility optimization. By customizing Shadcn components and integrating TanStack Router, it delivers reusable, enterprise-ready UI solutions that dramatically accelerate backend development.

metadata.name: amlogic-s9xxx-armbian
metadata.description: Supports running Armbian on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

summary.zh: 该项目将Armbian轻量级Linux系统移植到Amlogic、Rockchip和Allwinner等电视盒子及ARM开发板，支持s922x、s905x3、rk3588等多款芯片。用户可替换Android TV系统，将盒子转为基于Debian/Ubuntu的服务器，支持eMMC写入、内核更新与SSH远程管理。适用于家庭服务器、开发测试、NAS及媒体中心等场景，提供Docker镜像与详细文档，助力消费级设备变身高性能Linux机器。
summary.en: This project ports the Armbian lightweight Linux distribution to TV boxes and ARM single-board computers based on Amlogic, Rockchip, and Allwinner SoCs such as s922x, s905x3, rk3588, and more. It enables users to replace Android TV with a full Debian/Ubuntu-based server operating system, featuring eMMC installation, kernel updates, and SSH remote management capabilities. Ideal for home servers, development platforms, NAS, and media centers, the project provides Docker images and comprehensive documentation to transform consumer devices into powerful, stable Linux machines for various server applications.

metadata.name: open-wegram-bot
metadata.description: 【零费用】一个让人呼吸顺畅的 Telegram 双向私聊机器人 🤖 / [Zero Cost] A Smooth-Operating Two-Way Private Messaging Telegram Bot 🤖

summary.zh: Open Wegram Bot 是基于 Cloudflare Worker/Vercel 的 Telegram 双向私聊机器人，实现零成本、无服务器、无数据库的消息中转。采用无状态架构，支持 GitHub/Vercel 等多平台一键部署，无需绑定域名即可运行。适用于个人消息代理、轻量级客服等场景，提供稳定可靠的双向通信能力，是 LivegramBot 的免费替代方案。
summary.en: Open Wegram Bot is a Telegram two-way private messaging bot built on Cloudflare Worker/Vercel, enabling zero-cost, serverless, database-free message forwarding. Featuring stateless architecture, it supports one-click deployment via GitHub/Vercel/Deno/Netlify without custom domain binding. Designed for personal message proxy and lightweight customer service, it provides stable bidirectional communication as a free alternative to LivegramBot with multi-bot support and encrypted security tokens for reliable operation.

metadata.name: easy-dataset
metadata.description: A powerful tool for creating datasets for LLM fine-tuning 、RAG and Eval

summary.zh: Easy Dataset 是一款专为大语言模型训练设计的数据集构建工具。它支持 PDF、Markdown、DOCX 等格式的智能解析与切分，可自动生成高质量问答对、多轮对话及图像问答数据集。内置领域标签树、数据清洗和增强功能，适用于微调、RAG 和评估场景。1.7.0 版本新增评估系统。
summary.en: Easy Dataset is a specialized tool for building LLM training datasets. It intelligently parses and chunks documents in PDF, Markdown, DOCX, TXT, and EPUB formats, automatically generating high-quality QA pairs, multi-turn dialogues, and visual QA datasets. Features include domain label trees, data cleaning/augmentation, and support for fine-tuning, RAG, and evaluation scenarios. Version 1.7.0 introduces a comprehensive evaluation system with multi-dimensional assessment and human blind testing capabilities for domain-specific model validation, post-fine-tuning evaluation, and RAG recall rate assessment tasks in production environments.

metadata.name: shadowfetch
metadata.description: Shadowfetch is a lightweight fetcher built with native TCP Sockets, for Cloudflare Workers.

summary.zh: Shadowfetch 是 Cloudflare Workers 的隐私优先网络请求库，通过原生 TCP 套接字绕过内置 fetch 的元数据泄露问题。核心功能包括自动剥离 cf-ipcountry、cf-connecting-ip 等敏感头信息，确保用户 IP 与地理位置不被意外暴露。适用于需严格隐私保护的代理、镜像或数据转发场景，提供轻量级、可控的请求控制能力。
summary.en: Shadowfetch is a privacy-focused fetcher for Cloudflare Workers that leverages native TCP sockets to prevent metadata leakage from built-in fetch. It sanitizes sensitive headers like cf-ipcountry and cf-connecting-ip, ensuring user IP and geolocation remain hidden. Ideal for privacy-sensitive proxying, mirroring, and data forwarding with minimal overhead and maximum control.

metadata.name: KAG
metadata.description: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs.  It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.

summary.zh: KAG是基于OpenSPG引擎与LLM的逻辑形式引导推理框架，专为专业领域知识库设计。它通过知识与块互索引结构、概念语义对齐及模式约束知识构建，有效解决传统RAG向量模糊性与GraphRAG噪声问题，支持多跳逻辑推理与精准事实问答，性能显著超越当前SOTA方法。
summary.en: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework built on OpenSPG engine and LLMs for professional domain knowledge bases. It overcomes traditional RAG's vector ambiguity and GraphRAG's OpenIE noise via knowledge-chunk mutual indexing, semantic alignment, and schema-constrained knowledge construction. The framework enables multi-hop logical reasoning and precise factual question answering, delivering performance that significantly surpasses current state-of-the-art methods.

metadata.name: DeepSeek-RAG-Chatbot
metadata.description: 100 % FREE, Private (No Internet) DeepSeek’s Advanced RAG: Boost Your RAG Chatbot: Hybrid Retrieval (BM25 + FAISS) + Neural Reranking + HyDe🚀

summary.zh: DeepSeek-RAG-Chatbot 是一款 100% 免费、完全离线的文档智能问答系统。基于 DeepSeek-7B 大模型，采用 BM25 与 FAISS 混合检索、神经重排序及 HyDE 查询扩展技术，显著提升召回率与准确率。v3.0 新增 GraphRAG 知识图谱构建与聊天历史记忆功能，实现上下文感知的连贯对话。支持 PDF/DOCX/TXT 格式，通过 Streamlit 提供直观 UI，可本地一键部署，适用于企业文档分析与个人知识库管理。
summary.en: DeepSeek-RAG-Chatbot is a 100% free, fully offline document QA system powered by DeepSeek-7B. It combines hybrid retrieval (BM25 + FAISS), neural reranking, and HyDE query expansion to maximize recall and accuracy. Version 3.0 introduces GraphRAG knowledge graph construction and chat history memory for contextual, coherent conversations. Supporting PDF/DOCX/TXT formats with an intuitive Streamlit UI, it enables one-click local deployment via Ollama, ideal for enterprise document analysis and personal knowledge management without internet dependency.

metadata.name: openai-gemini
metadata.description: ✦ Gemini ➜ OpenAI API proxy. Serverless!

summary.zh: 该项目是一个OpenAI API格式的代理，将请求转发至Google Gemini API。利用Gemini免费层的慷慨额度，让仅支持OpenAI接口的开发者工具无缝切换至Gemini模型。支持Vercel、Netlify、Cloudflare Workers等Serverless平台一键部署，无需服务器维护，同时提供Node、Deno、Bun本地运行方案，突破地域限制。
summary.en: This project provides a serverless proxy that translates OpenAI API requests to Google Gemini API format. By leveraging Gemini's generous free tier, it enables developers to use OpenAI-exclusive tools with Gemini models at zero cost. Supports one-click deployment to Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Workers, and Deno Deploy without server maintenance. Offers local development via Node, Deno, or Bun, allowing users outside supported regions to obtain API keys via VPN and access Gemini's powerful models seamlessly.

summary.zh: RKNN-Toolkit2是Rockchip NPU的完整AI部署工具链，支持模型转换、推理与性能评估。提供C/Python API，覆盖RK3588/RV1106等多款芯片，具备自动混合精度与图优化能力，助力边缘AI应用快速落地。包含Toolkit、Runtime及Lite版本，支持Python 3.6-3.12，是嵌入式AI开发的核心基础设施，不兼容旧版RKNN-Toolkit。
summary.en: RKNN-Toolkit2 is a complete AI deployment toolchain for Rockchip NPU platforms, enabling model conversion, inference and performance evaluation. It provides both C and Python APIs, supporting multiple chips including RK3588 and RV1106 series. Key features include automatic mixed precision, enhanced graph optimization, and compatibility with Python 3.6-3.12. The toolkit accelerates edge AI application development on embedded devices and is not compatible with the legacy RKNN-Toolkit, requiring migration for new projects.

metadata.name: chatbot
metadata.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

summary.zh: Vercel开源的全功能AI聊天机器人模板，基于Next.js 14 App Router与React Server Components构建。集成Vercel AI SDK提供统一LLM API，默认支持xAI，可无缝切换OpenAI等提供商。采用shadcn/ui组件与Tailwind CSS样式，数据持久化依托Neon Serverless Postgres和Vercel Blob存储，内置Auth.js认证。支持一键部署至Vercel，为开发者提供开箱即用的可扩展聊天应用解决方案。
summary.en: Vercel's open-source, full-featured AI chatbot template built with Next.js 14 App Router and React Server Components. Powered by Vercel AI SDK for unified LLM API access, defaulting to xAI while supporting seamless integration with OpenAI, Anthropic, and other providers. Features shadcn/ui components styled with Tailwind CSS, data persistence via Neon Serverless Postgres and Vercel Blob storage, and Auth.js authentication. Enables developers to quickly build and deploy hackable chatbot applications with one-click Vercel deployment.

metadata.name: pocker
metadata.description: 一个基于 Next.js 开发的全栈 Docker 镜像仓库管理私服，支持一键部署到Vercel。解决国内 Pull 镜像困难问题。

summary.zh: Pocker 是基于 Next.js 的全栈 Docker 镜像仓库管理系统，专为解决国内 Docker Hub 拉取缓慢而设计。系统通过 GitHub Actions 自动化将镜像转存至华为云 SWR，支持一键 Vercel 部署、多区域节点切换、镜像/标签/命名空间全生命周期管理，并提供用量统计与暗黑模式。让每个人都能拥有自主可控的 Docker 私服。
summary.en: Pocker is a full-stack Docker registry management system built with Next.js, designed to solve slow Docker Hub pulls in China. It automatically transfers images to Huawei Cloud SWR via GitHub Actions, enabling one-click Vercel deployment. Key features include multi-region node switching (23 global nodes), complete lifecycle management of images/tags/namespaces, usage statistics, dark mode, and automated workflows. It empowers individuals and teams to own private Docker registries with full data control and security.

metadata.name: moepush
metadata.description: 一个基于 NextJS + Cloudflare 技术栈构建的可爱消息推送服务, 支持多种消息推送渠道✨

summary.zh: MoePush 是基于 Next.js 与 Cloudflare 全栈构建的开源消息推送服务，支持钉钉、企业微信、Telegram 等十余种渠道。项目采用边缘计算架构，通过 Cloudflare Pages 与 D1 数据库实现零成本部署，提供接口组批量推送能力。UI 基于 shadcn/ui 打造，兼具美观与易用性，适用于监控告警、自动化通知等场景。
summary.en: MoePush is an open-source, adorable message push service built on Next.js and Cloudflare stack, supporting over 10 channels including DingTalk, WeCom, Telegram, and more. Leveraging edge computing architecture with Cloudflare Pages and D1 database, it enables zero-cost deployment and batch push via group interfaces. The UI, crafted with shadcn/ui, combines aesthetics with usability. Ideal for monitoring alerts and automated notifications, it offers a developer-friendly solution with GitHub OAuth integration and seamless deployment.

metadata.name: kotaemon
metadata.description: An open-source RAG-based tool for chatting with your documents.

summary.zh: kotaemon 是一款开源的 RAG（检索增强生成）文档对话工具，提供简洁易用的 Web UI。支持 OpenAI、Azure、Cohere 等云端 LLM API 及 Ollama、llama-cpp 本地模型，基于 Gradio 构建可高度定制的界面。既适合非技术用户快速搭建文档问答系统，也为开发者提供灵活的 RAG 管道框架，支持 Docker 部署和 Colab 一键运行。
summary.en: Kotaemon is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) document chat tool that provides a clean, minimalistic, and highly customizable Gradio UI. It supports diverse LLM backends—both cloud APIs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Cohere) and local models (Ollama, llama-cpp-python). Designed for dual audiences, it enables non-technical users to deploy document QA systems effortlessly via Docker or Colab, while offering developers a modular framework to build, extend, and fine-tune RAG pipelines with minimal coding effort.

metadata.name: deepseek2api
metadata.description: DeepSeek 逆向 API

summary.zh: DeepSeek2API通过逆向工程将DeepSeek模型封装为OpenAI兼容接口，支持deepseek-chat、deepseek-reasoner等模型。核心特性包括高速流式输出、多轮对话、R1深度思考及多账号轮换机制，有效分散单账号风险。提供Docker、Vercel及原生部署方案，配置灵活。项目明确声明仅限研究学习使用，禁止商用，规避官方服务压力与封号风险。
summary.en: DeepSeek2API wraps DeepSeek models into OpenAI-compatible interfaces via reverse engineering, supporting deepseek-chat, deepseek-reasoner and search variants. Key features include high-speed streaming output, multi-turn conversation, R1 deep reasoning, and multi-account rotation to mitigate single-account limitations. Offers flexible deployment via Docker, Vercel, or native Python. Project explicitly for research/learning only, prohibiting commercial use to avoid official service pressure and account bans.

metadata.name: AI-reads-books-page-by-page
metadata.description: AI reads books: Page-by-Page PDF Knowledge Extractor & Summarizer. script performs an intelligent page-by-page analysis of PDF books, methodically extracting knowledge points and generating progressive summaries at specified intervals

summary.zh: 该工具通过AI逐页解析PDF书籍，自动提取核心知识点并生成渐进式摘要。支持智能过滤目录/索引页，具备断点续处理与Markdown结构化输出能力。适用于个人深度学习、研究资料整理与知识库构建，实现从海量书籍中高效提炼结构化知识，提升阅读效率与知识内化效果。
summary.en: This tool performs AI-powered page-by-page analysis of PDF books, automatically extracting key knowledge points and generating progressive summaries at configurable intervals. Featuring intelligent filtering of TOC/index pages, resume capability, and structured Markdown output, it maintains contextual flow while processing. Ideal for deep learning, research material processing, and knowledge base construction, it efficiently transforms massive books into structured knowledge, significantly improving reading efficiency and knowledge internalization through systematic analysis.

metadata.name: opencode
metadata.description: The open source coding agent.

summary.zh: OpenCode是开源AI编程代理，提供终端与桌面双界面。支持多平台安装（macOS/Windows/Linux），集成多种包管理器。具备活跃社区与持续更新，为开发者提供智能编码辅助。
summary.en: OpenCode is an open-source AI coding agent that delivers intelligent programming assistance through both terminal and desktop interfaces. It provides comprehensive multi-platform support for macOS, Windows, and Linux, with diverse installation options including npm, Homebrew, Scoop, Chocolatey, pacman, and direct shell scripts. The project maintains an active Discord community for real-time collaboration, offers beta desktop applications for enhanced user experience, ensures continuous updates, and respects XDG Base Directory Specification for flexible installation paths, providing developers with cutting-edge AI-powered coding capabilities across all development environments while maintaining high accessibility standards.

metadata.name: list
metadata.description: The Public Suffix List

summary.zh: 公共后缀列表（PSL）是互联网基础设施的关键组件，定义了用户可直接注册域名的公共后缀（如.com、.co.uk）。它支撑浏览器Cookie安全策略，防止恶意跨站访问，被所有主流浏览器和网络库广泛采用。项目由志愿者维护，遵循严格审核流程，确保域名系统与开发者生态的精准衔接。
summary.en: The Public Suffix List (PSL) is a critical internet infrastructure component that defines all publicly registrable domain suffixes, such as .com, .co.uk, and .pvt.k12.ma.us. It enables browsers and network libraries to implement secure cookie scoping, preventing cross-site request forgery and other security vulnerabilities. This volunteer-maintained project provides the definitive bridge between ICANN's domain name system and real-world developer needs through strict validation guidelines and community-driven updates, ensuring universal acceptance across the web ecosystem while maintaining meticulous accuracy through a rigorous PR review process.

metadata.name: DenoProxy
metadata.description: 利用Deno提供的服务进行代理中转

summary.zh: DenoProxy是基于Deno运行时构建的轻量级动态代理服务，核心能力在于通过URL参数实时配置代理目标，并将/proxy路径请求无缝转发至指定后端。项目采用Deno原生HTTP服务器与KV存储，支持本地运行与Deno Deploy云部署双模式，适用于API调试、跨域请求代理及开发环境网络中转等场景，具备配置灵活、部署极简的技术特征。
summary.en: DenoProxy is a lightweight dynamic proxy service built on Deno runtime, featuring real-time target configuration via URL parameters and seamless request forwarding for /proxy paths. Leveraging Deno's native HTTP server and KV storage, it supports both local execution and Deno Deploy cloud deployment. Ideal for API debugging, cross-origin request proxying, and development environment network tunneling, it delivers flexible configuration and minimal deployment overhead.

metadata.name: spoo
metadata.description: spoo.me is an open-source & API first link management infra

summary.zh: spoo.me 是一个开源、API 优先的短链接管理服务，提供自定义 slug（含 emoji）、密码保护、点击限制等高级功能。其核心亮点在于强大的分析能力，支持地理位置、设备、流量模式、引荐来源和机器人检测的多维度统计，并提供 CSV/JSON/XLSX/XML 数据导出。无需注册即可使用，支持自托管，完全免费且无功能限制，适合需要私有化部署或集成短链能力的开发者和企业。
summary.en: spoo.me is an open-source, API-first URL shortening infrastructure offering advanced features like custom slugs (including emojis), password protection, and click limits. Its core strength lies in comprehensive analytics covering geographic distribution, device breakdown, traffic patterns, referrer tracking, and bot detection, with multi-format data export (CSV/JSON/XLSX/XML). Requiring no registration, it provides completely free unlimited usage with self-hosting capability. Ideal for developers and enterprises needing private deployment or integrated link management with detailed click insights.

metadata.name: deep-research-web-ui
metadata.description: (Supports DeepSeek R1) An AI-powered research assistant that performs iterative, deep research on any topic by combining search engines, web scraping, and large language models.

summary.zh: 基于深度研究的AI助手，通过迭代搜索与LLM实现自动化信息挖掘。支持DeepSeek R1等主流模型，提供树状可视化研究流程与实时流式反馈。采用浏览器本地化处理确保数据安全，集成Tavily/Firecrawl多源搜索。支持PDF导出与Docker部署，适用于学术研究、市场分析等深度调研场景。
summary.en: An AI-powered research assistant that automates deep information gathering through iterative search and LLM reasoning. Features real-time streaming feedback and tree-structured visualization of research processes. Supports DeepSeek R1 and major LLM providers with local browser processing for data privacy. Integrates Tavily and Firecrawl for web search, offers PDF export, Docker deployment, and server mode. Ideal for academic research, market analysis, and competitive intelligence requiring comprehensive, automated investigation with full citation tracking.

metadata.name: rag-web-ui
metadata.description: RAG Web UI is an intelligent dialogue system based on RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) technology.

summary.zh: RAG Web UI是基于RAG技术的智能对话系统，用于构建私有化知识库问答服务。支持PDF、DOCX、Markdown等文档的自动分块与向量化，兼容OpenAI、DeepSeek及Ollama本地模型，可切换ChromaDB/Qdrant向量数据库。具备多轮对话、引用溯源、异步处理及OpenAPI接口，适用于企业知识库与智能客服场景。
summary.en: RAG Web UI is an intelligent dialogue system based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technology for building private knowledge base Q&A services. It offers comprehensive document management supporting PDF, DOCX, Markdown formats with automatic chunking and vectorization. The system features a frontend-backend separated architecture, flexible LLM support (OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama), and interchangeable vector databases (ChromaDB, Qdrant) via Factory pattern. Production-ready capabilities include multi-turn dialogue, citation tracking, async processing, and OpenAPI interfaces, suitable for enterprise knowledge bases and intelligent customer service applications.

summary.zh: jdapi 是一个非官方的京东 API Python 封装库，为开发者提供便捷的京东账号自动化操作能力。项目核心价值在于简化京东登录态管理、签到任务、优惠券领取等常见场景的 API 调用，通过 Python 函数式接口屏蔽底层 HTTP 请求细节。技术亮点包括自动 Cookie 管理、请求加密处理以及反反爬机制，适用于京东生态的自动化脚本开发与轻量级应用集成。
summary.en: jdapi is an unofficial Python wrapper for JD.com APIs, enabling automated account operations with minimal code. It simplifies common scenarios like check-ins, coupon claiming, and order queries by abstracting HTTP complexities into Python functions. Key features include automated cookie management, request encryption, and anti-anti-crawling mechanisms, ideal for building JD ecosystem automation scripts and lightweight integrations.

metadata.name: new-api
metadata.description: A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

summary.zh: New API 是一款下一代 LLM 网关与 AI 资产管理系统，通过协议转换层将各类大模型统一为 OpenAI、Claude、Gemini 兼容接口。提供集中式模型路由、分发与管理能力，支持个人与企业级部署，构建跨模型生态的标准化接入平面。
summary.en: New API is a next-generation LLM gateway and AI asset management system that unifies diverse large language models through protocol conversion layers into OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini-compatible interfaces. It provides centralized model routing, load balancing, and distribution management for both personal and enterprise deployments. Built with Go for high performance, the system acts as a standardized access plane for cross-model ecosystems, enabling seamless integration, governance, and observability of heterogeneous AI assets while maintaining strict API compatibility and enterprise-grade security.

metadata.name: LLMBook-zh.github.io
metadata.description: 《大语言模型》作者：赵鑫，李军毅，周昆，唐天一，文继荣

summary.zh: 本书系统阐述大语言模型技术体系，涵盖预训练、微调、对齐及提示工程等核心内容。基于作者团队前沿研究与工业实践，提供完整技术框架与路线图，配套教学课件。适合具深度学习基础的读者入门大模型技术，可作为高校课程与行业研发权威参考。
summary.en: This book systematically presents the comprehensive technical framework of Large Language Models, covering fundamental aspects including pre-training, fine-tuning, alignment, and prompt engineering. Based on the authors' pioneering research and practical industrial experience in developing models like Wenlan and Yulan, it offers a structured learning roadmap with supplementary lecture slides. Aimed at readers with foundational deep learning knowledge, this authoritative volume serves as an essential reference for both academic courses and industrial R&D in LLM technology, bridging theoretical concepts with real-world implementation.

metadata.name: v2rayA
metadata.description: A web GUI client of Project V which supports VMess, VLESS, SS, SSR, Trojan, Tuic and Juicity protocols. 🚀

summary.zh: v2rayA 是一款基于 V2Ray 内核的跨平台代理客户端，提供直观的 Web 图形界面。支持 VMess、VLESS、SS、SSR、Trojan、Tuic 和 Juicity 等主流协议，可在 Linux 实现全局透明代理，Windows/macOS 支持系统代理。项目支持 Docker、路由器、NAS 等多种部署方式，所有用户数据本地存储，适合需要安全便捷网络访问的场景。
summary.en: v2rayA is a cross-platform proxy client based on V2Ray core with an intuitive Web GUI. It supports major protocols including VMess, VLESS, SS, SSR, Trojan, Tuic and Juicity, offering global transparent proxy on Linux and system proxy on Windows/macOS. Deployable via Docker, routers, NAS and multiple package managers, it stores all user data locally, ideal for secure and convenient network access.

metadata.name: OmniThink
metadata.description: [EMNLP 2025]  OmniThink: Expanding Knowledge Boundaries in Machine Writing through Thinking

summary.zh: OmniThink 是 EMNLP 2025 提出的机器写作框架，通过模拟人类认知的迭代扩展与反思机制，突破知识边界生成高质量长篇文章。集成 RAGFlow 实现离线本地搜索，支持 DeepSeek-Reasoner 等推理模型，适用于学术综述、报告撰写等知识密集型写作场景，显著提升内容深度与知识密度。
summary.en: OmniThink is an EMNLP 2025 machine writing framework that simulates human cognitive processes through iterative expansion and reflection to generate high-quality long-form articles. It integrates RAGFlow for offline local search, supports DeepSeek-Reasoner models, and is designed for knowledge-intensive writing applications like academic reviews and reports, enhancing content depth and knowledge density.

metadata.name: fates-app
metadata.description: A modern personal time management and task tracking application

summary.zh: Fates 是一款基于 Tauri 和 Svelte 构建的开源时间管理与任务追踪应用。它通过可视化时间轴、热力图和数据分析帮助用户识别时间黑洞，内置 AI 助手可优化任务描述并自动生成周报。采用本地优先存储策略保障隐私，支持多端同步，旨在解决职场人士时间管理混乱、工作效率低下及周报总结困难等痛点。
summary.en: Fates is a modern open-source time management and task tracking application built with Tauri and Svelte, designed to help professionals combat productivity challenges. It features visual timeline views, GitHub-style calendar heatmaps, and comprehensive data analytics to reveal time consumption patterns. The integrated AI assistant optimizes task descriptions, auto-generates weekly reports, and provides intelligent scheduling suggestions. Employing a local-first storage architecture for privacy protection, it supports seamless synchronization across web and desktop platforms. Fates directly addresses common pain points: disorganized time management, inefficient workflows, and the tedious process of weekly reporting, making it an ideal tool for self-improvement and career development.

metadata.name: Gemini-Search
metadata.description: Perplexity style AI Search engine clone built with Gemini 2.0 Flash and Grounding

summary.zh: 基于 Gemini 2.0 Flash 的 AI 搜索引擎，提供 Perplexity 式实时问答体验。核心亮点在于 Google Search Grounding 技术，确保答案附带可溯源的引用来源。全栈 TypeScript 架构（React + Express）实现高效开发，支持会话内追问，适用于研究、学习与精准信息检索场景。
summary.en: Gemini-Search is a production-ready AI search engine clone that replicates Perplexity's core functionality using Google's cutting-edge Gemini 2.0 Flash model. Its key technical innovation lies in the Search Grounding integration, which fetches real-time web results and automatically generates citations for every answer. The full-stack TypeScript implementation combines React with Vite on the frontend and Express.js on the backend, delivering a responsive, modern interface with conversational memory. Designed for researchers, students, and professionals seeking accurate, traceable information with minimal latency.

metadata.name: WTF-zk
metadata.description: 零知识证明入门教程。Comprehensive Zero-Knowledge Proofs Tutorial. #zk #WIP

summary.zh: WTF-zk 为零知识证明入门教程，面向高中数学基础学习者。项目以 Python 实现核心算法，系统涵盖数论、抽象代数、椭圆曲线等数学基础，并逐步深入 ZK 证明理论。通过 Jupyter Notebook 交互式教学，结合经典密码学方案复现，为零知识证明领域提供低门槛、理论与实践结合的学习路径。
summary.en: WTF-zk is a comprehensive Zero-Knowledge Proofs tutorial designed for learners with only high school mathematics background. The project uses Python to implement core cryptographic algorithms, systematically covering essential mathematical foundations including number theory, abstract algebra, ring fields, and elliptic curves. Through interactive Jupyter Notebook demonstrations and step-by-step reproduction of classic schemes like RSA and Diffie-Hellman, it creates an accessible, theory-practice integrated learning pathway into the ZK proofs domain.

metadata.name: electerm
metadata.description: 📻Terminal/ssh/sftp/ftp/telnet/serialport/RDP/VNC/Spice client(linux, mac, win)

summary.zh: electerm 是一款开源的跨平台终端与远程连接客户端，集成 SSH/SFTP/FTP/Telnet/串口/RDP/VNC 等多种协议。支持 Windows、macOS、Linux（含 ARM64），提供全局热键、透明窗口、背景图片等特性。内置 AI 助手（DeepSeek/OpenAI）与 MCP 协议支持，实现命令建议与工具集成。通过 Zmodem/Trzsz 实现文件传输，并可将配置同步至 GitHub/Gitee Gist，是开发者管理远程服务器的全能工具。
summary.en: electerm is an open-source, cross-platform terminal and remote connection client that consolidates SSH, SFTP, FTP, Telnet, serial port, RDP, VNC, and Spice protocols into a single application. Built on Electron, it supports Windows, macOS, and Linux (including ARM64 architectures). Key features include global hotkeys for instant access, transparent windows, terminal background images, and integrated AI assistants (DeepSeek, OpenAI) via MCP protocol for command suggestions and script generation. It facilitates file transfers through Zmodem and Trzsz, supports SSH tunneling and proxy configurations, and allows synchronization of bookmarks and settings to GitHub/Gitee Gist, making it a versatile tool for developers and system administrators managing remote infrastructure.

metadata.name: readest
metadata.description: Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.

summary.zh: Readest 是一款基于 Next.js 16 和 Tauri v2 构建的开源电子书阅读器，覆盖桌面、移动及 Web 全平台。支持 EPUB/MOBI/AZW3 等主流格式，提供分屏并行阅读、代码语法高亮、全文检索与智能笔记等深度功能，专为追求沉浸式体验的深度阅读者打造。
summary.en: Readest is a modern, open-source ebook reader engineered for immersive reading experiences. Leveraging Next.js 16 and Tauri v2, it delivers native performance across macOS, Windows, Linux, Android, iOS, and web platforms. Supporting EPUB, MOBI, AZW3, FB2, CBZ, TXT, and experimental PDF formats, it features split-screen parallel reading, code syntax highlighting, full-text search, dictionary lookup, and comprehensive annotation tools. Built as a sophisticated rewrite of Foliate, Readest combines powerful library management with customizable reading settings to serve avid readers and technical professionals.

metadata.name: public-apis
metadata.description: A collective list of free APIs

summary.zh: Public APIs是一个由社区维护的免费API目录，汇集金融、天气、地理定位、电信等多领域公共接口。该项目通过人工审核机制确保API质量，为开发者提供免费、可直接集成的RESTful服务资源。作为开发者的API宝库，它简化了寻找可靠第三方服务的流程，支持快速原型开发和产品功能扩展，是集成外部服务的理想起点。
summary.en: The Public APIs repository is a community-curated directory offering free RESTful APIs across diverse domains including finance, weather, geolocation, and telecommunications. Manually reviewed for quality, this collection serves as a valuable resource for developers seeking reliable third-party services without cost. It streamlines API discovery for rapid prototyping and product development, featuring categories like stock market data, IP geolocation, weather information, and phone validation. The project is maintained by both community contributors and APILayer, ensuring ongoing updates and a well-organized structure.

metadata.name: geektime-docs
metadata.description: 👏极客时间 pdf & markdown 文档

summary.zh: 该项目聚合极客时间优质课程文档，提供 Markdown 与 PDF 双格式离线资源。核心价值在于构建可全文检索的技术知识库，支持 Docker 一键部署解决图片加载问题，并适配 PC 与移动端浏览器。基于 MkDocs-Material 主题实现优雅阅读体验，是技术人离线学习与知识管理的实用方案。
summary.en: This project aggregates GeekTime's premium course documentation, offering offline Markdown and PDF resources. Its core value lies in building a full-text searchable technical knowledge base, featuring Docker deployment for image loading fixes, and responsive design for PC/mobile browsers. Powered by MkDocs-Material, it provides an elegant reading experience for developers' offline learning and knowledge management.

metadata.name: open-webui
metadata.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

summary.zh: Open WebUI是功能完备的自托管AI平台，无缝集成Ollama与OpenAI API，支持完全离线部署。内置RAG推理引擎和原生Python函数调用工具，提供细粒度用户权限管理、响应式界面及PWA移动应用。支持语音/视频通话、Markdown/LaTeX渲染，可通过插件系统扩展功能。提供Docker/Kubernetes部署方案，适用于企业级AI应用开发与私有化大模型部署场景。
summary.en: Open WebUI is a comprehensive self-hosted AI platform that seamlessly integrates Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs with full offline deployment capability. Featuring a built-in RAG inference engine and native Python function calling tools, it offers granular user permissions, responsive design, and PWA mobile support. The platform enables voice/video calls, Markdown/LaTeX rendering, and extensible plugin architecture. Deployable via Docker/Kubernetes, it serves as an enterprise-grade solution for private LLM orchestration and AI application development requiring air-gapped security.

metadata.name: Pake
metadata.description: 🤱🏻 Turn any webpage into a desktop app with one command.

summary.zh: Pake 是一款基于 Rust Tauri 的轻量级桌面应用打包工具，可将任意网页转化为独立原生应用。相比 Electron 应用体积缩小约 20 倍，仅 5MB 左右，内存占用更低且运行更快。支持 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 三大平台，提供 CLI 命令行一键打包和在线构建服务。内置快捷键、沉浸式窗口、样式定制、广告过滤等功能，已预打包微信读书、Twitter、Grok、DeepSeek 等常用应用。
summary.en: Pake is a lightweight desktop app packaging tool built with Rust Tauri that converts any webpage into a native standalone application. It reduces package size by approximately 20x compared to Electron (around 5MB), with faster performance and lower memory usage. Supporting macOS, Windows, and Linux, it offers one-command packaging via CLI and online building. Features include keyboard shortcuts, immersive windows, style customization, and ad removal. Pre-built packages are available for popular services like WeRead, Twitter, Grok, and DeepSeek.

metadata.name: cursor-auto-free
metadata.description: auto sign cursor

summary.zh: 该仓库提供 Cursor Pro 账号自动化注册与续期解决方案，通过模拟用户行为实现免费获取 Pro 权限。主要服务于希望持续使用 AI 代码编辑器高级功能的开发者群体。技术实现涵盖自动化脚本、协议逆向及反风控策略。采用 CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 非商业许可，使用者需自行承担合规风险。
summary.en: This repository offers an automated solution for Cursor Pro account registration and renewal, enabling free access to premium features through simulated user interactions. It serves developers seeking continuous use of AI code editor advanced capabilities. Technical implementation includes automation scripting, protocol reverse engineering, and anti-detection mechanisms. Released under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 non-commercial license, users assume all compliance risks.

metadata.name: my-geektime
metadata.description: 👏 Make learning a lifelong habit. 学无止境

summary.zh: my-geektime 是极客时间VIP课程的音视频私有化部署系统。支持一次缓存永久观看，一键发布课程为在线文档，以及本地音视频下载。基于Docker容器化技术，提供跨平台部署能力，实现学习资源的离线管理与在线访问，适合构建个人终身学习知识库。
summary.en: my-geektime is a self-hosted GeekTime VIP course platform specializing in audio/video resource management. It enables permanent offline viewing through one-time caching, one-click online documentation publishing, and local media downloads. Built with Docker containerization for cross-platform deployment (amd64/arm64), it transforms streaming content into private learning assets. This tool eliminates dependency on official servers, providing lifelong access to purchased courses while maintaining content organization, search capabilities, and seamless playback functionality for individual learners.

metadata.name: escrcpy
metadata.description: 📱 Display and control your Android device graphically with scrcpy.

summary.zh: Escrcpy 是基于 scrcpy 的跨平台 Android 设备图形化管控工具。通过 Electron 封装提供直观界面，支持多设备并行管理与可视化窗口编排。核心亮点包括集成 AutoGLM 实现自然语言智能控制、自动化工作流执行，以及 Gnirehtet 反向网络共享。适用于移动开发测试、批量设备操作等场景，提供低延迟、高性能的屏幕镜像体验。
summary.en: Escrcpy is a cross-platform Android device management tool built on scrcpy. It provides an intuitive Electron-based GUI for mirroring and controlling Android devices with low latency. Key features include multi-device orchestration, natural language control via AutoGLM AI, automated workflow execution, and wireless connectivity with Gnirehtet reverse tethering. Ideal for mobile development, testing, and batch device operations.

metadata.name: storm
metadata.description: An LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches a topic and generates a full-length report with citations.

summary.zh: STORM是斯坦福开发的LLM驱动知识整理系统，通过两阶段流程自动生成带引用的维基百科式长文。其核心技术是多视角提问机制，引导LLM提出深度研究问题，结合互联网检索与向量搜索构建知识大纲，再生成完整报告。Co-STORM扩展支持人机协作，已服务超7万用户，支持GPT-4o等模型及Bing/You.com检索，提供Python包与Streamlit界面。
summary.en: STORM is a Stanford-developed LLM-powered knowledge curation system that automatically generates full-length, cited Wikipedia-style articles through a two-stage pipeline. Its core innovation is perspective-guided question asking that enables deep research, combined with internet retrieval and vector search to build topic outlines before article generation. The enhanced Co-STORM supports human-AI collaboration. Serving over 70,000 users, it integrates GPT-4o, Bing/You.com search, and offers a Python package with Streamlit UI for research assistance and knowledge exploration.

metadata.name: note-gen
metadata.description: A cross-platform Markdown AI note-taking software.

summary.zh: NoteGen是一款轻量级(25MB)跨平台Markdown笔记应用，深度融合AI智能能力，原生支持RAG检索增强与MCP协议，能够智能桥接碎片化记录与结构化写作，实现知识高效组织与管理。
summary.en: Lightweight (25MB) cross-platform Markdown note app with AI, RAG and MCP support for intelligent knowledge organization.

metadata.name: maxun
metadata.description: 🔥 The open-source no-code platform for web scraping, crawling, search and AI data extraction • Turn websites into structured APIs in minutes 🔥

summary.zh: Maxun 是一款开源无代码网页数据平台，可将任意网站转化为结构化 API。它提供四大机器人类型：Extract（支持录制和 AI 自然语言提取）、Scrape（整页转 Markdown/HTML）、Crawl（全站爬取）和 Search（自动化搜索）。平台通过模拟真实用户行为，实现从简单到复杂的自动化数据采集，适用于 AI 工作流、竞品监控和商业智能等场景。
summary.en: Maxun is an open-source no-code web data platform that transforms any website into structured APIs. It offers four robot types: Extract (with Recorder and AI natural language modes), Scrape (full-page to Markdown/HTML), Crawl (entire site crawling), and Search (automated web searches). By emulating real user behavior, it enables automated data collection workflows for AI pipelines, competitive intelligence, and business analytics.

metadata.name: Shiro
metadata.description: 📜 A minimalist personal website embodying the purity of paper and freshness of snow.

summary.zh: Shiro 是为 Mix Space 生态系统打造的极简主义个人网站主题，融合纸的纯净与雪的清新。基于 Next.js 16 App Router 构建，集成 Jotai 状态管理、Socket.IO 实时推送和 Motion 物理动画，Lighthouse 性能评分超 90。支持 Markdown 扩展、多语言、实时活动状态展示，提供优雅的写作与阅读体验。
summary.en: Shiro is a minimalist personal website theme designed for the Mix Space ecosystem, embodying the purity of paper and freshness of snow. Built on Next.js 16 App Router with Jotai state management, Socket.IO real-time communication, and Motion physics-based animations, it achieves Lighthouse scores above 90. The theme features Markdown extensions, multilingual support via next-intl, real-time activity status, and a dedicated 'Recently' thoughts system, delivering an elegant writing and reading experience.

metadata.name: gitstars
metadata.description: Github Starred Repositories Manager

summary.zh: Gitstars 是专为开发者设计的 GitHub 星标仓库管理工具。它解决了星标过多导致的查找难题，提供按主题/语言分类、README 预览和快速直达功能。内置的 Gitstars Ranking 每日更新 GitHub 星标 Top100 项目，支持按编程语言筛选，帮助开发者高效发现优质开源项目。支持 Vercel 一键部署，实现个人星标仓库的私有化智能管理。
summary.en: Gitstars is a specialized GitHub starred repositories manager for developers. It addresses the challenge of finding repositories among numerous stars by offering categorization by topics/languages, README preview, and quick access. The built-in Gitstars Ranking updates daily with GitHub's top 100 starred projects across programming languages, enabling efficient discovery of quality open-source projects. One-click Vercel deployment enables private intelligent management of personal starred repositories.

metadata.name: newsnow
metadata.description: Elegant reading of real-time and hottest news

summary.zh: NewsNow 是一款优雅的新闻聚合阅读应用，采用 Serverless 架构部署于 Cloudflare。核心亮点包括自适应爬虫策略（动态调整抓取频率防封禁）、GitHub OAuth 登录同步、30分钟智能缓存机制，以及创新的 MCP Server 支持，可无缝接入 AI 工作流。提供简洁 UI 与实时热点新闻，支持 D1 数据库与 Docker 部署，是多语言新闻平台的理想技术底座。
summary.en: NewsNow delivers elegant real-time news aggregation via Cloudflare Serverless stack. Core technical innovations include adaptive scraping with anti-ban intelligence (dynamic intervals, minimum 2 minutes), GitHub OAuth synchronization, 30-minute smart caching with force-refresh capability, and innovative MCP Server integration for AI workflows. It features clean UI, supports Cloudflare D1 database and Docker deployment, with extensible architecture for adding news sources and multi-language roadmap for global news platforms.

metadata.name: virtual-dsm
metadata.description: Virtual DSM in a Docker container.

summary.zh: vdsm/virtual-dsm 是一个创新的轻量级 NAS 解决方案，通过在 Docker 容器中虚拟化运行 Synology DSM 系统，结合 KVM 硬件加速技术实现接近原生的性能表现。项目支持多磁盘管理、物理设备直通、CPU 与内存灵活配置，可快速部署于 Linux、Windows 和 macOS 平台，适用于个人私有云存储、开发测试环境及轻量级生产场景。
summary.en: vdsm/virtual-dsm is an innovative lightweight NAS solution that virtualizes Synology DSM within Docker containers, leveraging KVM hardware acceleration to deliver near-native performance. This project provides comprehensive storage virtualization capabilities including multi-disk management, raw device passthrough, and dynamic resource allocation for CPU and memory. With support for Docker Compose, Kubernetes, and GitHub Codespaces, it enables rapid deployment across Linux, Windows, and macOS platforms. The solution is particularly suited for personal cloud storage, development testing environments, and scenarios requiring flexible, containerized NAS infrastructure with enterprise-grade features.

metadata.name: ecs
metadata.description: VPS 融合怪服务器测评项目 更推荐使用无环境依赖的Go版本 VPS Fusion Monster Server Test Script – More recommended to use the Go version with no environment dependencies: https://github.com/oneclickvirt/ecs

summary.zh: 融合怪(VPS Fusion Monster)是功能全面的服务器测评脚本，提供自动化硬件与网络基准测试。Go重构版本彻底解耦环境依赖，支持非root用户运行，兼容多架构(amd64/arm64等)与主流Linux发行版。核心功能涵盖CPU/内存/磁盘性能测试、三网回程路由追踪、多节点网速测试及15数据库IP质量检测。支持交互菜单与参数化无值守模式，可自定义Geekbench版本、磁盘测试工具等，专为开发者与运维人员设计的极致轻量高效测评方案。
summary.en: Fusion Monster (ECS) is a comprehensive server testing script for VPS benchmarking. The Go-based implementation eliminates environment dependencies, supports non-root execution, and maintains compatibility across multiple architectures (amd64/arm64/i386/arm) and Linux distributions. Core capabilities include CPU/memory/disk performance evaluation, triple-network routing analysis, multi-node speed tests, and IP quality validation via 15 databases. Features both interactive menu and headless parameter-driven modes, with customizable options for Geekbench versions, disk test utilities, and China-specific network endpoints, designed for developers and sysadmins.

metadata.name: GitHubDaily
metadata.description: 坚持分享 GitHub 上高质量、有趣实用的开源技术教程、开发者工具、编程网站、技术资讯。A list cool, interesting projects of GitHub.

summary.zh: GitHubDaily 是一个运营近十年的开源项目策展平台，累计分享超10000个高质量开源项目。通过GitHub仓库、公众号、微博等多渠道，系统化推荐技术教程、开发者工具与行业资讯，核心价值在于从海量项目中筛选高价值内容，并按AI工具、开发工具等维度结构化整理，助力开发者拓展技术视野与提升编程能力。
summary.en: GitHubDaily is a decade-old open source curation platform that has shared over 10,000 high-quality projects. Through multiple channels including GitHub, WeChat, and Twitter, it systematically recommends technical tutorials, developer tools, and industry insights. Its core value lies in filtering high-value content from massive repositories and organizing it into structured categories like AI tools and development utilities, helping developers expand technical horizons and enhance programming skills.

metadata.name: Neurite
metadata.description: Fractal Graph-of-Thought. Rhizomatic Mind-Mapping for Ai-Agents, Web-Links, Notes, and Code.

summary.zh: Neurite 采用分形几何与图论构建无限维思维导图，融合AI代理与多模态节点（代码/链接/笔记）。支持多代理协同与神经网络API，为创意协作与知识管理提供非线性、自相似的可视化工作空间。
summary.en: Neurite is an open-source fractal-based mind-mapping platform that merges chaos theory with graph theory to create an infinite-dimensional digital workspace. It interconnects AI agents, code snippets, notes, and web links as nodes in a rhizomatic structure. Key features include multi-agent UI collaboration, FractalGPT integration, a Neural API, and synchronized knowledge management. The system enables non-linear creative thinking by revealing hidden patterns through self-similar fractal geometries, transforming how complex information is organized and visualized.

metadata.name: CS-Notes
metadata.description: :books: 技术面试必备基础知识、Leetcode、计算机操作系统、计算机网络、系统设计

summary.zh: CS-Notes 是专为技术面试打造的全栈知识体系，系统整合算法（LeetCode、剑指Offer 题解）、操作系统、计算机网络、数据库原理、Java 核心技术（并发、JVM）及大规模系统设计等核心内容。以实战为导向，深度结合理论与实践，覆盖从基础到架构的完整技能树，是程序员求职面试的高效复习指南。
summary.en: CS-Notes is a systematic knowledge repository specifically designed for technical interview preparation, encompassing core CS fundamentals including algorithms (LeetCode, 剑指Offer solutions), operating systems, computer networks, database principles, Java internals (concurrency, JVM, I/O), and large-scale system design. It bridges theory with hands-on practice through extensive coding problems and architectural case studies, offering a complete skill development path from basic concepts to advanced engineering architecture for software engineers.

metadata.name: PaddleOCR
metadata.description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

summary.zh: PaddleOCR 是基于 PaddlePaddle 的工业级 OCR 工具包，支持 100+ 语言的多模态文档解析。核心亮点包括端到端 pipeline、轻量级部署、多硬件加速（CPU/GPU/XPU/NPU），以及专为 LLM 优化的结构化数据输出。适用于文档数字化、表单识别、票据处理等 AI 应用场景，提供从图像到结构化数据的无缝桥梁。
summary.en: PaddleOCR is an industrial-grade OCR toolkit powered by PaddlePaddle, designed for high-performance document intelligence. It supports 100+ languages and multimodal inputs (images/PDFs), delivering end-to-end text detection, recognition, and structure analysis. Key technical advantages include lightweight deployment, multi-hardware acceleration (CPU/GPU/XPU/NPU), and LLM-optimized structured outputs. Ideal for document digitization, form processing, invoice extraction, and AI-driven data pipelines, it seamlessly converts unstructured visual content into machine-readable formats for downstream applications requiring precise text extraction and semantic understanding.

metadata.name: generative-ai-for-beginners
metadata.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

summary.zh: 微软官方出品的系统性生成式AI入门教程，包含21个实践课程，涵盖从基础理论到应用开发的全栈知识。面向初学者设计，提供多语言支持与开源社区协作，帮助开发者快速掌握生成式AI应用构建技能。内容权威且易于上手，适合自学、教学与企业培训场景。
summary.en: Microsoft's official generative AI curriculum designed for beginners, offering 21 comprehensive lessons that take learners from foundational concepts to practical application development. This open-source project provides multi-language support through automated translations and encourages community contributions. Each lesson combines theoretical knowledge with hands-on coding exercises, covering essential topics like prompt engineering, model fine-tuning, and AI application deployment. With low barriers to entry and enterprise-grade content, it serves as an ideal learning path for individual developers, educators, and organizations seeking to build generative AI capabilities quickly and effectively.

metadata.name: hello-algo
metadata.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

summary.zh: 《Hello 算法》是一本开源免费的数据结构与算法教程，采用动画图解显著降低学习门槛，支持12+编程语言一键运行代码。覆盖简中、繁中、英文、日文，适合编程新手与面试准备者，通过可视化与实操结合高效提升算法思维与工程实现能力。
summary.en: Hello Algo is a free open-source tutorial that demystifies data structures and algorithms through animated visualizations and interactive code execution. Supporting 12+ programming languages and four human languages, it offers smooth learning curves with visual explanations and hands-on practice. Ideal for beginners and interview candidates, it effectively bridges theory with implementation to build algorithmic thinking.

metadata.name: crawl4ai
metadata.description: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

summary.zh: Crawl4AI 是一款开源的LLM友好型网页爬虫，专为RAG、AI代理和数据管道设计。它将网页转换为干净的Markdown格式，便于大语言模型处理。项目亮点包括：崩溃恢复机制支持长时间深度爬取；预取模式提升5-10倍URL发现速度；提供自托管平台，含企业级监控仪表板和REST API；采用浏览器池管理技术。拥有5万+星标社区验证，相比现有方案显著降低成本，支持完全本地化部署。
summary.en: Crawl4AI is an open-source, LLM-friendly web crawler designed for RAG, AI agents, and data pipelines. It converts web content into clean Markdown format optimized for language models. Key features include crash recovery for long-running deep crawls, prefetch mode for 5-10x faster URL discovery, and a self-hosting platform with enterprise-grade monitoring dashboard, REST API, and WebSocket streaming. Battle-tested by a 50k+ star community, it offers a cost-effective alternative to paid solutions with full local deployment capabilities and smart browser pool management.

metadata.name: readium
metadata.description: Read premium articles for free with this Bookmarklet

summary.zh: Readium 是一个轻量级书签工具，通过 JavaScript 技术绕过付费墙限制，让用户免费访问 Medium、Substack 等平台的优质内容。项目采用 Vue.js 构建官方网站，部署于 GitHub Pages，提供一键式便捷操作。相比浏览器扩展，书签形式无需安装，更加便携高效，是数字内容自由访问的实用解决方案。
summary.en: Readium is a lightweight bookmarklet that bypasses paywalls to provide free access to premium content on platforms like Medium and Substack. Built with Vue.js and deployed on GitHub Pages, it offers a one-click solution without requiring browser extension installation. This portable tool leverages JavaScript to remove content restrictions, delivering a streamlined alternative to traditional ad-blockers or subscription management tools for effortless reading of gated articles. Its open-source nature ensures transparency and community-driven improvements.

metadata.name: macos
metadata.description: MacOS inside a Docker container.

summary.zh: 该项目通过Docker容器化技术结合KVM硬件加速，在非Apple硬件上实现macOS虚拟化。提供Web管理界面，支持macOS 11-15版本自动部署与灵活资源配置（存储/CPU/内存）。适用于iOS/macOS应用开发测试、CI/CD流水线及跨平台开发环境，为开发者提供无需Apple硬件的macOS虚拟化解决方案。
summary.en: This project enables macOS virtualization on non-Apple hardware through Docker containerization with KVM hardware acceleration. It features web-based management, automated deployment of macOS versions 11-15 (Big Sur to Sequoia), and flexible configuration of storage, CPU, and RAM resources. Supporting Docker Compose, Kubernetes, and GitHub Codespaces deployment, it is ideal for iOS/macOS app development testing, CI/CD pipelines, and cross-platform development environments, providing developers with a convenient, production-ready macOS virtualization solution without Apple hardware requirements.

metadata.name: Docker-OSX
metadata.description: Run macOS VM in a Docker! Run near native OSX-KVM in Docker! X11 Forwarding! CI/CD for OS X Security Research! Docker mac Containers.

summary.zh: Docker-OSX通过KVM和OpenCore技术实现在Docker容器中运行接近原生性能的macOS虚拟机。支持X11图形转发和iPhone USB设备穿透，专为macOS安全研究（如iMessage漏洞分析）和自动化CI/CD流程设计，提供便携且隔离的测试环境，显著提升安全研究员的工作效率。
summary.en: Docker-OSX leverages KVM and OpenCore to run near-native macOS virtual machines inside Docker containers. It features X11 GUI forwarding and iPhone USB passthrough, specifically designed for macOS security research (including iMessage analysis) and CI/CD automation. This solution provides security researchers with a portable, isolated, and reproducible testing environment for efficient vulnerability discovery.

metadata.name: Jitterbug
metadata.description: Launch JIT enabled iOS app with a second iOS device

summary.zh: Jitterbug 是一款创新工具，通过两台 iOS 设备间 WiFi 配对，利用 libimobiledevice 实现跨设备调试，从而在非越狱设备上启用 JIT 编译。它支持创建 VPN 隧道实现设备自调试，需配合开发者镜像使用。主要应用于 iOS 性能优化、模拟器开发及逆向工程，为开发者提供绕过系统限制的灵活调试方案。
summary.en: Jitterbug is an innovative debugging tool that enables JIT compilation on non-jailbroken iOS devices by leveraging WiFi pairing between two iOS devices through libimobiledevice. It facilitates tethered app launches with debugger attachment and creates VPN tunnels for self-debugging scenarios. The solution requires Developer Disk Images and supports installation via AltStore or sideloading. Primary use cases include iOS performance optimization, simulator development, and security research, offering developers a flexible approach to bypass Apple's JIT restrictions while maintaining device security integrity.

metadata.name: Deep-Live-Cam
metadata.description: real time face swap and one-click video deepfake with only a single image

summary.zh: Deep-Live-Cam 是一款实时换脸与深度伪造工具，仅需单张源图像即可实现一键视频换脸。核心技术包括实时面部捕捉、嘴部动作保留与多人脸映射，支持 Windows/Mac 平台。适用于内容创作、直播表演、影视娱乐及视频聊天等场景，内置内容审核机制确保合规使用，强调负责任的 AI 应用。
summary.en: Deep-Live-Cam is a real-time face swap and deepfake tool that enables one-click video face replacement with just a single source image. Key technical features include real-time facial capture, mouth mask for natural lip movement preservation, and multi-face mapping for simultaneous subject processing. It supports Windows/Mac platforms and serves content creation, live streaming, film entertainment, and video chat applications. The software incorporates built-in content moderation to prevent misuse and promotes responsible AI usage through ethical guidelines and consent requirements.

metadata.name: UTM
metadata.description: Virtual machines for iOS and macOS

summary.zh: UTM 是一款基于 QEMU 的 iOS 和 macOS 全系统虚拟化工具，支持 x86_64、ARM64、RISC-V 等 30 多种处理器架构。它提供 JIT 加速版本和无需越狱的 SE 解释器版本，可在 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 上运行 Windows、Linux 等操作系统。利用 Hypervisor 和 Virtualization 框架实现硬件加速，是移动设备和桌面端的强大虚拟化解决方案。
summary.en: UTM is a full-featured system emulator and virtual machine host for iOS and macOS, built on QEMU. It supports 30+ processor architectures including x86_64, ARM64, and RISC-V, enabling users to run Windows, Linux, and other operating systems on iPhones, iPads, and Macs. The platform offers JIT-based acceleration for optimal performance and a special SE (Slow Edition) using threaded interpretation that requires no jailbreak. With native frontends leveraging latest Apple APIs and hardware acceleration via Hypervisor.framework and Virtualization.framework, UTM delivers a powerful cross-platform virtualization solution for both mobile and desktop environments.

metadata.name: memcode
metadata.description: Flashcards. Beautiful. Effortless.

summary.zh: Memcode 是一款专为开发者与学习者设计的现代化间隔重复闪卡应用。核心亮点在于深度融合编程学习场景，支持代码块、LaTeX公式与多媒体内容，并集成 OpenAI 高质量文本转语音。其 LLM 友好的纯文本导入导出格式，便于 AI 辅助知识管理，实现美观、高效、无摩擦的学习体验。
summary.en: Memcode is a modern spaced repetition flashcard app designed for developers and learners. It excels in programming education with support for code blocks, LaTeX formulas, and multimedia. Integrated OpenAI text-to-speech delivers high-quality audio, while LLM-friendly plain text import/export enables seamless AI-powered knowledge management, combining beauty with effortless learning.

metadata.name: Roo-Code
metadata.description: Roo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.

summary.zh: RooCode是VS Code扩展，提供多模式AI开发团队。支持代码生成、架构设计、调试、文档编写等全流程任务，集成MCP服务器实现工具扩展，通过自然语言指令驱动AI代理完成编程工作。
summary.en: RooCode is a VS Code extension that embeds a complete AI-powered development team directly in your code editor. It provides specialized modes including Code for everyday tasks, Architect for system design, Ask for explanations, Debug for issue tracing, and customizable modes for team workflows. The extension integrates with MCP servers for extensible tooling and enables natural language-driven code generation, refactoring, debugging, documentation writing, and task automation.

metadata.name: open-canvas
metadata.description: 📃 A better UX for chat, writing content, and coding with LLMs.

summary.zh: Open Canvas 是 LangChain 开源的 AI 文档协作平台，基于 LangGraph 构建多智能体系统。核心亮点包括：内置反思智能体实现跨会话记忆，支持从现有文档开始而非强制聊天，提供可定制快捷操作和版本回溯，同时支持代码与 Markdown 实时渲染编辑。作为 OpenAI Canvas 的开源替代方案，它通过持久化用户风格规则实现个性化体验，适用于写作、编程等场景。
summary.en: Open Canvas is LangChain's open-source AI document collaboration platform built on LangGraph multi-agent architecture. Key innovations include: built-in reflection agents with cross-session memory, starting from existing documents instead of chat-only, customizable quick actions, artifact versioning, and live code/Markdown editing. As an open alternative to OpenAI Canvas, it personalizes experiences by persisting user style rules and insights, ideal for writing, coding, and collaborative content creation.

metadata.name: maple-font
metadata.description: Maple Mono: Open source monospace font with round corner, ligatures and Nerd-Font icons for IDE and terminal, fine-grained customization options. 带连字和控制台图标的圆角等宽字体，中英文宽度完美2:1，细粒度的自定义选项

summary.zh: Maple Mono 是一款开源等宽字体，专为提升代码阅读体验设计。核心亮点包括圆角美学、智能连字和完整的 Nerd-Font 图标支持。其独特的中英文 2:1 宽度对齐技术，在多语言混排和 Markdown 表格中实现完美视觉对齐。V7 版本采用可变字体技术，支持无级字重调节和细粒度特性控制，适配各类 IDE 和终端环境。
summary.en: Maple Mono is an open-source monospace font designed to enhance coding workflow. Key features include rounded corners, smart ligatures, and comprehensive Nerd-Font icon integration. Its unique 2:1 Chinese-English width alignment ensures perfect visual harmony in multilingual code and Markdown tables. The V7 remake introduces variable font technology with infinite weight control and granular customization options, optimized for IDEs and terminals.

metadata.name: karakeep
metadata.description: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search

summary.zh: Karakeep 是一款自托管的书签管理工具，支持链接、笔记、图片和 PDF 的收藏。核心亮点包括 AI 自动标签与摘要（支持 ChatGPT 和本地 Ollama 模型）、全文搜索、OCR 文字识别，以及完整的网页与视频归档功能。提供浏览器插件、iOS/Android 应用，并可通过 RSS 自动抓取。基于 NextJS 和 tRPC 构建，注重隐私与数据自主，适合数字资料囤积者。
summary.en: Karakeep is a self-hostable bookmark manager designed for digital hoarders to collect links, notes, images, and PDFs. It leverages AI for automatic tagging and summarization, supporting both ChatGPT and local Ollama models. The app provides full-text search, OCR for image text extraction, and complete web/video archiving using monolith and yt-dlp. Available on web, mobile (iOS/Android), and browsers via extensions, it includes RSS auto-hoarding, REST API, and SSO. Built with NextJS, Drizzle ORM, and tRPC, it emphasizes privacy and data sovereignty.

metadata.name: open-dev-data
metadata.description: A taxonomy for open source cryptocurrency, blockchain, and decentralized ecosystems

summary.zh: Electric Capital 推出的 Open Dev Data 是一个结构化的区块链与 Web3 开源生态分类法。它提供 CLI 工具链，支持按时间快照导出 JSONL 格式的仓库数据，并集成 DuckDB 实现本地高性能分析。通过交互式 SQL 界面，开发者可快速洞察比特币、以太坊等生态的子系统分布与项目演进，为生态研究提供精准数据基础。
summary.en: Open Dev Data by Electric Capital is a structured taxonomy for blockchain and Web3 open-source ecosystems. It offers a CLI toolkit to export repository data in JSONL format with historical snapshots, integrates DuckDB for local high-performance analytics, and provides an interactive SQL interface. Developers can quickly analyze subsystem distributions and project evolution across ecosystems like Bitcoin and Ethereum, enabling precise ecosystem research.

metadata.name: supermemory
metadata.description: Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.

summary.zh: supermemory 是一个高性能、可扩展的AI记忆引擎，定位为用户的'第二大脑'。核心亮点在于支持MCP协议，可无缝集成Claude、Cursor等AI工具，实现智能记忆检索与对话。支持URL、PDF、文本等多格式内容导入，提供浏览器插件和Raycast扩展。采用API优先设计，既可作为个人知识管理平台，也能通过开发者控制台集成到企业工作流，支持自托管部署。
summary.en: Supermemory is a high-performance, scalable AI memory engine positioned as your 'second brain.' Its core strength lies in MCP protocol integration, enabling seamless connectivity with AI tools like Claude and Cursor for intelligent memory retrieval and chat. It supports multi-format content import (URLs, PDFs, text) via browser extensions and Raycast. API-first design allows both personal knowledge management and enterprise workflow integration through its developer console, with self-hosting options available.

summary.zh: 基于 Cloudflare Pages 和 Next.js 的 Serverless 图床服务。利用 Cloudflare 免费额度实现无限存储且零成本运营，无需自备服务器和域名。集成内容审核 API 自动屏蔽不良图片，提供完整的后台管理系统，支持访问统计、黑白名单管控，并可配置 Telegram 机器人实时通知。
summary.en: A Serverless image hosting service built on Cloudflare Pages and Next.js. Offers unlimited storage at zero cost within Cloudflare's free tier, eliminating the need for self-hosted servers and domains. Features automated content moderation API for inappropriate images, a full-featured admin panel with access analytics, IP/referer whitelisting/blacklisting, and configurable Telegram bot notifications.

metadata.name: tgState
metadata.description: 使用Telegram作为存储的文件外链系统，不限制文件大小和格式。

summary.zh: tgState 是一款创新的文件外链系统，深度利用 Telegram 的 Bot API 和 FileID 机制，将 Telegram 频道/群组作为无限容量存储后端。系统支持任意大小格式的文件存储分发，提供 Web 界面和 API 上传接口，可作为图床或私有网盘使用。支持 Docker、Vercel 等多种部署方式，配合 CloudFlare 可实现高效 CDN 加速。
summary.en: tgState is an innovative file hosting system that leverages Telegram's Bot API and FileID mechanism to utilize Telegram channels/groups as unlimited-capacity storage backend. Supporting files of any size and format, it provides both web interface and API for uploads, functioning as image hosting or private cloud storage. Features flexible deployment via Docker, Vercel, or binary, with CloudFlare CDN integration for optimized content delivery.

metadata.name: Docker-Proxy
metadata.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 自建Docker镜像加速服务，基于官方Docker  Registry 一键部署Docker、K8s、Quay、Ghcr、Mcr、Nvcr等镜像加速\管理服务。支持免服务器部署到 ClawCloud\Render\Koyeb

summary.zh: 该项目提供一键部署的Docker镜像加速服务，基于官方Registry支持Docker Hub、K8s、Quay等主流仓库代理。支持自动配置反向代理（Nginx/Caddy）、缓存控制、IP黑白名单及私有镜像拉取，解决国内镜像下载慢和频率限制问题。可部署在自有服务器或ClawCloud/Render等免费平台，附带Web管理面板实现镜像搜索与容器监控。
summary.en: This project provides a one-click deployable Docker image acceleration service based on the official Registry, supporting proxies for Docker Hub, K8s, Quay, and other major registries. It features automatic reverse proxy (Nginx/Caddy) setup, cache control, IP whitelisting/blacklisting, and private image pulling to address slow downloads and rate limits in China. It can be deployed on private servers or free platforms like ClawCloud/Render, with a web management panel for image search and container monitoring.

metadata.name: pyvideotrans
metadata.description: Translate the video from one language to another and embed dubbing & subtitles.

summary.zh: pyVideoTrans 是一款开源视频翻译工具，提供从语音识别、字幕翻译、AI配音到音视频合成的完整自动化流程。支持本地与云端多种 ASR、LLM 和 TTS 模型，集成 F5-TTS 等语音克隆技术，可区分多角色配音。具备交互式编辑、命令行操作及跨平台部署能力，适用于内容创作者与开发者实现高效视频本地化。
summary.en: pyVideoTrans is a powerful open-source video translation toolkit that automates the entire pipeline from speech recognition to AI dubbing and subtitle embedding. It integrates local and cloud APIs for ASR, LLM translation, and TTS, featuring voice cloning (F5-TTS, CosyVoice), multi-role speaker diarization, and interactive proofreading. Supports both GUI and CLI operation across Windows, macOS, and Linux, enabling efficient batch processing and video localization for content creators and developers.

metadata.name: calibre
metadata.description: The official source code repository for the calibre ebook manager

summary.zh: calibre 是一款功能全面的电子书管理工具，支持主流格式查看、转换、编辑与编目。其核心优势在于强大的格式转换引擎、跨平台兼容性（Linux/Windows/macOS）、设备同步能力，以及自动抓取元数据和将新闻转换为电子书的功能，是构建个人数字图书馆的理想解决方案。
summary.en: calibre is a comprehensive e-book management suite offering viewing, conversion, editing, and cataloging across major formats. Key strengths include a powerful conversion engine, cross-platform support (Linux/Windows/macOS), device synchronization, automated metadata fetching, and news-to-ebook conversion capabilities, making it ideal for personal digital library management.

metadata.name: v2ray
metadata.description: 最好用的 V2Ray 一键安装脚本 & 管理脚本

summary.zh: 233boy/v2ray 是一款专注于 V2Ray 自动化部署与管理的 Shell 脚本工具。通过极简命令行交互，实现一键安装、配置管理与协议切换，大幅降低 V2Ray 使用门槛。核心亮点包括多协议支持（VMess/VLESS/Trojan/Shadowsocks）、自动化 TLS 证书申请、多配置并行运行及动态端口管理。适用于快速搭建科学上网代理服务器，满足隐私保护与网络访问需求。
summary.en: 233boy/v2ray is a Shell script tool focused on automated deployment and management of V2Ray. It simplifies complex configurations through minimal command-line interactions, enabling one-click installation, configuration management, and protocol switching. Key features include multi-protocol support (VMess/VLESS/Trojan/Shadowsocks), automated TLS certificate provisioning, concurrent multi-configuration operation, and dynamic port management. Ideal for rapidly deploying scientific上网 proxy servers for privacy protection and network access needs.

metadata.name: Umi-OCR
metadata.description: OCR software, free and offline. 开源、免费的离线OCR软件。支持截屏/批量导入图片，PDF文档识别，排除水印/页眉页脚，扫描/生成二维码。内置多国语言库。

summary.zh: Umi-OCR 是一款开源、免费的离线 OCR 软件，支持 Windows 和 Linux 系统。核心功能包括截屏识别、批量图片/PDF 文档处理、二维码识别与生成，以及公式识别。其技术亮点在于内置高效离线引擎（支持 Rapid-OCR 和 PaddleOCR），提供排版解析和文本后处理（如排除水印/页眉页脚），并支持命令行与 HTTP 接口调用，满足高效、隐私安全的本地化文字识别需求。
summary.en: Umi-OCR is a free, open-source offline OCR software for Windows and Linux. It offers screenshot OCR, batch image/PDF processing, QR code recognition/generation, and formula recognition. Key technical features include a built-in high-efficiency offline engine (supporting Rapid-OCR and PaddleOCR), layout analysis and text post-processing (e.g., excluding watermarks/headers/footers), and support for CLI and HTTP API integration, meeting the needs for efficient, privacy-preserving local text recognition.

metadata.name: Dism-Multi-language
metadata.description: Dism++ Multi-language Support & BUG Report

summary.zh: 该仓库是Dism++的多语言本地化资源库，为这款Windows系统优化工具提供16种语言的翻译文件，涵盖应用界面与官方网站。包含Data.xml系统清理规则配置及崩溃统计后台，默认开发语言为简体中文，由全球译者协作维护各语言版本的质量与准确性。
summary.en: This repository hosts multilingual localization resources for Dism++, a Windows system optimization utility. It provides translation files for 16+ languages covering both the application interface and official website. The project includes Data.xml with system cleanup rules and a crash statistics backend. Default development language is Simplified Chinese, maintained through global translator collaboration to ensure localization quality across all language versions.

metadata.name: wxauto
metadata.description: Windows版本微信客户端（非网页版）自动化，可实现简单的发送、接收微信消息，简单微信机器人

summary.zh: wxauto 提供 Windows 原生微信客户端的 Python 自动化接口，基于 UIAutomation 技术直接操控微信 3.9.X 版本，实现消息收发与简易机器人功能。无需 Web 版限制，支持 Windows 10/11 系统，适用于个人微信消息批量处理与自动化场景。项目已于 2025 年 10 月停止维护，仅限学习交流使用。
summary.en: wxauto is a Python automation library for native Windows WeChat client (v3.9.X) that leverages UIAutomation technology to directly control the desktop application. It enables sending/receiving messages, building simple chatbots, and automating WeChat interactions without web versions. Compatible with Windows 10/11 and Python 3.9+, it serves personal automation needs. Important: Discontinued in October 2025, intended solely for educational and research purposes.

metadata.name: llm_aided_ocr
metadata.description: Enhances Tesseract OCR output using LLMs (local or API) for error correction, smart chunking, and markdown formatting of scanned PDFs

summary.zh: 该项目通过LLM增强传统OCR流程，显著提升扫描PDF的识别准确率与可读性。核心采用Tesseract进行基础OCR识别，再利用本地或API大模型进行智能纠错、分块与Markdown格式化。支持异步处理与GPU加速，适用于文档数字化、档案管理等场景，有效解决OCR常见错误与格式混乱问题。
summary.en: This project enhances traditional OCR pipelines using LLMs to significantly improve accuracy and readability of scanned PDFs. It employs Tesseract for base OCR, then leverages local or API-based LLMs for intelligent error correction, smart chunking, and Markdown formatting. Key features include asynchronous processing, GPU acceleration for local inference, and flexible hybrid deployment. Designed for document digitization, archival management, and office automation, it effectively resolves common OCR errors, duplicate content, and formatting inconsistencies while preserving document structure.

metadata.name: koodo-reader
metadata.description: A modern ebook manager and reader with sync and backup capacities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS and Web

summary.zh: Koodo Reader 是一款开源的跨平台电子书阅读管理工具，支持 Windows、macOS、Linux、Android、iOS 及 Web 全平台。核心亮点包括：支持 EPUB、PDF、MOBI 等 15+ 格式，集成 OneDrive、Google Drive 等 10+ 云存储实现数据同步，内置 AI 词典翻译与文本朗读功能，提供丰富的阅读自定义选项，是个人数字阅读管理的理想解决方案。
summary.en: Koodo Reader is an open-source, cross-platform ebook management and reading application supporting Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, and Web. Key features include: compatibility with 15+ formats including EPUB, PDF, and MOBI; seamless synchronization via 10+ cloud services like OneDrive and Google Drive; integrated AI-powered dictionary, translation and text-to-speech; extensive customization for fonts, themes and layouts. It provides a comprehensive solution for personal digital reading management across all devices.

metadata.name: ddns-go
metadata.description: Simple and easy to use DDNS. Support Aliyun, Tencent Cloud, Dnspod, Cloudflare, Callback, Huawei Cloud, Baidu Cloud, Porkbun, GoDaddy, Namecheap, NameSilo...

summary.zh: ddns-go 是一款用Go开发的轻量级动态域名解析工具，支持阿里云、腾讯云、Cloudflare等20余家主流DNS服务商。可自动检测公网IPv4/IPv6地址变化并实时同步至域名记录，适用于家庭宽带、小型服务器等动态IP场景。提供Web管理界面、Docker部署方案及系统服务化运行能力，支持多平台、多架构与Webhook通知。
summary.en: ddns-go is a lightweight Dynamic DNS client built with Golang, supporting 20+ major DNS providers like Aliyun, Tencent Cloud, Cloudflare and more. It automatically detects public IPv4/IPv6 address changes and synchronizes them to domain records in real-time, perfect for home broadband, small servers and IoT devices with dynamic IPs. The tool offers a user-friendly web interface, Docker deployment, system service integration, multi-platform compatibility (Windows/macOS/Linux, ARM/x86/RISC-V) and customizable webhook notifications.

metadata.name: BroadcastChannel
metadata.description: Turn your Telegram Channel into a MicroBlog.

summary.zh: BroadcastChannel 是一个基于 Astro 的工具，可将 Telegram 频道转化为轻量级微型博客。它无需浏览器端 JavaScript，提供 SEO 友好的站点地图和 RSS 订阅，支持 Cloudflare、Vercel 等无服务器部署。用户只需配置频道用户名，即可快速搭建独立博客，实现内容同步与自定义域名绑定。
summary.en: BroadcastChannel transforms your Telegram channel into a lightweight microblog using Astro. It requires zero client-side JavaScript, delivers SEO-friendly sitemaps and RSS feeds, and supports deployment on serverless platforms like Cloudflare and Vercel. Simply configure your channel username to launch a standalone blog with custom domain support.

metadata.name: web-archive
metadata.description: Free web archiving and sharing service.

summary.zh: 基于 Cloudflare 的免费网页归档服务，通过浏览器插件将页面保存为单文件 HTML，利用 Worker+D1+R2 全栈方案实现低成本存储与检索。集成 AI 自动标签分类、文件夹管理与阅读模式，支持移动端适配，提供完整的归档、搜索与分享功能，适合个人知识沉淀。
summary.en: Web Archive is a free, serverless web archiving and sharing service built entirely on Cloudflare's platform. It captures webpages as single-file HTML through a browser extension and stores them using Cloudflare D1 database and R2 storage via Workers. The platform features AI-powered automatic tag classification, folder organization, reading mode, mobile responsiveness, and searchable archives. Leveraging Cloudflare's generous free tier, it provides a cost-effective, scalable solution for personal knowledge management and digital content preservation.

metadata.name: TrollFools
metadata.description: In-place tweak injection with insert_dylib and ChOma.

summary.zh: TrollFools 是一款专为 TrollStore 设计的轻量级 tweak 注入工具，利用 insert_dylib 和 ChOma 实现 Mach-O 二进制文件的原地动态库注入。支持 iOS 14-17 系统应用及 App Store 应用的修改，无论是解密还是加密状态。采用 SwiftUI 开发，界面现代且体积小巧，旨在替代有缺陷的 optool，为越狱社区提供高效稳定的 tweak 部署方案。
summary.en: TrollFools is a lightweight tweak injection tool specifically designed for TrollStore ecosystem, leveraging insert_dylib and ChOma to perform in-place dynamic library injection directly into Mach-O binaries. It supports iOS 14-17, capable of modifying removable system applications, decrypted App Store apps, and even encrypted App Store apps with bare dynamic libraries. Written entirely in SwiftUI, it delivers a modern user interface while maintaining a small package size. The project aims to replace the problematic optool by compiling a statically linked install_name_tool, providing the jailbreak community with a more reliable and efficient solution for tweak deployment.

metadata.name: unplugin-icons
metadata.description: 🤹 Access thousands of icons as components on-demand universally.

summary.zh: unplugin-icons 是基于 Iconify 的通用图标组件库，提供超20万图标并支持150+图标集。通过按需加载机制仅打包实际使用的图标，显著减小构建体积。支持 Vite、Webpack 等主流构建工具及 React、Vue 3 等框架，具备自动导入、SSR/SSG 友好、自定义图标等特性，适用于现代前端项目。
summary.en: unplugin-icons is a universal icon library leveraging Iconify, providing 200,000+ icons across 150+ sets. It enables on-demand loading to bundle only used icons, reducing bundle size. Compatible with major build tools (Vite, Webpack, Rollup) and frameworks (React, Vue 3, Svelte), it features auto-importing, custom icons, and SSR/SSG support without FOUC for modern web development.

metadata.name: llm-course
metadata.description: Course to get into Large Language Models (LLMs) with roadmaps and Colab notebooks.

summary.zh: 这是一个免费的LLM系统学习课程，提供从数学基础到工程实践的完整路线图。课程分为三部分：LLM基础、LLM科学家（模型构建与优化）和LLM工程师（应用开发与部署）。包含大量实用的Google Colab notebooks，涵盖模型微调、合并、量化、评估等实战技术，并配套自动化工具，适合想深入LLM领域的开发者。
summary.en: This is a free, comprehensive LLM course offering structured learning paths from mathematical foundations to production deployment. The curriculum is divided into three parts: LLM Fundamentals, The LLM Scientist (focusing on building optimal models with cutting-edge techniques), and The LLM Engineer (covering application development and deployment). It provides extensive Google Colab notebooks for hands-on practice, including tools for fine-tuning, model merging, quantization, and automated evaluation. Based on the LLM Engineer's Handbook, it's designed for developers seeking practical LLM expertise.

metadata.name: frp-panel
metadata.description: a multi node frp webui and for https://github.com/fatedier/frp server and client management, which makes this project a Cloudflare Tunnel/Tailscale Funnel/Ngork platform and agent open source alternative

summary.zh: FRP-Panel 是 frp 的开源可视化管理平台，提供集中式配置、多节点编排与边缘 Worker 部署能力。项目采用 Master-Server-Client 架构，支持 WireGuard 智能组网与动态调度，可替代 Cloudflare Tunnel 等商业服务，大幅简化 NAT 穿透与内网服务暴露的运维复杂度，实现统一认证与实时监控。
summary.en: FRP-Panel is an open-source visual management platform for frp that provides centralized configuration, multi-node orchestration, and edge Worker deployment capabilities. Adopting a Master-Server-Client architecture, it supports WireGuard smart networking and dynamic scheduling, serving as a self-hosted alternative to commercial services like Cloudflare Tunnel. The platform significantly simplifies NAT traversal and internal service exposure operations while enabling unified authentication, real-time monitoring, and zero-configuration credential distribution across distributed environments.

metadata.name: enhanced-FaaS-in-China
metadata.description: 提升部署在cloudflare、vercel或netlify的网页在中国的访问速度和稳定性 Improve the access speed and stability in China of web pages hosted on cloudflare, vercel or netlify by merely changing your CNAME record. cf优选域名 | cf优选ip | cloudflare | vercel | netlify | 加速 | 国内 | 中国 | 境内 | 大陆

summary.zh: 该项目通过自定义CNAME解析，优化Cloudflare、Vercel和Netlify服务在中国大陆的访问体验。核心机制是定时测试各平台IP的速度与稳定性，优选出最佳节点并配置三网解析，将国内流量引导至最优线路，海外使用官方IP。相比官方Anycast常将流量路由至东南亚导致拥堵，此方案能有效改善晚高峰时段的访问速度和连通性稳定性，仅需修改DNS记录即可实现，特别适合部署在海外FaaS平台的中文网站加速。
summary.en: This project enhances access speed and stability for websites hosted on Cloudflare, Vercel, or Netlify in mainland China through custom CNAME redirection. It automatically tests IPs from these platforms every 40 minutes, selecting optimal nodes for China's three major ISPs while using official IPs overseas. By bypassing problematic anycast routing that often directs Chinese traffic to Southeast Asia, it significantly improves connectivity during peak hours and prevents single-point failures. The solution requires only DNS configuration changes, making it ideal for accelerating Chinese access to overseas serverless deployments.

summary.zh: Bypass Paywalls Clean for Chrome 是一款浏览器扩展，旨在帮助用户绕过新闻网站和在线出版物的付费墙限制。该扩展通过内容脚本和网络请求拦截技术，自动检测并规避付费订阅提示，使用户能够免费访问原本需要付费的内容。本仓库为扩展的专属支持与问题追踪平台，主代码已迁移至 gitflic.ru。
summary.en: Bypass Paywalls Clean for Chrome is a browser extension designed to help users bypass paywalls on news sites and online publications. It employs content scripts and network request interception to automatically detect and circumvent paywall restrictions, allowing free access to premium content. This repository serves as the dedicated support and issue tracking platform, with the main codebase having been migrated to gitflic.ru.

metadata.name: ArchiveBox
metadata.description: 🗃 Open source self-hosted web archiving. Takes URLs/browser history/bookmarks/Pocket/Pinboard/etc., saves HTML, JS, PDFs, media, and more...

summary.zh: ArchiveBox 是一款开源自托管网页存档工具，支持从浏览器书签、历史记录、Pocket、Pinboard 等多源导入 URL，完整保存 HTML、JS、PDF、媒体文件等内容。采用标准化格式（WARC、SQLite、JSON）确保数据长期可读，提供 CLI、REST API 和 Webhook 集成能力。适用于个人知识管理、企业证据保全及数字资产备份，支持 Docker 快速部署。
summary.en: ArchiveBox is an open-source self-hosted web archiving solution that preserves web content from URLs, browser history, bookmarks, Pocket, Pinboard, and more. It captures comprehensive snapshots including HTML, JavaScript, PDFs, and media files in standardized formats (WARC, SQLite, JSON) ensuring long-term accessibility. The tool offers CLI, REST API, and webhook integrations for automation, with Docker support for easy deployment.
