Ideal for personal knowledge management, legal evidence preservation, and social media backup, it gives users full control over their archived data.

metadata.name: dart_simple_live
metadata.description: 简简单单的看直播

summary.zh: Simple Live 是基于 Flutter 3.38 和 Dart 开发的跨平台直播聚合应用，支持虎牙、斗鱼、B站、抖音四大平台。项目采用 core+app+tv 模块化架构，覆盖 Android/iOS/Windows/macOS/Linux/TV 全终端，集成弹幕系统。作为开源学习项目，展示直播协议解析与 Flutter 全平台开发实践。
summary.en: Simple Live is a cross-platform live streaming aggregation application developed with Flutter 3.38 and Dart language. It integrates mainstream platforms including Huya, Douyu, Bilibili, and TikTok, providing a unified viewing experience. The project adopts a modular architecture with separate core library, console, mobile app, and TV client, supporting Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android TV. Key features include real-time danmaku display and multi-platform synchronization. As an educational open-source project, it showcases practical implementations of live streaming protocol parsing and Flutter's full-platform development capabilities.

metadata.name: KeymouseGo
metadata.description: 类似按键精灵的鼠标键盘录制和自动化操作 模拟点击和键入 | automate mouse clicks and keyboard input

summary.zh: KeymouseGo 是一款轻量级跨平台自动化工具，通过录制鼠标键盘操作生成 JSON5 脚本并回放执行。支持 Windows/Linux/macOS，提供桌面 GUI 和命令行两种模式，可设定执行次数与热键控制。基于 Python 和 pynput 库开发，无需编程基础即可实现重复性办公、测试等任务的自动化，是精简绿色的按键精灵替代方案。
summary.en: KeymouseGo is a lightweight cross-platform automation tool that records mouse and keyboard actions into JSON5 scripts for playback. Supporting Windows/Linux/macOS, it offers both GUI and CLI modes with configurable execution count and hotkeys. Built on Python and pynput, it enables automating repetitive tasks like office work and testing without programming knowledge, serving as a compact alternative to key wizard software.

metadata.name: edgetunnel
metadata.description: edgetunnel2 VLESS/Trojan 多功能面板

summary.zh: edgetunnel 2.0 是基于 Cloudflare Workers/Pages 的边缘计算隧道管理方案，深度集成 VLESS 与 Trojan 协议。提供可视化后台面板，支持实时配置、日志监控与流量统计。内置自动订阅系统，兼容 Clash、Sing-box、Surge 等主流客户端。支持自定义 ProxyIP、链式代理及优选 API 加速，适配 Windows、Android、iOS、MacOS 及软路由固件，部署方式灵活高效。
summary.en: edgetunnel 2.0 is a Cloudflare Workers/Pages-based edge computing tunnel solution with deep VLESS and Trojan protocol integration. It features a visual management panel for real-time configuration, log monitoring, and traffic statistics. The built-in subscription system auto-generates configurations compatible with Clash, Sing-box, Surge and other clients. Supporting custom ProxyIP, chain proxies, and optimized APIs, it accelerates performance across Windows, Android, iOS, macOS and router firmware with flexible deployment options.

metadata.name: NotionNext
metadata.description: 使用 NextJS + Notion API 实现的，支持多种部署方案的静态博客，无需服务器、零门槛搭建网站，为Notion和所有创作者设计。 (A static blog built with NextJS and Notion API, supporting multiple deployment options. No server required, zero threshold to set up a website. Designed for Notion and all creators.)

summary.zh: NotionNext 是一个基于 Next.js 和 Notion API 的静态博客系统，支持 Vercel 等多平台无服务器部署。项目提供 Next、Medium、Hexo 等多种主题，集成 Twikoo、Giscus 等评论系统，使用 Tailwind CSS 构建样式。用户无需服务器即可零门槛搭建个人博客，将 Notion 作为内容管理后台，适合创作者快速建立网站。
summary.en: NotionNext is a static blog system built with Next.js and Notion API, supporting serverless deployment on platforms like Vercel. It offers multiple themes including Next, Medium, Hexo, and Fukasawa, integrates various comment systems such as Twikoo, Giscus, and Gitalk, and uses Tailwind CSS for responsive styling. The project enables creators to build personal blogs with zero server requirements, using Notion as a content management system, making professional website creation accessible to all creators without technical barriers.

metadata.name: IPv6forDuckDNS
metadata.description: Script to submit both IPv6 and IPv4 addresses to DuckDNS

summary.zh: 该脚本解决DuckDNS不支持IPv6自动更新的问题，通过Shell实现IPv4/IPv6双栈地址自动提交。自动检测NAT环境，一键配置并创建cron定时任务，适用于家庭服务器和物联网设备。轻量级设计，依赖curl等基础工具，确保在提供服务的设备上直接运行。
summary.en: This script resolves DuckDNS's lack of IPv6 auto-update support by automatically submitting both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses via Shell. It detects NAT environments, provides one-click configuration with automated cron job setup, and is ideal for home servers and IoT devices. Lightweight design relies on curl and standard tools, ensuring direct execution on service-providing devices.

metadata.name: picx
metadata.description: 🏞️ PicX 是一款基于 GitHub API 开发的图床工具，提供图片上传托管、生成图片链接和常用图片工具箱服务。

summary.zh: PicX 是一款基于 GitHub API 的在线图床管理工具，无需下载安装即可使用。它支持拖拽上传、批量操作、图片压缩和水印处理，提供 Markdown/HTML 等多种链接格式。通过 GitHub OAuth 或 Token 认证，用户可将 GitHub 仓库作为免费图床，配合 jsDelivr 等 CDN 实现高速访问，是开发者和技术写作者的理想图片托管解决方案。
summary.en: PicX is a GitHub API-based online image hosting management tool that requires no download or installation. It supports drag-and-drop upload, batch operations, image compression, and watermarking, providing multiple link formats like Markdown/HTML. Through GitHub OAuth or Token authentication, users can leverage GitHub repositories as free image hosts, combined with CDNs like jsDelivr for high-speed access, making it an ideal image hosting solution for developers and technical writers.

metadata.name: SatellaJailed
metadata.description: Jailed in-app purchase cracker (iOS 12-16)

summary.zh: SatellaJailed 是一款专为 iOS 12-16 设计的应用内购买破解工具，支持非越狱（jailed）和部分越狱设备。通过动态库注入技术，它能在应用购买流程中拦截并绕过苹果的支付验证机制。工具提供三种安装方式：电脑脚本自动打补丁、Azula 应用补丁和 Esign 签名集成，支持 TrollStore 和 Dopamine 环境。使用时发起购买后取消确认弹窗即可。核心功能默认启用，iOS 15+ 用户可开启高级选项。注意并非所有应用都兼容。
summary.en: SatellaJailed is an iOS 12-16 in-app purchase cracker designed for jailed and partially jailbroken devices. It employs dynamic library injection to intercept and bypass Apple's payment verification during purchase flows. The tool offers three installation methods: computer-based script patching, Azula app patching, and Esign signature integration, compatible with TrollStore and Dopamine environments. Users initiate a purchase and cancel the Apple ID confirmation popup to activate. Core functionality is enabled by default, with advanced features available for iOS 15+. Note that not all applications are supported, and success rates may vary depending on the target app.

metadata.name: HowToLiveLonger
metadata.description: 程序员延寿指南 | A programmer's guide to live longer

summary.zh: 本指南专为程序员设计，基于全因死亡率（ACM）学术证据，提供量化延寿策略。核心通过优化饮食（如蔬果、坚果摄入降低27% ACM）、运动（挥拍运动降47% ACM）及生活习惯（7小时睡眠），目标降低66.67% ACM并增加20年预期寿命。亮点在于结构化输入-输出框架及争议数据处理，直击久坐职业健康痛点。
summary.en: Tailored for programmers, this guide leverages all-cause mortality (ACM) research to deliver quantified longevity strategies. Key actions include dietary optimization (e.g., fruits/nuts reducing ACM by 27%), racket sports (47% ACM reduction), and sleep management (7-hour optimum), targeting 66.67% ACM decrease and ~20-year lifespan gain. Unique for its input-output framework and evidence-based controversy analysis, addressing sedentary occupational health risks.

metadata.name: PicGo
metadata.description: :rocket: The Ultimate Image Uploader for Efficient Creators. Supports Obsidian, Typora, VS Code etc. and 60+ image hosting services  (S3, GitHub, Cloudflare R2, Imgur, Aliyun OSS...). Paste, upload, done.

summary.zh: PicGo是专为创作者设计的终极图片上传工具，无缝集成Obsidian、VS Code、Typora等主流编辑器。支持60+图床服务（GitHub、阿里云OSS、S3等），通过拖拽/粘贴/快捷键实现秒传并自动复制链接。独创插件系统可扩展支持Cloudflare R2等新兴存储，彻底消除写作中的上下文切换，让创作者专注内容生产。
summary.en: PicGo is the ultimate image uploader for efficient creators, seamlessly integrating with Obsidian, VS Code, Typora and other editors. Supporting 60+ image hosts (GitHub, Alibaba Cloud OSS, AWS S3), it enables instant uploads via drag-and-drop/clipboard/hotkeys with auto-copied links. Its extensible plugin system adds support for Cloudflare R2 and more, eliminating context switching to maximize creative focus.

metadata.name: Ebook-Translator-Calibre-Plugin
metadata.description: A Calibre plugin to translate ebook into a specified language.

summary.zh: Bookfere Ebook Translator 是为 Calibre 设计的专业翻译插件，集成 Google、DeepL、ChatGPT 等主流引擎及自定义 API 支持。插件全面兼容 Calibre 48 种输入格式，提供高级与批量双模式，支持多任务并行翻译与智能缓存，可无缝集成至 Calibre 库管理，是跨语言阅读与电子书本地化的技术解决方案。
summary.en: Bookfere Ebook Translator is a professional Calibre plugin integrating Google Translate, DeepL, ChatGPT, Gemini, and custom APIs to translate ebooks across 48 input formats. It offers advanced and batch modes, parallel processing, intelligent caching, and seamless Calibre library integration, delivering a robust solution for cross-language reading and ebook localization with extensive customization options and format compatibility.

metadata.name: Telegraph-Image
metadata.description: Image Hosting solution, Flickr/imgur alternative, make it easy for users to share their images. Using Cloudflare Pages and Telegraph.

summary.zh: Telegraph-Image 是基于 Cloudflare Pages 和 Telegram Channel 的免费图床方案，替代 Flickr/imgur。核心价值：无限存储（单图5MB限制）、零服务器成本、自动绑定 pages.dev 域名或自定义域名。技术亮点包括可选 AI 图片审查、后台管理（网格/瀑布流视图）、批量删除与分页功能，完全依赖 Cloudflare 免费额度运营。
summary.en: Telegraph-Image is a free image hosting solution using Cloudflare Pages and Telegram Channel as a Flickr/imgur alternative. Key value: unlimited storage (5MB/image cap), zero server cost, automatic *.pages.dev domain or custom domain binding. Technical highlights include optional AI image moderation, backend management (grid/waterfall views), batch operations, and full operation within Cloudflare's free tier limits.

metadata.name: trackerslist
metadata.description: Updated list of public BitTorrent trackers

summary.zh: 提供每日自动更新的公共 BitTorrent tracker 列表，涵盖 UDP、HTTP、HTTPS、WebSocket、i2p 和 Yggdrasil 等多种协议。包含域名与 IP 两种格式，通过自动化检测去重，优化 P2P 文件共享的连接效率与稳定性，适用于 BT 客户端配置及去中心化网络应用场景。
summary.en: Daily automatically updated public BitTorrent tracker lists supporting multiple protocols including UDP, HTTP, HTTPS, WebSocket, i2p and Yggdrasil. Provides both domain and IP address formats, with automated deduplication to optimize P2P file sharing connectivity and stability for BT clients and decentralized network applications.

metadata.name: editions
metadata.description: Generated files for SuttaCentral editions

summary.zh: SuttaCentral 发布系统生成的佛教经典数字版本文件库。存储多语言、多格式的巴利语三藏及注释文献，为网站和移动应用提供结构化内容支持。核心价值在于实现佛学文献的自动化发布、跨格式转换与国际化分发。
summary.en: Repository containing generated digital edition files for SuttaCentral. Stores multilingual, multi-format Pali Canon and commentarial texts, providing structured content for web and mobile applications. Core value lies in automated publishing, cross-format conversion, and international distribution of Buddhist scriptures.

metadata.name: pull
metadata.description: 🤖 Keep your forks up-to-date via automated PRs

summary.zh: Pull 是一款 GitHub App，通过自动化 PR 保持 fork 仓库与上游同步。基于 Deno 2.0 和 TypeScript 构建，支持 merge、squash、rebase 和硬重置等多种同步策略。可定时检测上游变更，自动创建 PR 并分配审查者，兼容分支保护规则。提供灵活的 YAML 配置，支持 GitHub Enterprise Server，解决了开发者维护 fork 时的手动同步痛点，提升开源协作效率。
summary.en: Pull is a GitHub App that automates fork synchronization with upstream repositories via pull requests. Built on Deno 2.0 and TypeScript, it supports configurable merge strategies including merge, squash, rebase, and hard reset. The app periodically checks for upstream changes, automatically creates PRs with assignees and reviewers, and respects branch protection rules. With flexible YAML configuration and GitHub Enterprise Server support, it eliminates manual fork maintenance overhead and streamlines open-source collaboration workflows.

metadata.name: awesome-free-chatgpt
metadata.description: 🆓免费的 ChatGPT 镜像网站列表，持续更新。List of free ChatGPT mirror sites, continuously updated.

summary.zh: 该仓库持续维护312个免费ChatGPT镜像站点列表，提供无需登录或低门槛访问GPT-4、Claude等AI模型的途径。收录网站涵盖完全免费、有免费额度等多种类型，并附带替代方案与自建指南，为开发者、研究人员及普通用户提供便捷的AI工具导航服务。
summary.en: This repository maintains a continuously updated list of 312 free ChatGPT mirror sites, offering developers, researchers, and general users easy access to AI models like GPT-4, Claude, and DeepSeek without login or low barriers. It categorizes sites by free tiers, login requirements, and model support, while providing alternatives, self-hosting guides, prompt engineering resources, and developer tools for convenient AI tool discovery and implementation.

metadata.name: books
metadata.description: 【编程随想】收藏的电子书清单（多个学科，含下载链接）

summary.zh: 该仓库是'编程随想'博主整理的跨学科电子书库，涵盖政治、技术等多个领域。核心亮点在于采用Resilio Sync P2P技术实现去中心化分发，支持免翻墙自动同步，规避审查与流量限制。提供PDF/EPUB/MOBI等全格式支持，并附带详细的阅读技术指南，构建了一个抗审查的数字知识分发体系。
summary.en: This repository hosts cross-disciplinary e-books curated by 'ProgramThink', covering politics, technology, and more. Its core innovation leverages Resilio Sync P2P technology for decentralized distribution, enabling censorship-resistant, auto-syncing downloads without VPN. It provides comprehensive format support (PDF/EPUB/MOBI) and detailed technical guides, forming a robust anti-censorship digital knowledge dissemination system.

metadata.name: awesome-selfhosted
metadata.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

summary.zh: 这是一个全面的自托管开源软件目录，涵盖通信、存储、管理、媒体等数十个类别，提供替代SaaS的私有化部署方案。核心价值在于帮助用户实现数据主权、隐私保护和基础设施自主可控。项目持续维护，包含死链检查和活跃度监控，是自建服务器的终极参考指南。
summary.en: A comprehensive directory of self-hostable open-source network services and web applications spanning communications, storage, management, media, and dozens of categories. It enables private deployment alternatives to SaaS, empowering data sovereignty, privacy protection, and infrastructure autonomy. Continuously maintained with automated dead link validation and project health monitoring, it serves as the definitive reference for building and maintaining a self-hosted server ecosystem.

metadata.name: ChirmyRam-OneDrive-Repository
metadata.description: ChirmyRam OneDrive Repository

summary.zh: 这是一个基于国际版OneDrive构建的超大规模媒体资源仓库，总存储量达150TB，涵盖动画、影视、剧集、电子书等分类。项目采用多账号负载均衡架构，通过alist目录程序提供WebDAV和Rclone访问支持，解决了API调用限制问题。内容按中文拼音和英文首字母双重索引组织，主要提供MKV格式内封字幕视频。技术亮点包括Golang单文件部署、多盘符抽象管理、以及完整的播放器推荐方案。
summary.en: A massive OneDrive-based media repository totaling 150TB+ across nine dedicated drives for animations, movies, TV series, 4K ISOs, and e-books. The project implements multi-account load balancing via alist (Golang) to overcome API throttling, offering WebDAV and Rclone access protocols. Content is dual-indexed by Chinese pinyin and English names, primarily in MKV format with embedded subtitles. Key technical features include single-binary deployment, abstracted multi-drive management, and comprehensive media player recommendations for optimal playback experience.

metadata.name: HowToCook
metadata.description: 程序员在家做饭方法指南。Programmer's guide about how to cook at home (Simplified Chinese only).

summary.zh: 专为程序员设计的开源烹饪指南，采用代码思维重构菜谱结构。每道菜都有精确的食材清单、标准化步骤和量化参数，如同编写程序般严谨。项目集成Docker部署、CI/CD自动化、PDF导出等工程化特性，并建立完整贡献体系。通过技术隐喻和结构化文档，将烹饪转化为可编程的确定性过程，降低程序员下厨门槛。
summary.en: An open-source cooking guide specifically designed for programmers, reconstructing recipes with code-like thinking. Each dish features precise ingredient lists, standardized procedures, and quantified cooking parameters as rigorously as writing code. The project includes engineering features like Docker deployment, CI/CD automation, and PDF export, with a complete contribution system. Through technical metaphors and structured documentation, it transforms cooking into a programmable deterministic process, lowering the barrier for programmers to cook at home.

metadata.name: bilingual_book_maker
metadata.description: Make bilingual epub books Using AI translate

summary.zh: bilingual_book_maker 是一款基于 AI 的电子书双语翻译工具，支持 epub/txt/pdf/srt 格式。核心亮点包括：集成 GPT-4、Claude、Gemini 等多款大模型，通过 litellm 统一管理非 OpenAI 模型；支持上下文感知翻译保持语义连贯；自动在多模型间负载均衡规避速率限制；提供 CLI 命令行工具，专为公版书设计，避免版权风险。
summary.en: bilingual_book_maker is an AI-powered tool for creating bilingual e-books from epub/txt/pdf/srt files. Key features: integrates multiple LLMs including GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini via litellm for unified non-OpenAI model management; context-aware translation preserves semantic coherence across paragraphs; automatic load balancing across models prevents rate limiting and optimizes API costs; provides CLI for batch processing; specifically designed for public domain works to avoid copyright infringement risks while supporting parallel API keys.

metadata.name: cap
metadata.description: The privacy-first, self-hosted CAPTCHA for the modern web.

summary.zh: Cap 是一款隐私优先的自托管验证码替代方案，采用 SHA-256 工作量证明机制，摒弃传统视觉 puzzles。仅 20KB 大小，零依赖，加载毫秒级，支持 Docker 独立部署。提供隐形验证与 M2M API 保护能力，通过 CSS 变量实现深度定制，为现代 Web 应用提供高效、私密的 bot 防护。
summary.en: Cap is a privacy-first, self-hosted CAPTCHA alternative that replaces visual puzzles with SHA-256 proof-of-work challenges. At just 20KB with zero dependencies, it loads in milliseconds and supports standalone Docker deployment. Featuring invisible validation, M2M API protection, and CSS variable customization, it provides efficient, private bot mitigation for modern web applications.

metadata.name: markitdown
metadata.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

summary.zh: 微软开源Python工具，将Office文档、PDF、音视频等30+格式转换为Markdown。专为LLM和文本分析管道设计，保留标题、列表、表格等结构，输出token高效。集成OCR、语音转录、YouTube下载等能力，提供MCP服务器供Claude等LLM应用调用。流式处理无临时文件，插件化架构支持扩展。
summary.en: Microsoft's open-source Python utility converts 30+ file formats (Office documents, PDF, images, audio, HTML, etc.) to Markdown for LLM and text analysis pipelines. Preserves document structure—headings, lists, tables, links—with token-efficient output. Integrates OCR, speech transcription, YouTube processing, and MCP server for Claude/LLM integration. Stream-based processing eliminates temporary files; plugin architecture enables custom converters.

metadata.name: ui-design-brain
metadata.description: A Cursor skill that gives AI agents real UI component knowledge — best practices, layout patterns, and design-system conventions for 60+ interface components — so it generates production-grade UI instead of generic output.

summary.zh: 这是一个 Cursor AI 技能，为 AI 编程注入 60+ UI 组件的专业设计知识，包括最佳实践、布局模式和设计系统规范。通过消除 AI 的随意猜测，它能自动生成符合现代 SaaS、企业级或创意风格的生产级前端代码，显著提升 UI 开发质量与效率。
summary.en: This Cursor AI skill provides AI agents with deep expertise on 60+ UI components, covering accessibility standards, responsive layout patterns, and design system conventions meticulously curated from component.gallery. It eliminates generic output by delivering specific best practices, common layouts, and anti-patterns for each component, automatically generating production-grade interfaces in five style presets: Modern SaaS, Apple-level Minimal, Enterprise/Corporate, Creative/Portfolio, and Data Dashboard. The result is senior-designer-quality UI code that follows proven patterns without manual template assembly, significantly accelerating frontend development workflows.

metadata.name: Humanizer-zh
metadata.description: Humanizer 的汉化版本，Claude Code Skills，旨在消除文本中 AI 生成的痕迹。

summary.zh: Humanizer-zh 是 Humanizer 的中文汉化版本，专为 Claude Code 打造的技能，用于识别并消除文本中的 AI 生成痕迹。该工具基于维基百科的 AI 写作特征指南，可检测 24 种 AI 写作模式，涵盖内容、语言、风格和表达四大类。通过自然语言重写，将机械的 AI 文本转化为流畅、真实的人类表达，适用于营销文案、学术摘要和博客文章等场景，显著提升中文内容的人性化程度。
summary.en: Humanizer-zh is a Chinese localization of the Humanizer tool, designed as a Claude Code Skill to detect and eliminate AI-generated traces from text. Based on Wikipedia's AI writing patterns guide, it identifies 24 distinct AI writing patterns across content, language, style, and communication categories. The tool rewrites mechanical AI output into natural, human-like Chinese text, making it ideal for marketing copy, academic abstracts, and blog posts. It specifically addresses Chinese linguistic nuances while preserving core meaning and appropriate tone, significantly enhancing the authenticity of AI-generated content.

metadata.name: happy-llm
metadata.description: 📚 从零开始构建大模型

summary.zh: Datawhale推出的Happy-LLM是系统性大语言模型学习教程，从NLP基础到Transformer架构层层深入，手把手教你实现LLaMA2模型并完成预训练、微调全流程。项目结合理论与实践，覆盖RAG、Agent等前沿应用，为零基础学习者提供从原理理解到动手实战的完整路径，真正掌握大模型开发核心技能。
summary.en: Happy-LLM by Datawhale is a comprehensive tutorial that demystifies large language models from the ground up. Starting with NLP fundamentals and Transformer architecture, it provides hands-on guidance to implement LLaMA2 and execute the complete training workflow—from pre-training to fine-tuning with LoRA/QLoRA. The project bridges theory and practice, covering cutting-edge applications including RAG and Agent development, equipping learners with essential skills to build and deploy LLMs independently.

metadata.name: TavilyProxyManager
metadata.description: 一个透明的 Tavily API 反向代理：将多个 Tavily API Key（额度/credits）汇聚在一个 Master Key 之后，并提供内置 Web UI 用于管理 Key、用量与请求日志。

summary.zh: TavilyProxyManager 是一个专为 Tavily API 设计的高可用代理网关，核心解决多 API Key 的额度聚合与智能调度问题。通过 Master Key 统一鉴权，实现基于剩余额度的动态负载均衡与自动故障切换，有效规避频率限制。内置 Vue3 管理面板提供 Key 管理、用量监控与请求日志分析，同时集成 MCP 协议端点，无缝对接 Claude 等 AI 工具。Go 语言构建，单二进制部署，Docker 开箱即用。
summary.en: TavilyProxyManager is a high-availability proxy gateway designed for Tavily API, solving multi-key quota aggregation and intelligent scheduling. It unifies authentication via Master Key, implements dynamic load balancing based on remaining credits with automatic failover to avoid rate limits. The built-in Vue3 dashboard provides key management, usage monitoring, and request log analysis, while integrated MCP protocol endpoints seamlessly connect with AI tools like Claude. Built with Go, it offers single-binary deployment and Docker-ready out-of-the-box.

metadata.name: Scrapling
metadata.description: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

summary.zh: Scrapling 是一个自适应网页抓取框架，能够处理从单请求到大规模爬取的全场景需求。其核心亮点在于智能解析器可学习网站变化并自动重定位元素，内置绕过 Cloudflare 等反爬系统的能力，支持并发多会话爬取、自动代理轮换和暂停恢复功能。提供实时统计、CLI 和 MCP 服务器集成，是现代 Web 数据采集的高效解决方案。
summary.en: Scrapling is an adaptive web scraping framework designed to handle everything from simple single requests to complex large-scale crawling operations. Its standout feature is an intelligent parser that learns from website changes and automatically relocates elements when pages update. The framework includes built-in anti-bot bypass capabilities that defeat systems like Cloudflare Turnstile out of the box. It enables concurrent multi-session crawling with automatic proxy rotation, pause/resume functionality, and real-time streaming statistics. With integrated CLI tools and an MCP server, Scrapling offers a powerful yet straightforward solution for modern web data extraction at any scale.

metadata.name: GrokSearch
metadata.description: Integrate Grok's powerful real-time search capabilities into Claude via the MCP protocol!

summary.zh: 通过 MCP 协议将 Grok 实时搜索能力集成至 Claude，突破模型知识截止限制。基于 FastMCP 构建，提供 AI 优化的结构化搜索结果，支持多平台过滤与网页抓取。可一键禁用官方工具并强制路由，实现无缝即插即用。适用于事实核查、实时信息检索与研究分析场景，显著增强 AI 的时效性信息获取能力。
summary.en: Integrates Grok's real-time search capabilities into Claude via MCP protocol, effectively breaking through the model's knowledge cutoff limitation. Built on FastMCP framework, it delivers AI-optimized structured search results with multi-platform filtering and web scraping support. Features one-click disabling of native tools with forced routing for seamless plug-and-play experience. Includes automatic time injection and dynamic model switching capabilities. Ideal for fact-checking, real-time information retrieval, and research analysis scenarios, significantly enhancing AI's ability to access up-to-date information and verify facts with current data.

metadata.name: RuView
metadata.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

summary.zh: RuView利用商用WiFi的CSI信道状态信息，通过物理信号处理和机器学习实现穿墙人体感知。系统提供实时姿态估计(54K fps)、呼吸心率监测及毫秒级存在检测，无需摄像头或穿戴设备。基于Rust构建，支持ESP32-S3等低成本硬件，适用于智能安防、健康监护及灾难救援等隐私敏感场景。
summary.en: RuView transforms commodity WiFi CSI signals into real-time human perception through physics-based signal processing and ML. It delivers 54K fps pose estimation, vital sign monitoring (breathing/heartbeat), and <1ms presence detection without cameras or wearables. Built in Rust with 1100+ tests, it supports ESP32-S3 and research NICs for through-wall sensing up to 5m. Ideal for privacy-preserving smart home, healthcare, security, and disaster response applications.

metadata.name: ACE-Step-1.5
metadata.description: The most powerful local music generation model that outperforms almost all commercial alternatives, supporting Mac, AMD, Intel, and CUDA devices.

summary.zh: ACE-Step 1.5 是开源音乐生成基础模型，采用语言模型与扩散Transformer混合架构，通过内在强化学习实现商业级音质。支持50+语言歌词生成与1000+音乐风格，可在4GB显存设备本地运行，A100上生成速度达2秒/首。提供音频编辑、人声转伴奏等创作工具，赋能音乐制作人与内容创作者。
summary.en: ACE-Step 1.5 is an open-source music foundation model featuring a hybrid LM-DiT architecture with intrinsic reinforcement learning, delivering commercial-grade audio quality on consumer hardware (<4GB VRAM). It generates full songs in under 2 seconds on A100, supports 50+ languages and 1000+ musical styles, and offers versatile editing tools including vocal-to-BGM conversion and multi-track generation. The model enables lightweight personalization through LoRA training with minimal data, revolutionizing AI-assisted music creation for producers and content creators.

metadata.name: deer-flow
metadata.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

summary.zh: DeerFlow 是字节跳动开源的超级智能体框架，通过协调子智能体、记忆系统和沙箱环境，处理分钟级到小时级的复杂研究与创作任务。其核心在于可扩展技能体系与上下文工程，支持长期记忆持久化与文件系统操作，为构建自主智能体应用提供生产级基础设施。
summary.en: DeerFlow is an open-source SuperAgent harness by Bytedance that orchestrates sub-agents, memory, and sandboxes to handle complex research, coding, and creative tasks spanning minutes to hours. Featuring extensible skills, context engineering, and long-term memory persistence, it provides production-grade infrastructure for building autonomous agent applications.

metadata.name: neo
metadata.description: Turn any web app into an API. Chrome extension captures browser traffic, auto-generates schemas, lets AI replay APIs directly. No official API needed.

summary.zh: Neo 是一款 Chrome 扩展，通过被动捕获浏览器 API 流量并自动生成 schema，将任意 Web 应用转化为可直接调用的 API。它解决了 AI 代理操作 Web 应用时官方 API 功能受限和浏览器自动化脆弱易断的痛点。v2 新增基于可访问性树的 UI 自动化层，支持 API 直接调用与 UI 驱动双模式，无需管理 token 或处理 CSRF，显著提升自动化效率和稳定性。
summary.en: Neo is a Chrome extension that passively captures browser API traffic and auto-generates schemas to turn any web app into a callable API. It solves the limitations of official APIs and the fragility of browser automation for AI agents. v2 adds an accessibility-tree-based UI automation layer, enabling both direct API replay and UI control through a unified CLI. No token management or CSRF handling required, dramatically improving automation efficiency and reliability.

summary.zh: Eubiota是一个专注于人类微生物组自主发现的模块化智能体平台。它通过协调专业智能体，结合领域工具，执行规划、执行与验证的迭代循环，确保证据严谨性。该平台利用结果驱动优化，加速微生物组领域的机制推理与实验设计，旨在提升科研探索的效率与深度。
summary.en: Eubiota is a modular agentic AI platform designed for autonomous microbiome discovery. It orchestrates specialized agents to execute an iterative cycle of planning, execution, and verification via shared memory, ensuring rigorous evidence grounding. The framework integrates domain-specific tools and employs outcome-driven refinement to accelerate mechanistic reasoning and experimental design in human microbiome research.

metadata.name: openclaw-security-practice-guide
metadata.description: This guide is designed for OpenClaw itself (Agent-facing), not as a traditional human-only hardening checklist.

summary.zh: 本指南专为高权限自主AI Agent（OpenClaw）设计，颠覆传统人工加固清单模式。针对终端/root级权限场景，提出Agentic零信任架构，通过事前行为黑名单与供应链审计、事中权限收缩与跨技能检查、事后13项核心指标nightly审计的三层防御矩阵，有效缓解提示注入、供应链投毒等LLM特有风险。支持Agent自主理解并部署安全策略，大幅降低人工配置成本。
summary.en: This guide is purpose-built for high-privilege autonomous AI agents like OpenClaw, shifting from traditional host-based defense to Agentic Zero-Trust Architecture. It addresses LLM-specific threats including prompt injection and supply chain poisoning through a 3-Tier Defense Matrix: pre-action blacklists and skill audits, in-action permission narrowing, and post-action nightly audits of 13 core metrics. Designed to be interpreted and executed directly by agents, it enables autonomous security deployment and validation, dramatically reducing manual configuration overhead while maintaining human oversight for high-risk operations.

metadata.name: CyberStrikeAI
metadata.description: CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

summary.zh: CyberStrikeAI 是一个 AI 原生的安全测试平台，基于 Go 构建。它集成 100+ 安全工具，通过 MCP 协议和 AI 代理实现端到端自动化测试。平台提供角色与技能系统、攻击链可视化、向量知识库和聊天机器人集成，支持从漏洞发现到结果分析的全生命周期管理，为安全团队提供可审计、可追溯的协作环境。
summary.en: CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built with Go, integrating 100+ security tools through native MCP protocol and AI agents for end-to-end automation. It features role-based testing, specialized skill systems, attack-chain visualization, vector knowledge base, and chatbot integration. The platform provides comprehensive lifecycle management with auditability, traceability, and collaborative capabilities for security teams.

metadata.name: LuaN1aoAgent
metadata.description: LuaN1aoAgent is a cognitive-driven AI hacker. It is a fully autonomous AI penetration testing agent powered by DeepSeek V3.2. Using dual-graph reasoning, LuaN1ao achieves a success rate of over 90% on the XBOW Benchmark, with a median exploit cost of just $0.09.

summary.zh: LuaN1aoAgent是基于DeepSeek V3.2的AI渗透测试智能体，采用P-E-R（规划-执行-反思）协作框架与因果图推理技术，模拟人类专家思维实现全自动漏洞挖掘。在XBOW基准测试中达到90.4%成功率，单次漏洞利用成本仅0.09美元，支持动态路径规划与持续学习进化，重塑自动化安全测试范式。
summary.en: LuaN1aoAgent is an AI penetration testing agent powered by DeepSeek V3.2, featuring the P-E-R (Planner-Executor-Reflector) framework and causal graph reasoning. It simulates human expert cognition for fully autonomous vulnerability discovery, achieving 90.4% success rate on XBOW benchmark at a median cost of $0.09 per exploit. Its dynamic planning and continuous learning capabilities redefine automated security testing.

metadata.name: qlib
metadata.description: Qlib is an AI-oriented Quant investment platform that aims to use AI tech to empower Quant Research, from exploring ideas to implementing productions. Qlib supports diverse ML modeling paradigms, including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and RL, and is now equipped with https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent to automate R&D process.

summary.zh: Qlib是微软开源的AI驱动量化投资平台，旨在用AI技术赋能量化研究全流程。平台支持监督学习、强化学习等多种机器学习范式，并集成RD-Agent实现因子挖掘与模型优化的自动化研发。适用于从策略构思到生产部署的全场景，提供跨平台支持，助力量化投资智能化升级。
summary.en: Qlib is Microsoft's open-source AI-powered quantitative investment platform designed to empower the entire quant research workflow with AI technology. The platform supports diverse ML paradigms including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and reinforcement learning. It integrates RD-Agent, an LLM-based autonomous framework that automates factor mining and model optimization. Suitable for scenarios ranging from strategy ideation to production deployment, Qlib offers cross-platform support and accelerates intelligent transformation in quantitative investing.

metadata.name: short-drama
metadata.description: 专业的短剧剧本创作skill,从选题立项到分集撰写、质量自检、合规审核、海外出海，覆盖短剧剧本生产全流程。

summary.zh: 这是一个面向AI编程助手的短剧剧本创作技能包，覆盖选题立项到出海全流程。提供13种题材模板、四层反派体系、五种钩子类型和节奏曲线系统，支持双语格式与合规审查。通过结构化提示工程实现自动化剧本生产，大幅提升创作效率与质量。
summary.en: This is a professional short drama screenplay creation skill package for AI programming assistants. It covers the complete workflow from topic selection to episode writing, quality review, compliance check, and overseas expansion. The tool provides 13 genre templates, a four-tier villain system, five hook types, and a rhythm curve system with paid content optimization. It supports both domestic and international formats with bilingual capabilities, featuring automated quality scoring and compliance review. Built on structured prompt engineering, it streamlines script creation, dramatically enhancing production efficiency while ensuring professional quality.

metadata.name: pinchtab
metadata.description: High-performance browser automation bridge and multi-instance orchestrator with advanced stealth injection and real-time dashboard.

summary.zh: PinchTab 是专为 AI 智能体设计的高性能浏览器自动化桥接器。通过 12MB 的 Go 二进制文件提供 HTTP API，支持多实例 Chrome 进程 orchestration 与隐身注入。核心突破在于 token 效率——文本提取仅需 800 tokens/页，成本比截图方案低 5-13 倍。具备持久化配置文件、ARM64 优化和实时仪表板，是 AI 驱动 Web 自动化的轻量级基础设施。
summary.en: PinchTab is a high-performance browser automation bridge designed for AI agents. This 12MB Go binary delivers HTTP API for multi-instance Chrome orchestration with advanced stealth injection. Its breakthrough is token efficiency—text extraction costs only 800 tokens/page, 5-13x cheaper than screenshots. Featuring persistent profiles, ARM64 optimization, and real-time dashboard, it's the lightweight infrastructure for AI-driven web automation.

metadata.name: symphony
metadata.description: Symphony turns project work into isolated, autonomous implementation runs, allowing teams to manage work instead of supervising coding agents.

summary.zh: Symphony 是 OpenAI 推出的 AI 编程自动化框架，将项目任务转化为独立自主的实现运行。系统监控项目管理工具（如 Linear），自动调度 AI 代理完成编码、测试、代码审查和 PR 合并，并提供 CI 状态、复杂度分析和操作视频作为工作证明。核心价值在于让工程师从监督编码代理中解放，转向高层次工作管理，适用于采用 harness engineering 的工程团队。
summary.en: Symphony is an AI-powered automation framework from OpenAI that transforms project work into isolated, autonomous implementation runs. The system monitors project management tools like Linear, automatically spawning AI agents to handle coding, testing, code review, and PR merging. It provides proof of work including CI status, complexity analysis, and walkthrough videos. The core value proposition enables engineers to manage work at a higher level rather than supervising coding agents directly, targeting teams that have adopted harness engineering practices. This engineering preview is designed for testing in trusted environments.

metadata.name: ade-python
metadata.description: Python library for Agentic Document Extraction (ADE).

summary.zh: LandingAI ADE Python库提供智能文档提取能力，支持同步/异步调用与大规模文档处理。基于Pydantic构建全类型SDK，内置指数退避重试机制，可插拔HTTP后端。通过MCP服务器无缝集成AI助手，实现文档结构化数据提取自动化。适用于金融、法律、医疗等领域的非结构化文档转结构化数据场景，提升数据处理效率。
summary.en: LandingAI ADE Python library enables intelligent document extraction via agentic AI. Features fully-typed SDK with Pydantic models, sync/async clients, and built-in exponential backoff retries. Supports large document processing through async jobs and pluggable HTTP backends (httpx/aiohttp). MCP server integration allows AI assistants to interact with the API seamlessly. Ideal for automating structured data extraction from unstructured documents in finance, legal, healthcare and other domains, transforming PDFs and images into machine-readable JSON with schema-based precision, high reliability and production-ready performance.

metadata.name: molmo2
metadata.description: Code for the Molmo2 Vision-Language Model

summary.zh: Molmo2 是艾伦人工智能研究所（Ai2）开源的视觉-语言模型，在视频理解、点驱动定位与跟踪任务上达到开源 SOTA 水平。支持单图、多图和视频推理，具备长上下文处理能力，提供 Transformers 和 vLLM 高效部署方案，适用于智能分析、视觉交互和自动化决策等场景。
summary.en: Molmo2 is an open vision-language model from the Allen Institute for AI (Ai2) that achieves state-of-the-art performance in video understanding, point-driven grounding, and tracking among open-source models. It supports single-image, multi-image, and video inference with long-context capabilities. The repository provides comprehensive training/evaluation code, pre-trained checkpoints, and efficient deployment via Transformers and vLLM. Ideal for intelligent visual analysis, interactive grounding, and automated decision-making applications.

metadata.name: book-searcher
metadata.description: Easy and blazing-fast book searcher, create and search your private library.

summary.zh: 极速图书搜索引擎，支持创建私有书库。一分钟索引超1000万图书元数据，检索响应仅30微秒。提供跨平台桌面应用、命令行工具及Web API，支持Docker、Vercel/Netlify部署，可按字段精准搜索。
summary.en: Ultra-fast book search engine for private libraries. Indexes 10M+ books/min, searches in 30µs. Cross-platform desktop, CLI, Web API. Docker/Vercel support.

metadata.name: huggingcloud
metadata.description: Turn a private Hugging Face repo into your own cloud storage service.

summary.zh: Hugging Cloud 将私有 Hugging Face 仓库转化为自托管云存储服务，专为 AI 团队管理模型与数据集设计。基于 FastAPI+Next.js 全栈架构，提供 RBAC 权限控制、可恢复上传和签名链接安全访问。Docker 容器化部署，支持 SQLite/Postgres 和 Redis，兼顾轻量便捷与生产级扩展能力。
summary.en: Hugging Cloud transforms private Hugging Face repositories into self-hosted cloud storage services, purpose-built for AI teams managing models and datasets. Built on a modern FastAPI+Next.js stack, it delivers enterprise-grade features including RBAC access control, resumable uploads, and cryptographically signed download links. Docker containerized deployment supports both SQLite for lightweight use and Postgres/Redis for production scalability, enabling seamless integration into existing AI infrastructure while maintaining data privacy and access governance.

metadata.name: arksim
metadata.description: Find your agents errors be fore your real users do

summary.zh: ArkSim 是一款 AI 智能体仿真测试平台，通过 LLM 驱动的虚拟用户模拟真实多轮对话，在上线前自动检测智能体错误。提供 7 大内置评估指标，支持自定义度量，自动分类错误并分级。协议无关，支持 Chat Completions API 和 A2A 协议，生成可视化 HTML 报告，帮助开发者提前发现并修复问题。
summary.en: ArkSim is an AI agent simulation testing platform that uses LLM-powered virtual users to simulate realistic multi-turn conversations, automatically detecting agent errors before deployment. It offers 7 built-in evaluation metrics, supports custom metrics, automatically categorizes and prioritizes failures. Protocol-agnostic, works with Chat Completions API and A2A, generating interactive HTML reports to help developers identify and fix issues proactively.

metadata.name: seedance-prompt-skill
metadata.description: Seedance 2.0 prompt skill，使用该Skill生成Seedance 2.0 视频提示词

summary.zh: 这是一个为Claude Code定制的提示词技能，专为字节跳动Seedance 2.0视频生成平台设计。它能将自然语言创意转化为结构化生产级提示词，支持十大核心能力包括一致性控制、镜头动作复制、声音设计和音乐卡点。内置多模态参考系统、时间轴分镜技术和场景化策略，涵盖电商广告、短剧、仙侠动画等垂直领域，显著提升AI视频创作效率。
summary.en: A custom Claude Code skill designed for ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 video generation platform. It transforms natural language ideas into structured, production-ready prompts with ten core capabilities including consistency control, camera motion replication, sound design, and beat sync. Features multi-modal reference system, timestamp storyboarding, and scenario-specific strategies for e-commerce, short dramas, xianxia animation, and more, dramatically improving AI video creation efficiency.

metadata.name: nodewarden
metadata.description: A third-party Bitwarden server running on Cloudflare Workers

summary.zh: NodeWarden 是基于 Cloudflare Workers 的第三方 Bitwarden 兼容服务端，实现零成本自托管密码管理。支持多用户、附件存储、TOTP 及 Passkey 等核心功能，兼容全平台官方客户端。利用 R2/KV 存储保障数据安全，适合个人及小团队私有化部署，规避企业版订阅费用。
summary.en: NodeWarden is a third-party Bitwarden-compatible server deployed on Cloudflare Workers, enabling zero-cost self-hosted password management. It supports multi-user access, attachments, TOTP, and Passkey features while maintaining full compatibility with official clients across platforms. Leveraging R2/KV storage for data security, it's ideal for individuals and small teams seeking private deployment without enterprise subscription fees.

metadata.name: paperclip
metadata.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies

summary.zh: Paperclip 是一个开源的 AI 代理编排平台，用于构建"零人力公司"。它通过 Node.js 服务端和 React 管理界面，协调多个 AI 代理（如 Claude、Cursor 等）协同完成商业目标。核心功能包括组织架构管理、预算控制、目标对齐和任务追踪，让管理者像使用任务管理器一样 overseeing 整个 AI 团队。平台支持任意能接收心跳信号的代理，提供统一仪表盘监控工作进展和成本，实现 24/7 自动化运营，同时保留人工审计和干预能力。
summary.en: Paperclip is an open-source orchestration platform for building "zero-human companies." It coordinates teams of AI agents through a Node.js backend and React dashboard, enabling autonomous business operations. The platform provides organizational charts, budget governance, goal alignment, and cost tracking across multiple agents like Claude Code and Cursor. Supporting any agent that can receive heartbeats, it functions as a task manager for AI teams, allowing 24/7 autonomous execution with human oversight. Users can define business goals, assign AI roles, and monitor progress from a unified interface, with pre-built company templates coming soon.

metadata.name: everything-claude-code
metadata.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

summary.zh: AI智能体性能优化系统，专为Claude Code、Cursor等设计。提供生产级解决方案：技能管理、记忆持久化、持续学习、安全扫描、MCP配置。通过令牌优化、并行化策略和验证循环，提升编码效率与可靠性。历经10个月实战验证，支持跨平台，获Anthropic黑客松奖项。
summary.en: An AI agent performance optimization system specifically designed for Claude Code, Cursor, and similar AI coding assistants. Delivers comprehensive production-ready solutions including skill management, memory persistence, continuous learning, security scanning, and MCP configurations. Significantly improves coding efficiency and reliability through advanced token optimization, parallelization strategies, and intelligent verification loops. Battle-tested over 10 months of intensive real-world product development, supports seamless cross-platform usage across multiple environments, and recognized as an Anthropic Hackathon winner with 50K+ stars and 6K+ forks from the global developer community.

metadata.name: arxiv-daily-researcher
metadata.description: 每天早上打开通知，高质量论文摘要已经为你准备好 Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒☆

summary.zh: 基于LLM的学术论文自动化监控系统，每日从ArXiv及20+顶级期刊抓取最新论文，通过双模型加权评分精准筛选，深度解析PDF全文并提取创新点、方法等核心维度。自动追踪关键词趋势生成可视化报告，支持邮件/企微等多渠道推送。提供Docker、GitHub Actions等部署方案，实现零人工干预的科研情报服务。
summary.en: An LLM-powered academic paper monitoring system that automatically fetches daily submissions from ArXiv and 20+ top journals. It employs dual-model weighted scoring for precise filtering, performs in-depth PDF analysis to extract key dimensions like methodologies and innovations, tracks keyword trends with visual reports, and pushes notifications via email/WeCom等多渠道. Supports Docker/GitHub Actions deployments for fully automated research intelligence.

metadata.name: lossless-claw
metadata.description: Lossless Claw — LCM (Lossless Context Management) plugin for OpenClaw

summary.zh: Lossless Claw 是 OpenClaw 的无损上下文管理插件，基于 LCM 论文实现。它通过 DAG 结构摘要系统解决 AI 代理长对话的 token 限制问题，将所有消息持久化到 SQLite 数据库，并使用 LLM 动态生成多层次摘要，确保对话历史完整可查。提供搜索工具让代理随时召回细节，实现永不遗忘的智能体体验。
summary.en: Lossless Claw is a Lossless Context Management (LCM) plugin for OpenClaw that solves AI agents' context window limitations through innovative DAG-based summarization. Instead of truncating old messages, it persists every message in SQLite and creates hierarchical LLM-generated summaries, forming a directed acyclic graph that preserves all original details. The system dynamically assembles context by combining recent messages with relevant summaries, ensuring no information is ever lost. With built-in tools like lcm_grep and lcm_expand, agents can instantly search and retrieve any historical detail, delivering a seamless never-forget conversational experience while staying within model token constraints.

metadata.name: investing-for-programmers
metadata.description: For Investing for Programmers book published by Manning

summary.zh: 本书专为程序员编写，系统讲解如何利用编程技能进行量化投资与算法交易。内容涵盖金融数据分析、交易策略开发、回测系统构建等实战主题，使用Python等工具将编程思维应用于投资决策。适合希望将技术优势转化为投资能力的开发者，提供可复用的代码示例与项目实践。
summary.en: Specifically designed for programmers, this book systematically explains how to leverage coding skills for quantitative investing and algorithmic trading. It covers practical topics including financial data analysis, trading strategy development, and backtesting system construction, using tools like Python to apply programming thinking to investment decisions. Suitable for developers who want to transform their technical advantages into investment capabilities, it provides reusable code examples and project practices.

metadata.name: free-for-dev
metadata.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

summary.zh: free-for-dev 是专为 DevOps 和基础设施开发者打造的免费服务精选清单，聚合主流云厂商、CI/CD、监控、数据库等20+类别 SaaS/PaaS/IaaS 永久免费层。由1600+社区贡献者维护，提供可立即使用的技术栈参考，规避免费试用陷阱，助力开发者快速构建和运维低成本技术架构。
summary.en: free-for-dev is a curated list of free-tier SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS offerings specifically for DevOps and infrastructure developers. It aggregates permanently free services across 20+ categories including major cloud providers, CI/CD, monitoring, databases, and generative AI. Maintained by 1,600+ contributors, it provides immediate technical stack references, helps avoid free-trial traps, and enables building cost-effective architectures with confidence.

metadata.name: fluffy-barnacle
metadata.description: Disposable, ephemeral network infrastructure powered by GitHub Codespaces.

summary.zh: Fluffy-Barnacle利用GitHub Codespaces快速部署一次性网络基础设施，提供SOCKS5代理、HTTPS文件托管和WireGuard隧道。专为渗透测试设计，支持多区域部署、自动重连及Burp Suite集成，实现免费临时的出口IP轮换，显著提升安全研究效率。
summary.en: Fluffy-Barnacle transforms GitHub Codespaces into ephemeral network infrastructure, deploying SOCKS5 proxies, HTTPS file hosting, and WireGuard tunnels in seconds. Designed for penetration testing, it features multi-region deployment, auto-reconnection, and Burp Suite integration. Each Codespace rotation provides fresh egress IPs, enabling efficient, policy-compliant security research and network operations.

metadata.name: math-science-video-lectures
metadata.description: List of Science courses with video lectures

summary.zh: 该仓库聚合了MIT、斯坦福、耶鲁等顶尖学府的数学与科学视频课程资源，涵盖物理、量子力学、弦理论等前沿领域。核心价值在于提供免费、高质量的系统化学习材料，适合自学深造和教学参考。技术亮点是资源整合与分类，便于用户快速定位所需课程。
summary.en: This repository curates a comprehensive collection of free video lectures from prestigious institutions including MIT, Stanford, and Yale, spanning mathematics, physics, quantum mechanics, string theory, and cosmology. It offers systematically organized, high-quality educational resources for self-paced learning and academic reference. The key technical value lies in its meticulous categorization and direct access to otherwise hard-to-find advanced course materials from world-renowned professors.

metadata.name: next-shadcn-admin-dashboard
metadata.description: Modern Admin Dashboard Template built with Shadcn UI and Next.js 16

summary.zh: 基于Next.js 16、TypeScript与Shadcn UI的现代化管理后台模板，提供CRM、财务等多场景仪表板。支持亮暗主题切换、响应式布局与同构文件系统架构，内置Tailwind CSS v4、Zustand状态管理和TanStack Table数据处理，助力快速构建可扩展的企业级应用。
summary.en: Modern admin dashboard template built with Next.js 16, TypeScript and Shadcn UI, featuring multiple pre-built dashboards for CRM, finance and other business scenarios. Supports light/dark theme switching with multiple color presets, responsive layouts, and colocation-based file system architecture for better code organization. Integrated with Tailwind CSS v4, Zustand for lightweight state management, and TanStack Table for advanced data handling. Includes authentication flows and role-based access control (planned). Enables rapid development of scalable enterprise applications with customizable themes and flexible layouts.

metadata.name: penpot
metadata.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration

summary.zh: Penpot 是开源的设计协作工具，支持设计师创建交互式原型与设计系统，开发者可直接获取生产就绪代码。基于 SVG/CSS 等开放标准实现设计与代码无缝衔接，2.0 版本新增 CSS Grid 布局、设计令牌和组件系统，显著提升产研协作效率。支持浏览器访问或自托管，适用于产品设计全流程。
summary.en: Penpot is an open-source design collaboration tool enabling designers to create interactive prototypes and design systems while providing developers with production-ready code. Built on open standards like SVG and CSS, it bridges design and development seamlessly. The 2.0 release introduces CSS Grid layout, native design tokens, and a new components system, significantly enhancing cross-functional team collaboration. Available as a web app or self-hosted solution for end-to-end product design workflows.

metadata.name: openrag
metadata.description: OpenRAG is a comprehensive, single package Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built on Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch.

summary.zh: OpenRAG是基于Langflow、Docling和OpenSearch的开箱即用RAG平台，提供智能文档搜索与AI对话能力。支持可视化工作流构建、多Agent协调与企业级语义检索，可快速部署处理真实数据，实现生产级企业知识管理。
summary.en: OpenRAG is a production-ready RAG platform integrating Langflow, Docling, and OpenSearch for intelligent document search and AI conversations. It features visual workflow orchestration, multi-agent coordination, and enterprise-grade semantic retrieval, enabling rapid deployment on messy real-world data.

metadata.name: page-agent
metadata.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

summary.zh: 阿里巴巴Page Agent是一个创新的页内JavaScript GUI代理框架，通过自然语言直接控制Web界面。其核心亮点在于纯前端实现，无需浏览器扩展或后端服务，基于文本化DOM操作避免截图和OCR依赖。支持接入任意LLM，提供人机协同UI，适用于SaaS智能助手、ERP/CRM表单自动填充、无障碍访问及多页面自动化场景。
summary.en: Alibaba Page Agent is an innovative in-page JavaScript GUI agent framework that controls web interfaces via natural language. Its key advantages include pure frontend implementation without browser extensions or backend services, direct DOM manipulation avoiding screenshots and OCR. It supports integration with any LLM, offers human-in-the-loop UI, and is ideal for SaaS AI copilots, smart form filling in ERP/CRM systems, accessibility enhancements, and cross-page automation.

metadata.name: CLI-Anything
metadata.description: "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/

summary.zh: CLI-Anything 通过自动化生成命令行接口，让任意软件 instantly 具备 AI 智能体原生调用能力。项目基于 Click 框架解析源码与 GUI，自动生成支持 JSON 结构化输出、撤销/重做和 REPL 的 CLI，无缝集成 Claude Code、Cursor 等主流 AI 编程助手，解决了 AI 控制存量软件的最后一公里问题，实现确定性、可组合的智能体工作流。
summary.en: CLI-Anything revolutionizes software interaction by auto-generating command-line interfaces that make any application instantly accessible to AI agents. Built on Python's Click framework, it analyzes source code and GUI structures to create composable CLIs with structured JSON output, undo/redo capabilities, and REPL modes. Seamlessly integrating with Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding assistants, it bridges the critical gap between AI agents and legacy software, enabling deterministic, reliable agent-native workflows across diverse tools.

metadata.name: impeccable
metadata.description: The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

summary.zh: Impeccable是为AI编码助手打造的UI设计增强系统，解决LLM生成界面同质化、缺乏专业性的问题。通过7大领域设计知识库（排版、色彩、动效等）、17个专用指令（/audit、/polish、/animate等）及反模式约束，显著提升AI设计输出质量。支持Cursor等IDE，提供从技术审查到视觉优化的全流程设计指导，让AI成为真正懂设计的前端协作伙伴。
summary.en: Impeccable is a UI design enhancement system for AI coding assistants that addresses generic, low-quality LLM-generated interfaces. It provides 7 domain-specific design knowledge bases (typography, color, motion, etc.), 17 steering commands (/audit, /polish, /animate), and curated anti-patterns to significantly improve AI design output. Integrated with IDEs like Cursor, it offers end-to-end design guidance from technical auditing to visual optimization, transforming AI into a design-savvy frontend collaborator.

metadata.name: BitNet
metadata.description: Official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs

summary.zh: 微软官方1-bit大模型推理框架，专为1.58-bit三元模型优化。基于llama.cpp构建，提供CPU/GPU无损快速推理，性能提升最高6.17倍，能耗降低82%。支持单CPU运行100B参数模型，速度达5-7 token/秒。采用查找表与并行内核技术，实现边缘设备高效部署，推动大模型本地化应用。
summary.en: Microsoft's official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs, optimized for 1.58-bit ternary models. Built on llama.cpp, it delivers lossless fast inference on CPU/GPU with up to 6.17x speedup and 82% energy reduction. Enables running 100B-parameter models on a single CPU at human reading speed (5-7 tokens/sec). Features optimized kernels using lookup table methodologies and parallel implementations with configurable tiling and embedding quantization. Empowers efficient edge deployment of large models, advancing local AI applications.

metadata.name: cult-ui
metadata.description: Components crafted for Design Engineers. Styled using Tailwind CSS, fully compatible with Shadcn, and easy to integrate—just copy and paste. MIT 🤌

summary.zh: 为设计工程师打造的UI组件库，提供92+可复制的AI智能体模式与4个全栈模板。基于Tailwind CSS开发，完全兼容Shadcn，支持一键复制、Next.js导出或v0导入，快速构建可访问的定制化界面。
summary.en: UI component library for Design Engineers featuring 92+ copy-paste AI Agent patterns and 4 full-stack templates. Built with Tailwind CSS, fully Shadcn-compatible. Integrate via copy-paste, Next.js export, or v0 import for accessible, customizable interfaces.

metadata.name: MiroFlow
metadata.description: 🏆 Top-1 on 5+ benchmarks | Web UI | Supports MiroThinker, Claude, Kimi, OpenAI

summary.zh: MiroFlow 是一款性能优先的开源 AI 智能体框架，在 9+ 基准测试中提升任意大模型性能。支持 GPT-5、Claude、Kimi 等模型一键切换，通过智能回滚、迭代推理和工具编排优化表现。提供 FastAPI+React Web 界面、无代码技能系统和多智能体图工作流，适用于模型评估、智能体研发与生产部署，结果完全可复现。
summary.en: MiroFlow is a performance-first open-source AI agent framework that enhances any LLM's capabilities across 9+ benchmarks. It enables one-line model switching between GPT-5, Claude, Kimi, and others via YAML config, optimizing performance through smart rollback, iterative reasoning, and tool orchestration. Features include a FastAPI+React Web UI, code-free skill system, and multi-agent graph workflows, ideal for model evaluation, agent development, and production deployment with fully reproducible results.

metadata.name: WeKnora
metadata.description: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

summary.zh: 腾讯开源的WeKnora是LLM驱动的文档智能框架，基于RAG范式实现深度文档理解与语义检索。采用模块化架构，支持多模态预处理、父-子分块、智能检索与重排序，可处理复杂异构文档。集成Milvus向量数据库，提供上下文感知的高质量问答，适用于企业知识库、智能客服等场景。
summary.en: WeKnora, Tencent's open-source LLM-powered framework, enables deep document understanding and semantic retrieval via RAG paradigm. Its modular architecture supports multimodal preprocessing, hierarchical parent-child chunking, intelligent retrieval, and reranking for complex heterogeneous documents. Integrated with Milvus vector database, it delivers context-aware answers for enterprise knowledge bases and intelligent customer service.

metadata.name: Viral_Writer_Skill
metadata.description: 基于 11 个内容洞见维度的自媒体创作 Skill，适用于各种智能体  给它一个主题，它给你一篇完整的文章、5 个备选标题、以及每张配图的生成 prompt。

summary.zh: 这个仓库提供了一个基于11个内容洞见维度的AI智能体写作技能，能够根据主题自动生成可直接发布的完整文章、5个备选标题及配图prompt。支持微信公众号、小红书、抖音多平台适配，通过系统性思考框架提升内容深度与传播力，输出结构化Markdown，显著提高创作效率与质量。
summary.en: This repository offers a viral writing skill for AI agents based on 11 content insight dimensions. Given a topic, it generates complete articles, 5 alternative titles with strategies, and AI image prompts. It adapts to WeChat, Xiaohongshu, and Douyin platforms with distinct styles, outputs structured Markdown, and enhances content depth and engagement through systematic thinking frameworks.

metadata.name: OpenViking
metadata.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

summary.zh: OpenViking是专为AI Agent设计的开源上下文数据库，创新性地采用文件系统范式统一管理记忆、资源与技能，解决碎片化问题。核心亮点包括：L0/L1/L2分层加载大幅降低token成本；目录递归检索结合语义搜索提升精度；检索轨迹可视化打破RAG黑盒；自动会话管理实现上下文自演进。
summary.en: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed for AI Agents. It unifies memory, resources, and skills via a filesystem paradigm. Key features include tiered loading (L0/L1/L2) to reduce token consumption, directory-recursive retrieval for improved precision, visualized retrieval trajectories for full observability, and automatic session management enabling self-evolving, adaptive context.

metadata.name: tavily-key-generator
metadata.description: Multi-service toolkit for Tavily and Firecrawl signup automation, key validation, and isolated proxy pools.

summary.zh: 该项目通过 Playwright 浏览器自动化批量注册 Tavily API Key，集成 CapSolver 破解验证码与可插拔邮箱后端完成验证。提供代理网关实现 Key 池化轮询、统一 API 端点与 Web 管理控制台，支持用量统计与自动风控，解决多账号管理与额度聚合需求。
summary.en: This project automates bulk registration of Tavily API keys using Playwright browser automation, integrating CapSolver for CAPTCHA solving and pluggable email backends (Cloudflare Email Worker/DuckMail) for email verification. It provides a proxy gateway for key pooling with round-robin scheduling, unified API endpoints, and a web management console. Key features include real-time usage statistics, automatic failure detection and disablement after 3 consecutive failures, risk control mechanisms with configurable cooling intervals, and Docker deployment support. It solves multi-account management, quota aggregation (1000 calls/key/month), and API key lifecycle automation challenges.

metadata.name: chrome-cdp-skill
metadata.description: Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open

summary.zh: 让AI智能体直接操控正在使用的Chrome浏览器，无需重新登录或启动新实例。通过Chrome原生调试协议建立持久连接，支持截图、DOM操作、网络监控等能力。相比Puppeteer方案，可访问已登录状态，稳定处理百个标签页，适合需要与真实浏览器环境交互的智能体场景。
summary.en: Enables AI agents to directly control your live Chrome session without relogin or new instances. Establishes persistent connections via Chrome's native debugging protocol, supporting screenshots, DOM manipulation, and network monitoring. Unlike Puppeteer-based solutions, it accesses authenticated states and reliably handles 100+ tabs, ideal for agents interacting with real browser environments.

metadata.name: browser
metadata.description: Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation

summary.zh: Lightpanda 是为 AI 和自动化设计的开源无头浏览器，内存占用仅为 Chrome 的 1/9，执行速度快 11 倍。支持 JavaScript 和主流自动化框架，适用于网页爬虫、AI 代理和测试场景。
summary.en: Lightpanda is an open-source headless browser designed specifically for AI and automation tasks. It dramatically reduces memory usage by 9x compared to Chrome while delivering 11x faster execution speeds. The browser supports JavaScript execution and Web APIs, and maintains compatibility with popular automation frameworks like Playwright, Puppeteer, and chromedp through the Chrome DevTools Protocol, making it ideal for web scraping, AI agent training, and automated testing.

metadata.name: AutoResearchClaw
metadata.description: Fully autonomous & self-evolving research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. 🦞

summary.zh: AutoResearchClaw 是一个全自动化学术研究流水线，可将单一研究想法转化为会议级论文。系统采用23阶段流程，集成 arXiv 和 Semantic Scholar 真实文献检索、硬件感知的代码实验（GPU/MPS/CPU 自动检测）、多智能体同行评审（CodeAgent、BenchmarkAgent、FigureAgent）以及 NeurIPS/ICML/ICLR 的 LaTeX 模板生成。通过4层引用验证和AI-slop检测确保学术严谨性，无需人工干预即可完成从构思到论文的全流程。
summary.en: AutoResearchClaw is a fully autonomous 23-stage research pipeline that transforms a single idea into a conference-ready academic paper. It integrates real literature search from arXiv and Semantic Scholar, hardware-aware sandboxed experiments with automatic GPU/MPS/CPU detection, multi-agent peer review (CodeAgent, BenchmarkAgent, FigureAgent), and generates LaTeX papers using NeurIPS/ICML/ICLR templates. The system ensures academic rigor through 4-layer citation integrity verification and AI-slop detection, delivering complete papers with verified BibTeX references without human intervention.

metadata.name: waoowaoo
metadata.description: 首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台。Industry-first professional AI Agent platform for controllable film & video production. From shorts to live-action with Hollywood-standard workflows.

summary.zh: waoowaoo 是首家工业级全流程 AI 影视生产平台，实现小说文本到完整视频的一键生成。核心功能包括 AI 剧本解析、一致性角色/场景生成、自动分镜制作及多角色配音，支持好莱坞标准工作流。基于 Next.js 15 与 Docker 容器化架构，提供从短剧到真人影视的自动化创作解决方案，大幅降低影视制作门槛。
summary.en: Waoowaoo is the industry-first professional AI Agent platform for controllable film and video production, enabling automated creation of complete videos from novel text. It features AI script analysis, consistent character/scene generation, automatic storyboard production, and multi-role voice synthesis, following Hollywood-standard workflows. Built on Next.js 15 with Docker containerization, it provides an end-to-end solution for short dramas, comic videos, and live-action content creation, significantly lowering the barrier to professional video production.

metadata.name: build-your-own-x
metadata.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

summary.zh: 本仓库提供从零构建各类技术的分步指南，涵盖操作系统、数据库、神经网络、3D渲染等20+领域。通过实践深入理解计算机底层原理与系统设计，支持C++、Python、Java等多种语言。适合开发者通过动手实践掌握核心技术，践行'不创造即不理解'的学习理念，是进阶编程能力的绝佳资源。
summary.en: This repository offers comprehensive step-by-step guides for building various technologies from scratch, covering 20+ domains including operating systems, databases, neural networks, 3D renderers, blockchain, and augmented reality. It enables developers to deeply understand computer fundamentals and system design through hands-on implementation and practical coding exercises. The tutorials support multiple programming languages like C++, Python, Java, and JavaScript, accommodating different skill sets. Embodying Richard Feynman's philosophy 'What I cannot create, I do not understand', it serves as an exceptional educational resource for advancing programming expertise by recreating core technologies from first principles, making it ideal for intermediate to advanced developers seeking true mastery of computing systems.

metadata.name: agent-orchestrator
metadata.description: Agentic orchestrator for parallel coding agents — plans tasks, spawns agents, and autonomously handles CI    fixes, merge conflicts, and code reviews.

summary.zh: 这是一个用于并行AI编码代理的编排系统，为每个代理创建独立的Git工作树环境，实现代码生成、CI修复和审查处理的自治化。采用插件架构，支持Claude Code、Codex等多种AI代理，以及tmux、Docker等运行时，提供统一仪表板监控，显著提升开发效率。
summary.en: An orchestration layer for parallel AI coding agents that creates isolated Git worktrees for autonomous code generation, CI failure resolution, and review comment handling. Features plugin architecture supporting multiple AI agents (Claude Code, Codex), runtimes (tmux, Docker), and issue trackers, with unified dashboard monitoring to accelerate development workflows.

metadata.name: AIStudioToAPI
metadata.description: A wrapper that exposes Google AI Studio as OpenAI, Gemini, and Anthropic compatible APIs.（一个将 Google AI Studio 封装为兼容 OpenAI / Gemini / Anthropic 风格 API 的工具）

summary.zh: AIStudioToAPI 是一个将 Google AI Studio 网页端封装为兼容 OpenAI、Gemini 和 Anthropic API 格式的代理工具。它利用浏览器自动化技术实现多账号管理、工具调用及生图/TTS 模型访问，提供可视化 Web 控制台和 VNC 登录功能，便于开发者将 AI Studio 能力无缝集成到现有应用。
summary.en: AIStudioToAPI is a wrapper that converts Google AI Studio's web interface into OpenAI, Gemini, and Anthropic-compatible API formats. Leveraging browser automation, it supports multi-account management, function calling, and access to Gemini models for image generation and text-to-speech. The tool provides a web console with VNC login capabilities, enabling seamless integration of AI Studio features into existing applications.

metadata.name: goal-driven
metadata.description: A multi-agent system that keeps running for ~100 hours and solve a very complicated coding or math problem that can be verified

summary.zh: Goal-Driven是一个多智能体协作框架，通过主从智能体架构实现复杂问题的持续求解。系统以明确目标和严格标准驱动子智能体长时间工作（30-300小时），自动评估进度直至达标。已成功应用于编译器、数据库等系统级项目开发，如C++实现TypeScript编译器（100小时）和Rust实现SQLite（30小时），显著扩展了AI解决复杂工程问题的能力边界。
summary.en: Goal-Driven is a multi-agent collaboration framework designed for solving highly complex, verifiable problems through sustained continuous effort. It employs a master-slave architecture where the master agent monitors sub-agent progress against predefined goals and criteria, maintaining persistent work cycles for 30-300 hours until success conditions are satisfied. The system has demonstrated remarkable capabilities in system-level development, including building a C++ TypeScript compiler from scratch in 100 hours and a Rust-based SQLite implementation in 30 hours. By automating long-horizon software engineering tasks, it pushes the boundaries of AI-driven complex problem solving.

metadata.name: stitch-skills
metadata.description: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

summary.zh: 这是一个为AI编程代理设计的标准化技能库，通过MCP协议与Stitch设计工具深度集成。提供设计系统文档生成、提示词优化、设计稿转React组件等核心能力，兼容Claude Code、Cursor等主流AI编程工具。采用统一技能结构（SKILL.md + 脚本 + 资源 + 示例），实现从设计到代码的自动化工作流，显著提升AI编程效率与质量。
summary.en: A standardized Agent Skills library for AI coding assistants, deeply integrated with Stitch design tool via MCP protocol. Provides core capabilities including design system documentation generation, prompt enhancement, and design-to-React conversion. Compatible with mainstream AI coding tools like Claude Code and Cursor. Features unified skill structure (SKILL.md + scripts + resources + examples) to automate design-to-code workflows and boost AI programming efficiency.

summary.zh: BookAlign 利用 embedding 与动态规划算法，精准对齐外语原著与正式译本的句段结构，重建成可直接对照阅读的双语 EPUB。支持段落级与句子级回写，完整保留原书目录、脚注等元素，特别适合日语小说配中文译本。可输出 JSON 对齐结果供调试，避免机翻质量风险，提升沉浸式阅读体验。
summary.en: BookAlign aligns foreign language EPUB originals with official translations using embedding-based semantic matching and dynamic programming algorithms to create bilingual ebooks for comparative reading. It supports both paragraph-level and inline sentence-level writeback modes, preserving original spine order, table of contents, footnotes, and other structural elements. Optimized for Japanese-to-Chinese novel alignment, it exports alignment results as JSON for debugging, eliminating machine translation risks and the hassle of switching between multiple reading applications.

metadata.name: osgameclones
metadata.description: Open Source Clones of Popular Games

summary.zh: 这是一个开源游戏克隆数据库网站，聚合各类经典游戏的开源复刻版本信息。采用YAML管理游戏数据，Python构建静态站点，支持Docker一键部署。开发者可通过PR或Issue提交游戏条目，GitHub Actions实现自动化构建部署。为游戏开发者提供学习参考和项目发现平台。
summary.en: This is an open-source game clones database website that aggregates information about open-source reimplementations of popular classic games. It uses YAML files for structured game data management, Python for static site generation, and supports Docker deployment. Developers can contribute new game entries via pull requests or GitHub issues, with GitHub Actions automating the build and deployment workflow. The platform serves as a valuable resource for game developers to discover open-source projects, reference implementations, and learn from existing game clones.

summary.zh: Vibe Coding指南是AI结对编程的实战手册，通过自然语言交互让开发者专注创意而非实现细节。项目提供多语言支持的完整工作流，涵盖从构思到部署的全链路最佳实践，助力开发者构建AI驱动的高效编程范式。
summary.en: Vibe Coding Guide is a practical handbook for AI pair programming, enabling developers to focus on creativity through natural language interaction. It offers a complete workflow with multilingual support, covering end-to-end best practices from ideation to deployment for building AI-driven development paradigms.

metadata.name: openclaw-search-skills
metadata.description: OpenClaw skills for deep search — multi-source search, content extraction, and structured research reports.

summary.zh: 为OpenClaw智能体提供生产级深度搜索能力，支持Brave/Exa/Tavily/Grok四源并行检索与意图感知策略。具备链式引用追踪能力，可对GitHub/论坛等线索节点深度挖掘。集成MinerU反爬解析，实现高保真内容提取与结构化研究报告生成，适用于技术调研与实时信息聚合场景。
summary.en: Provides production-grade deep search capabilities for OpenClaw agents, featuring parallel retrieval from four sources (Brave/Exa/Tavily/Grok) with intent-aware strategies. Enables chain-based reference tracking for in-depth exploration of GitHub/forum threads. Integrates MinerU anti-crawling resolution for high-fidelity content extraction and structured research reports, ideal for technical investigation and real-time information aggregation.

metadata.name: Claude-Code-Game-Studios
metadata.description: Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.

summary.zh: 该项目将Claude Code转变为完整的游戏开发工作室，包含48个专业化AI智能体、37个工作流程和8个自动化钩子。通过模拟真实游戏公司的三层管理架构（总监-部门主管-专员），为独立开发者提供结构化的团队协作体验。核心价值在于建立质量关卡、设计评审和标准化流程，确保从创意到发布的全程规范性，同时保持人类决策权。
summary.en: This project transforms Claude Code into a complete game development studio with 48 specialized AI agents, 37 workflow commands, and 8 automation hooks. It mirrors real studio hierarchy across three tiers (Directors, Department Leads, Specialists) using Anthropic's Opus/Sonnet/Haiku models. The system provides structured team collaboration for solo developers, featuring quality gates, design reviews, and enforced coding standards. It maintains human decision-making while adding automated validation, sprint planning, and documentation generation throughout the development lifecycle from brainstorming to launch.

metadata.name: Understand-Anything
metadata.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code, or knowledge base (Karpathy LLM wiki), into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

summary.zh: Understand Anything 是一款 Claude Code 插件，通过多智能体流水线将任意代码库转化为可交互的知识图谱。它结合 LLM 与静态分析技术，自动提取文件、函数、类及依赖关系，生成可视化架构图并提供自然语言问答功能。适用于开发者快速上手、产品经理理解系统架构、AI 辅助代码审查等场景，显著降低代码理解成本，提升协作效率。
summary.en: Understand Anything is a Claude Code plugin that transforms any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph via a multi-agent pipeline. Combining LLM intelligence with static analysis, it automatically extracts files, functions, classes, and dependencies, generating visual architecture maps with natural language Q&A capabilities. It accelerates developer onboarding, enables product managers to understand system architecture without coding knowledge, and assists AI-powered code reviews, significantly reducing code comprehension costs and improving team collaboration efficiency.

metadata.name: liftkit
metadata.description: Components from design to production

summary.zh: LiftKit是一个面向设计师的UI框架，通过数学公式自动实现设计最佳实践。核心提供缩放、间距和色彩的系统化解决方案，确保视觉对称、比例平衡和色彩平滑过渡。目前仅支持Next.js，正处于重写阶段以符合现代开发标准。项目由兼职维护者开发，暂不建议生产环境使用。其平台无关的设计系统可无缝集成到现代前端工作流中。
summary.en: LiftKit is a UI framework for perfectionists that automatically enforces design best practices through mathematical formulas for scaling, spacing, and color. It ensures optical symmetry, balanced proportions, and smooth color ramps without manual effort. Currently Next.js-only, it's being rewritten with Base UI primitives to meet modern standards. The designer-built system is platform-agnostic and aims to make developers better designers. Maintained by part-time contributors, it's not production-ready yet but offers a robust foundation for design-system-driven development with community-driven expansion and Tailwind integration efforts.

metadata.name: pdf-craft
metadata.description: PDF craft can convert PDF files into various other formats. This project will focus on processing PDF files of scanned books.

summary.zh: PDF Craft 是基于 DeepSeek OCR 的本地 PDF 转换工具，专注于扫描书籍的数字化处理。支持 GPU 加速，可将 PDF 转换为 Markdown 或 EPUB 格式，自动识别文档结构、提取正文、过滤页眉页脚，并正确处理表格、公式和脚注。v1.0.0 后完全本地化，无需网络请求，性能显著提升。
summary.en: PDF Craft is a high-performance local PDF conversion tool built on DeepSeek OCR technology, specifically designed for digitizing scanned books and documents. The tool leverages GPU acceleration to efficiently convert PDF files into structured Markdown or EPUB formats while preserving document integrity. Key features include automatic document structure recognition, intelligent extraction of main text content, removal of interfering elements like headers and footers, and proper handling of complex elements such as tables, mathematical formulas, and footnotes. Starting from version 1.0.0, PDF Craft operates entirely offline without network dependencies, eliminating previous limitations of LLM-based text correction while delivering substantially improved conversion speed and reliability for academic and technical documents.

metadata.name: translate-book
metadata.description: Claude Code skill that translates entire books (PDF/DOCX/EPUB) into any language using parallel subagents

summary.zh: 该项目是基于Claude Code的电子书翻译工具，采用并行子代理架构实现整本书的高效翻译。支持PDF/DOCX/EPUB输入，自动分块、并行翻译、验证合并，输出多格式文档。核心技术包括8并发子代理、SHA-256清单验证和断点续传，有效解决长文本上下文溢出问题。
summary.en: This project is a Claude Code-based ebook translation tool that uses parallel subagents for efficient whole-book translation. It supports PDF/DOCX/EPUB input, automatically chunking, parallel translating, validating, and merging into multiple formats. Key features include 8 concurrent subagents, SHA-256 manifest validation, and resumable runs to solve long-text context overflow.

metadata.name: meihua-yishu
metadata.description: 梅花易數 - 適用於 Claude、ChatGPT、Gemini、DeepSeek 等 AI/LLM 的占卜技能

summary.zh: 该项目将传统梅花易数占卜术转化为AI大模型技能，为Claude、ChatGPT等提供决策辅助能力。核心价值在于将千年易学智慧转化为结构化思考框架，帮助企业家和个人在复杂选择中分析现状、预测时机。支持时间、数字、声音等多模态占卜方法，集成体用分析、应期预测等核心算法，是传统文化与AI技术融合的创新实践。
summary.en: This project transforms the traditional Meihua Yishu divination system into an AI skill for LLM platforms including Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and DeepSeek. It reimagines ancient Chinese wisdom as a structured decision-making framework for modern complex choices. The system supports multiple casting methods (time, number, sound, color) and provides Ti-Yong analysis, timing prediction, and strategic guidance. By integrating traditional philosophy with AI capabilities, it offers entrepreneurs and individuals a unique tool for multi-perspective situation analysis and adaptive planning.

metadata.name: inkwell
metadata.description: Markdown editor that gets out of your way. Lightweight, fast, portable. First release of https://4worlds.dev

summary.zh: Inkwell是基于Rust+Tauri v2构建的轻量级Markdown编辑器，主打离线运行与极速启动（<1秒）。支持Mermaid图表、LaTeX公式、GitHub Flavored Markdown，提供4种主题与专注模式。100%本地存储，零遥测，安装包仅5-12MB。适用于跨平台写作，免费版功能完整，Pro版解锁PDF/HTML导出。
summary.en: Inkwell is a sovereign Markdown editor built with Rust+Tauri v2, delivering <1s startup and offline-first operation. Features Mermaid diagrams, LaTeX math, GitHub Flavored Markdown, 4 themes, focus mode, and version history. 100% local storage, zero telemetry, 5-12MB footprint. Cross-platform for distraction-free writing. Free forever, Pro adds PDF/HTML export.

metadata.name: twitter-cli
metadata.description: A CLI for Twitter/X — feed, bookmarks, and user timeline in terminal

summary.zh: 无需API密钥的Twitter/X终端客户端，支持浏览时间线、书签、搜索及发帖等完整功能。采用浏览器Cookie认证与TLS指纹模拟技术绕过检测，提供结构化JSON/YAML输出，专为AI智能体与自动化脚本设计，支持代理与速率限制规避。
summary.en: Twitter/X CLI bypassing API keys via browser cookies and TLS spoofing. Full read/write operations with structured JSON/YAML output optimized for AI agents and automation scripts.

metadata.name: terraink
metadata.description: Terraink: The Cartographic Poster Engine that creates unique and customizable map posters

summary.zh: TerraInk 是一款基于 OpenStreetMap 数据的地图海报生成引擎。用户可通过地理编码搜索全球任意地点，自定义配色主题、地图图层和字体样式，并导出高分辨率 PNG 打印文件。采用 Bun+React+TypeScript 全栈技术，集成 MapLibre 实现矢量地图渲染，为设计师和地理爱好者提供便捷的创意地图制作工具。
summary.en: TerraInk is a cartographic poster engine that generates unique, customizable map posters using real OpenStreetMap data. The platform offers smart geocoding for global locations, a rich theme system with dozens of curated color palettes, detailed map layer controls for roads, water, parks and buildings, and flexible typography options with Google Fonts integration. Built on a modern Bun+React+TypeScript stack with MapLibre for vector tile rendering, it enables users to export print-ready high-resolution PNG posters at any dimension, serving as an accessible creative tool for designers, geography enthusiasts, and anyone seeking personalized map art.

metadata.name: editor
metadata.description: Create and share 3D architectural projects.

summary.zh: 基于 Web 的 3D 建筑编辑器，提供浏览器内专业级 BIM 编辑能力。采用 React Three Fiber + WebGPU 实现高性能渲染，Turborepo  monorepo 架构分离核心逻辑与渲染层，Zustand 分层状态管理配合 IndexedDB 持久化与 Zundo 撤销重做，支持建筑模型的节点化数据管理与实时空间查询。
summary.en: A web-based 3D building editor delivering professional BIM capabilities in-browser. Built on React Three Fiber + WebGPU for high-performance rendering, Turborepo monorepo architecture separates core logic from rendering, with layered Zustand state management, IndexedDB persistence, and Zundo undo/redo. Enables node-based building data management and real-time spatial queries.

summary.zh: 该插件将微信消息通道深度集成至Claude Code，开发者可直接在终端收发微信消息。采用本地MCP服务器与HTTP长轮询技术，无需公网Webhook。通过二维码登录和配对码验证实现安全认证，并针对微信API的context_token机制优化，支持双向消息同步，无缝衔接开发工作流。
summary.en: This plugin deeply integrates WeChat messaging channels into Claude Code, allowing developers to send and receive WeChat messages directly in the terminal without switching contexts. It employs a local MCP server with HTTP long-polling technology, eliminating the need for public webhooks. Features include QR code login, pairing code verification, and optimized handling of WeChat's context_token mechanism for bidirectional message synchronization, seamlessly integrating into developer workflows.

summary.zh: JKVideo 是一款基于 React Native 和 Expo 构建的高颜值第三方 B 站客户端，支持 Android、iOS 和 Web 三端。核心亮点包括完整的 DASH 视频播放系统（4K HDR）、实时弹幕同步、纯 TypeScript 实现的 WBI 签名算法，以及 Zustand 状态管理。提供扫码登录、下载管理和局域网分享功能，是跨平台视频应用开发的优秀实践。
summary.en: JKVideo is a high-quality third-party Bilibili client built with React Native and Expo, supporting Android, iOS, and Web platforms. Key features include complete DASH video playback (4K HDR), real-time danmaku synchronization, pure TypeScript WBI signing algorithm, and Zustand state management. It offers QR code login, download management, and LAN sharing capabilities, serving as an excellent example of cross-platform video application development.

metadata.name: codex-console
metadata.description: codex-console 是一个集成化控制台项目，支持任务管理、批量处理、数据导出、自动上传、日志查看与打包支持。

summary.zh: codex-console 是专为解决 OpenAI 注册链路不稳定性而生的增强版控制台。它修复了 Sentinel POW 验证、拆分注册登录流程、优化验证码处理，支持批量账号管理、Web UI 操作、多邮箱接码及 PostgreSQL。提供跨平台打包与 Docker 部署，是稳定获取 OpenAI Token 的自动化运维利器。
summary.en: codex-console is an enhanced management console designed to address OpenAI registration instability. It fixes Sentinel POW verification, separates registration/login flows, and optimizes email verification handling. Featuring batch account management, Web UI, multi-email support, PostgreSQL, and cross-platform deployment, it's a robust automation tool for stable OpenAI token acquisition.

metadata.name: maths-cs-ai-compendium
metadata.description: Become a cracked AI/ML Research Engineer

summary.zh: 这是一个面向AI/ML研究工程师的系统性学习资料库，涵盖数学基础、计算机科学和人工智能核心领域。内容强调直觉理解而非公式堆砌，从向量、矩阵、概率论等基础到Transformer、多模态学习、GPU编程等前沿技术。基于作者帮助多人成功入职DeepMind、OpenAI等顶级公司的实战经验，提供从理论到工程实践的一站式知识体系，适合面试准备和深度技术学习。
summary.en: This is a systematic learning compendium for AI/ML Research Engineers, covering mathematics fundamentals, computer science, and core AI domains. Emphasizing intuitive understanding over dense notation, it spans from vectors, matrices, probability to cutting-edge topics like Transformers, multimodal learning, and GPU programming. Based on proven success in preparing candidates for top AI companies like DeepMind and OpenAI, it offers a comprehensive knowledge bridge from theory to engineering practice.

metadata.name: litellm
metadata.description: Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

summary.zh: LiteLLM 是一个统一的大语言模型网关和 Python SDK，可将 100+ 种 LLM API 转换为 OpenAI 格式调用。提供代理服务器模式，集成成本追踪、负载均衡、安全护栏和日志监控等企业级功能。支持 Bedrock、Azure、Anthropic 等主流平台，简化多模型管理和切换，适用于需要统一 AI 接口、成本控制和生产级部署的场景。
