summary.en: LiteLLM is a unified LLM gateway and Python SDK that standardizes 100+ model APIs into OpenAI format. It offers proxy server mode with enterprise features including cost tracking, load balancing, guardrails, and logging. Supporting major platforms like Bedrock, Azure, and Anthropic, it simplifies multi-model management and switching for production deployments requiring unified AI interfaces and cost control.

metadata.name: isomiddleearth
metadata.description: An isometric world‑builder set in Tolkien’s Middle‑earth, where you create and shape your own landscapes inspired by its iconic lands and lore.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于托尔金中土世界的等距地图构建工具，支持7大种族领地和混合模式。采用Next.js 16、React 19和TypeScript 5技术栈，提供3x3至20x20的网格编辑、6类地形瓦片、角色叠加和拖拽绘制功能。支持PNG/JSON导入导出、撤销操作、本地存储和社区地图共享。适用于游戏原型设计、粉丝创作和地理可视化场景，具备深度链接加载和瓦片回退机制。
summary.en: An isometric map builder set in Tolkien's Middle-earth featuring 7 distinct realms and mixed-mode support. Built with Next.js 16, React 19, and TypeScript 5, it offers grid-based editing (3x3 to 20x20), 6 tile categories, character overlays, and click/drag painting. Key features include PNG/JSON import/export, undo support, Zustand-powered localStorage persistence, and community collections. Ideal for game prototyping, fan creations, and geographic visualization, with deep-link loading and automatic tile fallback mechanisms.

metadata.name: last30days-skill
metadata.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

summary.zh: 这是一个Claude Code插件，AI智能体技能，自动抓取过去30天内Reddit、X、YouTube等8大社交平台及网页内容，通过多信号质量排名算法和跨源收敛检测，生成基于真实引用的趋势摘要。支持对比模式分析技术选型，自动保存研究简报，帮助开发者快速掌握AI领域最新动态。
summary.en: A Claude Code plugin that automatically researches topics across 8 social platforms including Reddit, X, YouTube, Bluesky, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, and Polymarket from the last 30 days. It employs multi-signal quality-ranked relevance scoring, cross-platform convergence detection, and composite ranking algorithms to synthesize grounded narratives with real citations. Features include comparative mode for side-by-side analysis, automatic saving of research briefings, smart subreddit discovery, and per-project configuration. Helps developers stay current with AI trends and community discussions.

metadata.name: chandra
metadata.description: OCR model that handles complex tables, forms, handwriting with full layout.

summary.zh: Chandra OCR 2 是业界领先的文档智能模型，专精于复杂表格、手写体及数学公式的精准识别。支持90+语言，完美保留原始布局，输出HTML/Markdown/JSON结构化数据。提供本地(HuggingFace)与云端(vLLM)双模式，在手写表单、技术文档等场景表现卓越，是企业级文档自动化的核心引擎。
summary.en: Chandra OCR 2 is a state-of-the-art document intelligence model excelling at complex tables, handwriting, and mathematical formulas. Supporting 90+ languages, it preserves full layout fidelity while outputting structured HTML/Markdown/JSON. With dual inference modes (local HuggingFace and remote vLLM), it delivers exceptional performance for forms, technical documents, and multilingual content, serving as a core engine for enterprise document automation.

metadata.name: VibeVoice
metadata.description: Open-Source Frontier Voice AI

summary.zh: 微软开源的前沿语音AI框架，提供语音识别与合成两大核心能力。VibeVoice-ASR可单通道处理60分钟长音频，输出带说话人分离和时间戳的结构化转录，支持50+语言与vLLM加速。VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B支持流式文本转语音，具备多语言发音人。已集成Hugging Face Transformers，适用于语音输入法、会议转录等场景。
summary.en: Microsoft's open-source frontier voice AI framework delivers two breakthrough models. VibeVoice-ASR handles 60-minute long-form audio in a single pass, generating structured transcriptions with speaker identification, timestamps, and content across 50+ languages, featuring vLLM acceleration and Hugging Face integration. VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B provides streaming text-to-speech with experimental multilingual voices. The framework enables voice-powered input methods, automated transcription, and real-time speech generation applications.

metadata.name: one-node
metadata.description: 万物皆可搭节点 | Everything can be a proxy node

summary.zh: one-node 是一个极简化的网络代理节点部署工具，核心理念是'万物皆可搭节点'。它允许将任意设备快速转换为功能完整的代理服务器，支持多种协议和平台。通过轻量级架构设计，实现一键部署和灵活配置，适用于个人隐私保护、企业内网访问、网络加速等场景，大幅降低代理节点搭建的技术门槛和运维成本。
summary.en: one-node is a minimalist network proxy node deployment tool embodying the philosophy 'Everything can be a proxy node'. It enables rapid conversion of any device into a fully functional proxy server, supporting multiple protocols and platforms. With its lightweight architecture, it offers one-click deployment and flexible configuration for scenarios including personal privacy protection, corporate intranet access, and network acceleration, significantly reducing technical barriers and operational costs.

metadata.name: codeg
metadata.description: Aggregate and browse AI coding agent sessions (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, etc.) in one place. Desktop app, self-hosted server, or Docker.

summary.zh: Codeg是企业级多AI编码代理统一工作空间，整合Claude Code、Cline等本地AI工具。提供桌面应用、独立服务器和Docker三种部署模式，支持浏览器远程访问。核心特性包括对话聚合、并行git worktree开发、MCP/Skills管理、Telegram/Lark聊天集成，以及可视化项目脚手架。通过Tauri和Next.js构建，实现跨平台开发体验。
summary.en: Codeg is an enterprise-grade unified workspace for local AI coding agents, integrating Claude Code, Cline, Gemini CLI and more. It provides desktop, server, and Docker deployment modes with browser-based remote access. Features include conversation aggregation, parallel git worktree development, MCP/Skills management, Telegram/Lark chat integration, and visual project scaffolding. Built on Tauri and Next.js, it offers a seamless cross-platform development environment.

metadata.name: how-claude-code-works
metadata.description: Deep dive into Claude Code internals — architecture, agent loop, context engineering, and more. / 深入解析 Claude Code 源码：架构、Agent 循环、上下文工程、工具系统等

summary.zh: 这个项目深入解析Claude Code的50万行TypeScript源码，揭示其百万级DAU生产系统的架构设计。核心亮点包括：4级渐进式上下文压缩解决token限制，5层纵深防御保障安全执行，工具预执行与全链路流式输出实现极致性能，以及静默恢复机制提升用户体验。适合AI Agent开发者和架构师学习。
summary.en: This project provides a comprehensive analysis of Claude Code's 500,000-line TypeScript source codebase, revealing the engineering architecture powering this leading AI programming agent. It dissects critical production-grade designs: 4-level progressive context compression managing token constraints, 5-layer security system preventing dangerous operations, tool pre-execution with full streaming pipeline for perceived performance, and silent recovery mechanisms with 7 retry strategies. The 12-chapter documentation covers agent loops, context engineering, and tool orchestration, serving as a valuable resource for developers building production AI agents.

metadata.name: awesome-ai-devtools
metadata.description: Curated list of AI-powered developer tools.

summary.zh: 该仓库系统性地整理了AI驱动的开发者工具生态，覆盖智能IDE、终端代理到自动化CI/CD的全链路场景。核心价值在于通过LLM增强代码生成、重构与调试效率，并引入多智能体编排和沙箱隔离技术实现安全自治。典型应用包括Cursor/Windsurf等AI-Native编辑器、PR审查机器人及数据库智能助手，是开发者迈向AI编程时代的导航地图。
summary.en: This repository curates an ecosystem of AI-powered developer tools spanning intelligent IDEs, terminal agents, and automated CI/CD pipelines. It enhances coding efficiency through LLM-driven generation, refactoring, and debugging, while introducing multi-agent orchestration and sandboxing for secure autonomy. Key applications include AI-native editors like Cursor/Windsurf, PR review bots, and database assistants, serving as a roadmap for developers transitioning to AI-augmented programming.

metadata.name: anti-distill
metadata.description: 反蒸馏 Skill：清洗你被迫写的 Skill 文件，看起来完整，核心知识留给自己。Anti-distillation for employee Skills.

summary.zh: anti-distill 是一款职场知识保护工具，针对企业要求员工编写 AI Skill 文档的场景，通过智能识别内容价值并自动替换核心经验为通用表述，生成结构完整但知识空洞的交差版本，同时保留完整私人备份。支持三档清洗强度与多格式文档，作为 Claude/OpenClaw 插件运行，有效防止个人核心竞争力被过度萃取。
summary.en: anti-distill is a workplace knowledge protection tool designed for scenarios where companies require employees to write AI Skill documents. It intelligently identifies content value and automatically replaces core experiences with generic statements, generating a structurally complete but knowledge-hollow version for submission while preserving a full private backup. Supporting three dilution levels and multiple document formats, it operates as a Claude/OpenClaw plugin to effectively prevent over-extraction of personal core competencies.

metadata.name: oxideterm
metadata.description: All-in-one terminal workspace — local shells, SSH, SFTP, remote IDE, AI agent, and file manager in a single native binary. Built with Tauri 2 and pure Rust SSH (no OpenSSL). Smart reconnect, MCP, RAG, plugins, 30+ themes, 11 languages.

summary.zh: OxideTerm 是一款基于 Tauri 2 和纯 Rust SSH 实现的一体化终端工作台，将本地 Shell、SSH、SFTP、远程 IDE 和 AI 代理集成于单一原生二进制文件中。其核心技术亮点包括智能重连、连接复用、MCP 协议与 RAG 知识库的 AI 集成，以及无 Electron、无 OpenSSL 的轻量化架构，为开发者和运维人员提供高效、稳定的跨平台远程开发体验。
summary.en: OxideTerm is an all-in-one terminal workspace built with Tauri 2 and pure Rust SSH, integrating local shells, SSH, SFTP, remote IDE, and AI agent into a single native binary. Key technical highlights include smart reconnection, connection multiplexing, MCP protocol with RAG-based AI integration, and a lightweight architecture without Electron or OpenSSL, delivering efficient and stable cross-platform remote development experience for developers and operations teams.

metadata.name: awesome-design-md
metadata.description: A collection of DESIGN.md files inspired by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

summary.zh: 精选55+个知名网站的DESIGN.md设计系统文档，为AI编码代理提供纯文本规范以生成像素级完美UI。完整定义视觉主题、色彩、排版、组件样式及响应式行为，无需Figma或JSON等复杂工具，显著提升AI驱动前端开发的效率与一致性。
summary.en: A curated collection of 55+ DESIGN.md files from popular websites, capturing complete design systems in plain text. Enables AI coding agents to generate pixel-perfect UIs by defining visual themes, colors, typography, components, and responsive behavior. Eliminates Figma exports or JSON schemas, streamlining AI-powered frontend development with LLM-friendly markdown format.

metadata.name: Shadowbroker
metadata.description: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

summary.zh: ShadowBroker是实时多域开源情报平台，聚合60+公开数据源包括航班ADS-B、船舶AIS、卫星遥测及地震信息。基于Next.js与MapLibre GL构建交互式地图，支持35+数据层切换与右键地理情报查询。采用自托管架构确保隐私，面向分析师提供全球威胁监控与研究工作。
summary.en: ShadowBroker is a real-time OSINT platform aggregating 60+ public data sources including aircraft ADS-B, maritime AIS, satellite telemetry and seismic events. Built with Next.js and MapLibre GL, it provides 35+ interactive data layers and geospatial analysis tools. Self-hosted deployment ensures privacy for analysts tracking global threats and conducting open-source intelligence research.

metadata.name: QwenPaw
metadata.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.

summary.zh: QwenPaw是自主可控的个人AI助手，支持本地或云端部署确保数据隐私。提供日程管理、PDF/Office文档处理、新闻摘要等内置技能，支持自定义扩展。具备多智能体协作能力，可创建独立代理处理不同任务。跨平台连接多种聊天应用，技能决定功能边界，无供应商锁定风险。
summary.en: QwenPaw is a personal AI assistant under your control, deployable locally or in the cloud to ensure data privacy. It features built-in skills including scheduling, PDF/Office document processing, and news digests, with support for custom extensions. Enables multi-agent collaboration by creating independent agents for different tasks. Connects across multiple chat platforms with extensible capabilities and no vendor lock-in.

metadata.name: hotmail_register
metadata.description: hotmail register

summary.zh: 这是一个基于Python的Outlook/Hotmail自动化注册工具，采用ruyiPage库驱动Firefox浏览器实现全流程自动化。支持批量注册、代理IP、验证码服务集成及无头模式，可生成虚假注册信息并保存账号凭证。适用于测试研究等非商业场景，采用PolyForm非商用许可证。
summary.en: This Python automation tool leverages ruyiPage library to control Firefox browser for fully automated Outlook/Hotmail account registration. Key features include bulk account creation with configurable delays, proxy server support for IP rotation, integration with 2captcha for automated captcha solving, headless mode operation, and fake identity generation using Faker library. Designed specifically for testing and research purposes under PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0 license, it automatically saves credentials to text files with comprehensive logging and screenshot capture capabilities.

metadata.name: architecture-diagram-generator
metadata.description: Generate beautiful dark-themed system architecture diagrams as standalone HTML/SVG files. Works as a Claude AI skill.

summary.zh: 通过Claude AI技能，将自然语言描述自动转换为专业深色主题架构图。输出独立HTML文件，无需设计工具，支持实时迭代修改。适用于系统设计评审、技术文档可视化，显著提升架构沟通效率与团队协作体验。
summary.en: The Architecture Diagram Generator is a Claude AI skill that automatically converts natural language descriptions into professional, dark-themed system architecture diagrams. It outputs self-contained HTML files that can be opened in any browser without specialized software. Users can easily iterate on designs through conversational prompts, adding components or adjusting layouts instantly. This tool is ideal for system design reviews, technical documentation, and architecture presentations, dramatically improving communication efficiency and team collaboration while eliminating the need for manual diagramming tools and design expertise.

metadata.name: tegaki
metadata.description: Handwriting animation for the web. Supports any font or text.

summary.zh: Tegaki 是一款纯前端手写体动画库，可将任意字体转化为逐笔书写的 SVG 动画。无需手动绘制路径，零原生依赖，支持 React、Vue、Svelte 等主流框架及 Web Components。内置 Caveat 等 4 种手写字体，提供在线生成器定制专属字库，适用于网页标题、教育展示、营销页面等场景，轻松实现自然流畅的手写效果。
summary.en: Tegaki is a pure frontend handwriting animation library that converts any font into stroke-by-stroke SVG animations. Zero native dependencies, no manual path authoring required. Supports all major frameworks including React, Vue, Svelte, and Web Components. Includes 4 built-in handwriting fonts with an online generator for custom font bundles. Perfect for web headings, educational displays, and marketing pages requiring natural handwriting effects.

metadata.name: PLFM_RADAR
metadata.description: Open-source, low-cost 10.5 GHz PLFM phased array RADAR system

summary.zh: AERIS-10是一款开源低成本10.5GHz相控阵雷达系统，提供3km和20km两种探测距离版本。系统采用脉冲线性调频(PLFM)技术，支持±45°电子波束扫描，集成FPGA实现脉冲压缩、多普勒处理、MTI和CFAR等先进信号处理。模块化设计包含电源管理、频率合成和射频主板，搭载Python GUI地图界面和GPS/IMU实时校正。面向无人机开发、科研教育和雷达爱好者，提供完整的硬件原理图、PCB布局和开源软件，旨在降低相控阵雷达技术门槛。
summary.en: AERIS-10 is an open-source, low-cost 10.5 GHz phased array radar system with 3km and 20km range variants. It features Pulse Linear Frequency Modulation (PLFM) and ±45° electronic beam steering. The FPGA handles advanced signal processing including pulse compression, Doppler FFT, MTI, and CFAR. Its modular architecture comprises power management, frequency synthesis, and RF main boards, complemented by a Python GUI with map integration and GPS/IMU support. Designed for drone developers, researchers, and radar enthusiasts, it provides complete schematics and software to democratize phased array radar technology.

metadata.name: agency-agents
metadata.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供一套生产就绪的AI代理团队，涵盖前端、后端、移动开发等专业领域。每个代理具备独特人格、专业工作流和可量化交付物，支持Claude Code、GitHub Copilot等主流工具。通过标准化提示工程与自动化脚本，将通用AI助手转化为具备领域专长的虚拟员工，实现软件开发全流程的智能化升级。
summary.en: This repository delivers a production-ready AI agent team covering frontend, backend, mobile development, and more. Each agent features unique personality, specialized workflows, and measurable deliverables, compatible with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and other mainstream tools. By standardizing prompt engineering with automation scripts, it transforms generic AI assistants into domain-specialized virtual employees, enabling intelligent upgrades across the entire software development lifecycle.

metadata.name: Freebuff2API
metadata.description: 🚀 OpenAI-compatible Freebuff proxy with dynamic free-agent tracking, token rotation, and ready-to-use Docker deployment.

summary.zh: Freebuff2API 是一个 OpenAI 兼容代理服务器，将 Freebuff 免费 AI 模型转换为标准 OpenAI API 格式。支持多账号 token 自动轮换提升调用额度，动态模拟官方 SDK 指纹规避检测，并提供 Docker 快速部署。适用于开发者在不更换现有 OpenAI SDK 代码的前提下，零成本调用 Freebuff 的 AI 模型服务。
summary.en: Freebuff2API is an OpenAI-compatible proxy server that transforms Freebuff's free AI models into standard OpenAI API endpoints. It features automatic multi-token rotation for higher throughput, dynamic client fingerprinting to mimic official SDK behavior, and Docker deployment. Enables developers to use Freebuff's AI services with any OpenAI-compatible client without code changes.

metadata.name: auto-subs
metadata.description: Instantly generate AI-powered subtitles on your device. Works standalone or connects to DaVinci Resolve.

summary.zh: AutoSubs 是一款基于 Tauri 框架的跨平台 AI 字幕生成工具，本地运行 Whisper 等模型实现高精度语音转录。支持说话人分离、多语言翻译，可导出 SRT 或直接导入 DaVinci Resolve 进行高级样式定制。无需云端订阅，保障数据隐私，为视频创作者提供高效、可定制的自动化字幕解决方案。
summary.en: AutoSubs is a cross-platform desktop application that generates AI-powered subtitles locally on user devices without cloud dependencies. Built on Tauri framework with React frontend and Rust backend, it leverages state-of-the-art models including Whisper, Parakeet and Pyannote for accurate transcription, speaker diarization and translation. The tool offers one-click export to SRT or direct integration with DaVinci Resolve, featuring per-speaker styling and real-time editing capabilities. Designed for video creators and post-production professionals, it delivers privacy-preserving, efficient subtitle workflows with full customization options.

metadata.name: WebAI2API
metadata.description: WebAI2API: 基于 Camoufox 的网页 AI 转 API 工具，支持 LMArena/Gemini等，多窗口并发与账号隔离。 | Web AI to OpenAI API via Camoufox. Supports LMArena/Gemini and more, multi-window concurrency & account isolation.

summary.zh: WebAI2API是基于Camoufox的网页AI服务转API工具，支持LMArena/Gemini/ChatGPT等20+平台。通过拟人化操作模拟规避检测，提供OpenAI格式接口，支持多窗口并发与账号级浏览器隔离，内置任务队列和故障转移机制，配备可视化管理界面，实现高效稳定的AI服务调用。
summary.en: WebAI2API converts web-based AI services (LMArena/Gemini/ChatGPT etc.) into OpenAI-compatible APIs using Camoufox. It simulates human-like interactions to bypass detection, supports multi-window concurrency with account isolation, and includes task queuing, failover mechanisms, plus a web management interface for stable AI service integration.

metadata.name: manifest
metadata.description: Smart Model Routing for Personal AI Agents. Cut Costs up to 70% 🦞👧🦚

summary.zh: Manifest 是为个人AI代理设计的智能模型路由中间件，可节省高达70%的LLM调用成本。它通过23维评分算法（<2ms）自动评估请求复杂度，将简单任务路由至廉价模型，复杂问题导向高性能模型。支持自动故障转移、预算管控和可视化监控，适用于OpenClaw、Hermes等AI代理。提供Docker自托管和云服务两种部署方式，无需修改现有代码即可集成。
summary.en: Manifest is a smart model router for personal AI agents that cuts LLM costs by up to 70%. It sits between agents and providers, using a 23-dimension scoring algorithm (under 2ms) to route requests to the cheapest capable model tier—simple, standard, complex, or reasoning. Key features include automatic fallbacks, budget controls, and a monitoring dashboard. Designed for agents like OpenClaw and Hermes, it supports both cloud and Docker self-hosted deployment without code changes.

metadata.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
metadata.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

summary.zh: 基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察，提供CLAUDE.md模板优化Claude Code行为。通过四大原则：先思考后编码、简单优先、精准修改、目标驱动执行，解决LLM过度工程化、随意假设、修改无关代码等问题。适用于AI编程助手提示工程优化。
summary.en: A CLAUDE.md template that improves Claude Code behavior by applying Andrej Karpathy's four principles: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, and Goal-Driven Execution. Addresses LLM coding pitfalls like overengineering, wrong assumptions, and unnecessary modifications. Optimizes AI coding assistant performance.

metadata.name: thunderbolt
metadata.description: AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.

summary.zh: Thunderbolt 是 Mozilla 开源的跨平台 AI 客户端，主打'AI You Control'理念。支持本地部署，兼容 Ollama、llama.cpp 等本地推理引擎及 OpenAI 兼容 API，彻底摆脱供应商锁定。提供桌面、移动端全覆盖，面向企业客户，支持私有化部署，强调数据主权与安全可控，目前处于安全审计阶段，即将企业就绪。
summary.en: Thunderbolt is Mozilla's open-source, cross-platform AI client championing 'AI You Control' with full vendor lock-in elimination. It supports local deployment, integrates with Ollama, llama.cpp and OpenAI-compatible APIs, ensuring data ownership. Available across desktop and mobile platforms, it targets enterprise on-premise deployment with enhanced security and privacy, currently undergoing security audit for production readiness.

metadata.name: huashu-design
metadata.description: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic

summary.zh: 华数设计是一款HTML原生的AI设计技能，可将文本描述直接转化为可交付的生产级设计稿。支持Claude Code等主流AI编程助手，3-30分钟内生成可点击的App原型、演讲幻灯片、60秒动画及信息图。核心亮点包括：20种内置设计哲学与5维评审体系确保专业品质；Motion Design引擎支持时间轴动画与MP4/GIF导出；HTML幻灯片可转为可编辑PPTX；Tweaks面板实现参数化实时调整。无需Figma插件，纯文本交互，输出印刷级排版与跨平台HTML文件。
summary.en: Huashu Design is an HTML-native AI design skill that transforms text prompts into production-ready deliverables within 3-30 minutes. Compatible with Claude Code and other AI agents, it generates clickable App prototypes, presentation slides, motion graphics, and infographics. Key features include: 20 built-in design philosophies with 5-dimension expert review system; Motion Design engine supporting timeline animation and MP4/GIF export; HTML slides convertible to editable PPTX; Tweaks panel for parametric adjustments. No Figma plugins needed—pure text interface delivers print-quality layouts and cross-platform HTML output.

metadata.name: GitHub-CodeWiki-Jumper
metadata.description: 一键从 GitHub 跳转到 CodeWiki & DeepWiki & Zread 的油猴脚本 |  A one-click Tampermonkey script for jumping from GitHub to CodeWiki & DeepWiki & Zread

summary.zh: 这是一个油猴脚本，在 GitHub 仓库页面添加 CodeWiki、DeepWiki 和 Zread 的一键跳转链接。通过无缝集成 GitHub UI，开发者可快速访问代码智能分析平台，提升代码探索与研究效率。支持 Tampermonkey 等主流用户脚本管理器，安装即用，显著优化开源项目浏览体验。
summary.en: A Tampermonkey userscript that adds one-click jump links to CodeWiki, DeepWiki, and Zread on GitHub repository pages. Seamlessly integrated into GitHub UI, it enables developers to quickly access code intelligence platforms, streamlining code exploration and research. Compatible with major userscript managers, it installs instantly and significantly optimizes open-source project browsing efficiency.

metadata.name: 2fa
metadata.description: Two Factor Authentication

summary.zh: 基于Cloudflare Workers的免费两步验证密钥管理系统，支持TOTP/HOTP自动生成与多种方式添加密钥（扫码/图片识别/拖拽）。采用AES-GCM 256位加密存储，支持批量导入导出及WebDAV/S3等多平台备份同步。PWA离线可用，响应式设计适配全平台，提供安全便捷的身份认证管理方案。
summary.en: A free two-factor authentication key management system based on Cloudflare Workers, supporting automatic TOTP/HOTP generation and multiple key addition methods (scanning/image recognition/drag-and-drop). It uses AES-GCM 256-bit encryption for storage, supports batch import/export and backup synchronization across platforms like WebDAV/S3. PWA offline capability and responsive design adapt to all platforms, providing a secure and convenient identity authentication management solution.

metadata.name: browser-harness
metadata.description: Browser Harness | Self-healing harness that enables LLMs to complete any task.

summary.zh: Browser Harness 是一个极简的自愈式浏览器控制层，直接基于 Chrome DevTools Protocol 构建。它赋予大语言模型完全自由来完成任意浏览器任务，当遇到缺失功能时智能体可实时编写代码。仅约592行Python代码，无框架约束，支持远程浏览器和领域技能学习，实现真正的无人值守浏览器自动化。
summary.en: Browser Harness is a minimalist, self-healing browser control layer built directly on Chrome DevTools Protocol. It gives LLMs complete freedom to accomplish any browser task, with agents capable of writing missing code mid-execution. At just ~592 lines of Python, it eliminates framework constraints while supporting remote browsers and domain-specific skill learning for true unattended browser automation.

metadata.name: Kami
metadata.description: 👩‍🚒 Good content deserves good paper.

summary.zh: Kami是一个AI驱动的文档设计系统，通过自然语言指令生成印刷品级质量的文档。采用温暖羊皮纸画布与墨水蓝单色调，提供单页介绍、简历、作品集、幻灯片等六种模板，支持中英文自动适配。作为Claude/Codex技能集成，无需代码即可创建设计精良的商业文档，解决传统文档设计两极分化问题。
summary.en: Kami is an AI-powered document design system that generates print-quality documents through natural language commands. Featuring a warm parchment canvas with ink-blue accent, it offers six templates including one-pagers, resumes, portfolios, and slides with automatic Chinese/English adaptation. Integrated as a Claude/Codex skill, it enables zero-code creation of polished business documents, addressing the two failure modes of generic corporate gray or flashy SaaS styling.

metadata.name: Awesome-AI4Med
metadata.description: A curated list of medical LLMs, multimodal systems, datasets, benchmarks, and more. 🏥

summary.zh: 系统性整理医疗人工智能研究资源的精选仓库，涵盖医疗大语言模型、多模态系统、数据集与基准测试。通过自动提取论文与开源项目，提供结构化、易导航的知识体系，助力研究者快速追踪前沿进展、精准定位资源，加速医疗AI创新。
summary.en: A curated repository systematically organizing AI4Med research resources, including medical LLMs, multimodal systems, datasets, and benchmarks. By automatically extracting models and datasets from papers and projects, it provides a structured, navigable knowledge base to help researchers track cutting-edge progress, locate relevant resources, and accelerate medical AI innovation.

metadata.name: grok2api
metadata.description: Grok2API 是一个基于 FastAPI 构建的 Grok 网关，支持将 Grok Web 能力以 OpenAI 兼容 API 的方式转换。

summary.zh: Grok2API 是基于 FastAPI 的 Grok 协议转换网关，将 Grok Web 能力封装为 OpenAI/Anthropic 兼容 API。支持多账号池管理、流式对话、文生图/视频、函数调用等企业级特性，内置 Admin 后台与 Web UI。适用于需要将 Grok 集成至现有 AI 工作流或实现多账号负载均衡的开发者，提供开箱即用的 API 网关解决方案。
summary.en: grok2api is a FastAPI-based gateway that converts Grok Web capabilities into OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible APIs. It features multi-account pool management, streaming/non-streaming chat, image/video generation, function calling, and unified token statistics. With built-in Admin dashboard and Web UI, it enables developers to seamlessly integrate Grok into existing AI workflows or implement account load balancing, providing an enterprise-ready API gateway solution.

metadata.name: Recordly
metadata.description: Create polished screen recordings for free. An open-source alternative to Screen Studio.

summary.zh: Recordly 是一款开源免费的跨平台屏幕录制与编辑工具，专为创建专业级演示视频和教程而设计。它提供自动缩放、光标美化、动态摄像头叠加等高级功能，内置时间线编辑器支持精细调整。采用原生捕获技术（macOS ScreenCaptureKit/Windows WGC）确保高性能，支持扩展市场定制功能，是Screen Studio的开源替代品。
summary.en: Recordly is an open-source, cross-platform screen recording and editing tool designed for creating professional demos and tutorials. It features auto-zoom, cursor polish, dynamic webcam overlays, and a timeline editor for precise adjustments. Leveraging native capture APIs (ScreenCaptureKit/WGC) for optimal performance, it supports extensibility via a community marketplace, serving as a free alternative to Screen Studio.

metadata.name: codex-oauth-automation-extension
metadata.description: Chrome扩展：支持OpenAI OAuth注册(自动开通plus账号)、验证码获取、CPA/sub/cpdex2api回调验证与自动恢复

summary.zh: Codex OAuth自动化扩展是一款Chrome插件，用于批量完成OpenAI OAuth注册与登录流程。它支持多种邮箱服务（QQ、163、DuckDuckGo等）自动获取验证码，提供侧边栏控制单步或全流程执行，具备自定义配置、自动恢复、日志记录及邮箱池管理功能。适用于需要大规模OpenAI账号授权的场景，大幅提升操作效率。
summary.en: The Codex OAuth Automation Extension is a Chrome plugin designed for bulk automation of OpenAI OAuth registration and login. It integrates multiple email services (QQ, 163, DuckDuckGo, etc.) for automatic verification code retrieval, offers sidebar control for step-by-step or full流程 execution, and features custom configuration, auto-recovery, logging, and email pool management. Ideal for large-scale OpenAI account authorization, significantly enhancing operational efficiency.

metadata.name: free-coding-models
metadata.description: Find, benchmark and install in CLI 200+ FREE coding LLM models across 20+ providers in real time

summary.zh: free-coding-models 是一个 CLI 工具，实时基准测试 238+ 个免费编程大模型，覆盖 25 家提供商。通过智能稳定性评分算法（综合 p95 延迟、抖动、峰值率和可用性），精准识别最快最稳模型。一键集成到 Continue、Cline、Aider 等主流 AI 编程工具，10 秒内完成配置，彻底告别手动筛选。
summary.en: free-coding-models is a CLI tool that benchmarks 238+ free coding LLMs across 25 providers in real-time. It calculates a Stability Score (0-100) using p95 latency, jitter, spike rate, and uptime to identify the fastest, most reliable model. One-click integration with AI coding tools like Continue, Cline, and Aider enables configuration in under 10 seconds.

metadata.name: agent-skills
metadata.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

summary.zh: Agent Skills是为AI编码代理设计的生产级工程技能库，封装了高级工程师在软件开发中的工作流程、质量门禁和最佳实践。通过/spec、/plan、/build等7个斜杠命令覆盖定义、规划、构建、验证、评审、发布全生命周期，并能根据上下文自动激活API设计、前端工程等专项技能。支持Claude Code、Cursor、Gemini、Windsurf、GitHub Copilot等主流AI编程平台，以Markdown格式提供20项标准化技能，确保AI代理在开发各阶段遵循一致的高质量工程标准。
summary.en: Agent Skills is a production-grade engineering skill set for AI coding agents, encapsulating workflows, quality gates, and best practices used by senior engineers. It covers the complete development lifecycle through 7 slash commands (/spec, /plan, /build, /test, /review, /code-simplify, /ship) and automatically activates context-specific skills like API design and frontend engineering. Supporting major AI coding platforms including Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini, Windsurf, and GitHub Copilot, it provides 20 standardized skills in Markdown format to ensure AI agents consistently follow high-quality engineering standards across all development phases.

metadata.name: ai-browser
metadata.description: 🤖 An AI-powered desktop automation agent built with Electron &   Next.js - Control your computer like manus, but as a native   desktop app, an ai browser!

summary.zh: DeepFundAI/ai-browser 是一款基于 Electron 与 Next.js 构建的 AI 驱动桌面自动化代理。支持多模态任务执行、定时任务与文件管理，集成 DeepSeek 等多 AI 提供商。提供聊天与深度探索双模式，内置可配置工作流与网页搜索，通过 UI 完成全系统设置，无需修改配置文件，实现类 Manus 的计算机控制能力。
summary.en: DeepFundAI/ai-browser is an AI-powered desktop automation agent built with Electron and Next.js. It enables multi-modal task execution, scheduled automation, and file management with support for multiple AI providers including DeepSeek. Featuring dual interaction modes (Chat and Deep Explore), configurable workflows, integrated web search, and a comprehensive UI-based settings system, it delivers Manus-like computer control capabilities as a native desktop application without requiring configuration file edits.

metadata.name: undetectable-fingerprint-browser
metadata.description: Free open-source Multilogin/Incogniton/Kameleo alternative for fingerprint spoofing (Canvas/WebGL/User-Agent). Perfect for Selenium/Playwright/Puppeteer automation, web scraping, social media bots, ads verification, and multi-accounting based on chromium. Avoid bans, bypass anti-bot systems, and prevent tracking with customizable stealth browsing

summary.zh: Undetectable Fingerprint Browser 是一款开源的反检测浏览器，专为对抗网站指纹追踪而设计。它提供全面的指纹欺骗能力，包括 Canvas、WebGL、AudioContext 等，通过一致性分析引擎确保所有字段逻辑自洽。完美兼容 Puppeteer/Playwright 自动化框架，适用于网页爬虫、社交媒体多账号管理、广告验证等场景，有效绕过反机器人系统。
summary.en: Undetectable Fingerprint Browser is a free open-source anti-detection browser engineered to defeat modern website fingerprinting systems. It provides comprehensive spoofing for Canvas, WebGL, AudioContext, fonts, timezone, and hardware parameters, featuring an exclusive consistency analysis engine that ensures all spoofed fields align logically. Fully compatible with Puppeteer, Playwright, and Selenium automation frameworks, it's ideal for web scraping, social media bots, multi-account management, and ad verification while avoiding bans and tracking.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供阿里云滑动验证码的Python自动化解决方案，通过OpenCV图像识别精准定位缺口位置，结合Selenium与undetected-chromedriver模拟人类滑块轨迹，有效绕过反爬检测。支持Windows/Linux/macOS跨平台部署，可集成至爬虫与自动化测试流程，显著提升数据采集效率与成功率。
summary.en: This repository provides a Python automation solution for bypassing Alibaba Cloud's slider captcha. It utilizes OpenCV for accurate gap detection and combines Selenium with undetected-chromedriver to simulate human-like mouse movements, effectively circumventing anti-scraping mechanisms. Supporting cross-platform deployment across Windows/Linux/macOS, the tool can be seamlessly integrated into web scraping and automation testing pipelines, dramatically enhancing data collection efficiency and success rates while reducing detection risks.

metadata.name: omi
metadata.description: AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

summary.zh: Omi 是一款开源的 AI 第二大脑工具，通过实时捕获屏幕内容和对话录音，自动生成文字转录、会议摘要与待办事项。支持 macOS、iOS、Android 及可穿戴设备，采用 Swift/Rust 与 Flutter 跨平台架构，集成 Deepgram 语音识别与 LLM 记忆能力，为 30 万+ 专业人士提供智能知识管理与生产力提升。
summary.en: Omi is an open-source AI second brain that captures screen content and conversations in real-time, automatically generating transcripts, meeting summaries, and actionable items. Built with Swift/Rust for desktop and Flutter for mobile platforms, it supports macOS, iOS, Android, and wearables. The backend integrates Deepgram speech recognition, speaker diarization, and LLM memory capabilities, serving 300,000+ professionals with intelligent knowledge management and productivity enhancement across all devices.

metadata.name: audiblez
metadata.description: Generate audiobooks from e-books

summary.zh: Audiblez 是一款基于 Kokoro-82M 模型的电子书转有声书工具，支持 EPUB 转 M4B 格式。它提供命令行和图形界面，支持 CUDA 加速，在 T4 GPU 上5分钟可完成《动物农场》转换。支持8种语言和多种语音，跨平台运行于 Linux、Mac 和 Windows，依赖 ffmpeg 和 espeak-ng，可调整语速生成自然语音的有声书。
summary.en: Audiblez converts EPUB e-books to M4B audiobooks using the Kokoro-82M text-to-speech model. It offers both CLI and GUI interfaces with CUDA acceleration, processing "Animal Farm" in 5 minutes on T4 GPU. Supporting 8 languages and multiple voices, it runs cross-platform on Linux, Mac, and Windows. Dependencies include ffmpeg and espeak-ng, with adjustable speech speed for natural-sounding audiobook generation.

metadata.name: llm_wiki
metadata.description: LLM Wiki is a cross-platform desktop application that turns your documents into an organized, interlinked knowledge base — automatically. Instead of traditional RAG (retrieve-and-answer from scratch every time), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki from your sources。

summary.zh: LLM Wiki 是一个跨平台桌面应用，基于 Karpathy 的 LLM Wiki 模式，自动化将文档转化为持久化、相互链接的知识库。它采用增量构建而非传统 RAG，支持两步链式思考摄取、四信号知识图谱、Louvain 社区检测和向量语义搜索。兼容 Obsidian，提供深度研究、网页剪藏和异步审查功能，显著提升个人知识管理效率。
summary.en: LLM Wiki is a cross-platform desktop application that automatically transforms documents into a persistent, interlinked knowledge base using an incremental build approach, diverging from traditional RAG. It features two-step chain-of-thought ingestion, a four-signal knowledge graph, Louvain community detection, and vector semantic search. Compatible with Obsidian, it offers deep research, web clipping, and async review, enhancing personal knowledge management.

metadata.name: AI-Video-Transcriber
metadata.description: Transcribe and summarize videos and podcasts using AI. Open-source, multi-platform, and supports multiple languages.

summary.zh: AI-Video-Transcriber 是一款开源的跨平台视频播客转录总结工具。采用字幕优先架构，支持30+平台直链提取，无字幕时自动降级至 Faster-Whisper 语音识别。集成 OpenAI 兼容 API 实现文本纠错、智能分段与多语言摘要，支持 BYOK 模式，移动端友好，大幅提升音视频内容处理效率。
summary.en: AI-Video-Transcriber is an open-source, cross-platform tool for transcribing and summarizing videos and podcasts. It features a subtitle-first architecture that instantly extracts transcripts from 30+ platforms with native subtitles, falling back to Faster-Whisper for audio transcription. Integrated with OpenAI-compatible APIs, it provides intelligent text optimization, multi-language summarization, and conditional translation. The BYOK model configuration and mobile-friendly interface significantly streamline audio/video content processing workflows.

metadata.name: skills
metadata.description: The open agent skills tool - npx skills

summary.zh: Vercel Labs推出的skills CLI是AI智能体技能管理的事实标准工具。它支持43个主流智能体平台（包括Claude Code、Cursor等），提供统一的技能安装、分发和管理体验。通过npx运行，支持GitHub、GitLab、本地路径等多种源格式，具备项目级/全局安装、CI/CD友好等特性，极大简化了智能体功能扩展的流程。
summary.en: The skills CLI by Vercel Labs is a de facto standard tool for managing AI agent skills. Supporting 43 major agent platforms including Claude Code and Cursor, it provides unified installation, distribution, and management. Run via npx, it supports multiple source formats (GitHub, GitLab, local paths) with project/global installation modes and CI/CD-friendly workflows, significantly simplifying agent capability extension.

metadata.name: design-patterns-for-humans
metadata.description: An ultra-simplified explanation to design patterns

summary.zh: Design Patterns for Humans 以极简主义方式解构23种经典设计模式，通过现实世界类比和PHP代码示例，将创建型、结构型、行为型模式转化为易懂指南。核心价值在于降低设计模式理解门槛，提供即学即用的实践参考，适用于软件工程师、架构师及编程学习者快速掌握面向对象设计精髓。
summary.en: Design Patterns for Humans simplifies 23 classic design patterns through plain language, real-world analogies, and PHP code samples. This project demystifies creational, structural, and behavioral patterns, serving as an accessible learning resource for developers and architects to master object-oriented design principles efficiently.

metadata.name: developer-roadmap
metadata.description: Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.

summary.zh: 这是一个社区驱动的开发者学习路线图项目，提供前端、后端、DevOps、AI等20+技术领域的交互式学习路径。用户可点击节点查看详细指南、最佳实践和面试题，帮助开发者明确职业发展方向，系统性提升技术能力。项目采用开源协作模式，持续更新前沿技术内容。
summary.en: This community-driven project delivers interactive developer roadmaps covering 20+ technical domains including frontend, backend, DevOps, AI engineering, and data science. Users can click roadmap nodes to access detailed guides, best practices, and curated interview questions, helping developers systematically plan career growth and master in-demand skills. The open-source collaborative model ensures continuous updates with cutting-edge technology trends and industry requirements, making it an essential resource for tech career development.

metadata.name: docker-android
metadata.description: 🤖 A minimal and customizable Docker image running the Android emulator as a service.

summary.zh: 该仓库提供基于Alpine的轻量级Docker镜像，用于在容器中运行Android模拟器服务。支持KVM加速、无头运行和远程控制，适用于CI/CD自动化测试。镜像内置ADB服务器和scrcpy兼容，可自定义Android版本与设备类型，提供GPU加速选项，最小镜像仅138MB。
summary.en: This repository provides a lightweight Alpine-based Docker image for running Android emulator as a service. It supports KVM acceleration, headless operation, and remote control, ideal for CI/CD automation testing. The image includes ADB server and scrcpy compatibility, allows customization of Android versions and device types, offers GPU acceleration options, with minimal image size of 138MB.

metadata.name: obscura
metadata.description: The headless browser for AI agents and web scraping

summary.zh: Obscura 是一款用 Rust 编写的开源无头浏览器，专为 AI 智能体和网页爬虫设计。它内置 V8 引擎执行真实 JavaScript，支持 Chrome DevTools 协议，可无缝替代 Puppeteer 和 Playwright。相比 Chrome，内存占用仅 30MB（降低 85%），启动瞬时完成，内置反检测功能，单二进制无依赖。支持并行抓取、动态内容等待和表单自动化，是规模化自动化的理想工具。
summary.en: Obscura is an open-source headless browser written in Rust, designed for AI agents and web scraping. It runs real JavaScript via V8, supports Chrome DevTools Protocol, and serves as a drop-in replacement for Puppeteer and Playwright. Compared to Chrome, it uses only 30MB memory (85% less), starts instantly, and features built-in anti-detection. With a single binary, no dependencies, and support for parallel scraping, dynamic content waiting, and form automation, it's ideal for scalable automation tasks.
